Name: Yuca
Description:
A Yuca é a proptech referência em experiências descomplicadas de moradia como serviço, com soluções para quem deseja morar em São Paulo, empresas em busca de Corporate Housing e até mesmo investidores do segmento residencial para renda. Nosso objetivo é revolucionar a vida de quem mora nas cidades, oferecendo facilidade a moradores, incorporadoras, proprietários e investidores no universo imobiliário.

Para tornar isso possível, a Yuca está presente de ponta a ponta no processo de locação. Fazemos a curadoria dos investimentos em real estate com sistema de precificação inteligente, desenvolvemos a melhor plataforma de locação como serviço, 100% digital, usamos ciência de dados e UX para acelerar a ocupação das unidades e garantimos um atendimento humanizado no suporte aos inquilinos. 

Já são mais de 1.000 unidades disponíveis em nossa plataforma para aluguel residencial de média e longa duração, que variam entre apartamentos, studios e colivings (apartamentos para compartilhar) nos principais bairros da capital de São Paulo. Além disso, o aluguel é fechado diretamente pela plataforma online da Yuca, sem fiador, e com contratos flexíveis. Agora, estamos expandindo nossa atuação para o retrofit de prédios inteiramente nossos, com unidades multi-familiares. Também oferecemos uma solução de Corporate Housing, para empresas que necessitam de moradias corporativas para seus funcionários.

Desde a sua fundação, a empresa já captou mais de R$200 milhões através de aportes de fundos de Venture Capital e de retornos do seu Fundo de Investimento Imobiliário, YUFI11 - um dos primeiros no Brasil voltado para renda residencial.

Quer conhecer melhor a gente? Visite nosso site (www.yuca.live)!

Yuca
Revolucionando a vida de quem mora na cidade. 

CRECI/SP: 036813-J

Name: SmartStay

Name: Royal York Property Management
Description:
Royal York Property Management is the premier property management and leasing company in Ontario, boasting an extensive portfolio of over 22,000 properties. What sets us apart is our unique offering of guaranteed rental income to landlords, ensuring peace of mind and financial stability. With a remarkable $10.1 billion in real estate assets under management, we stand as one of Canada's largest and most reputable property management firms. Additionally, our global presence is expanding and we now service 11 locations in Europe and over 40 locations in North America.

Our commitment to innovation drives our approach to property management. Leveraging our proprietary technology, we aim to disrupt the industry and enhance processes and systems. With over 20 strategically positioned offices across North America and Europe, we provide clients with local expertise and unwavering service delivery, as all departments operate 24/7.

At Royal York Property Management, we treat our clients' investment properties with utmost care, as if they were our own. Whether it's addressing maintenance concerns or conducting tenant showings, we consistently ask ourselves if we are meeting the standards we would set for our own properties. Our primary focus is to prioritize the needs of our clients and tenants, striving to achieve excellence every day.

Royal York Property Management goes above and beyond just rent collection. We are the only company in the industry that offers a genuine rental guarantee for our residential properties. Our confidence in our rigorous tenant placement process enables us to guarantee rent payment, cover legal expenses, and even replace tenants if they default on their rental payments during the agreed term.

Name: Vesteda
Description:
Vesteda is een belegger die zich richt op de vastgoedsector ‘woningen’ in Nederland. Vesteda belegt gelden van institutionele beleggers, zoals pensioenfondsen en verzekeraars. Vesteda heeft in totaal meer dan 9,4 miljard euro belegd in residentieel vastgoed. De verhuurportefeuille omvat circa 28.000 woningen. Deze woningen liggen hoofdzakelijk in economische sterke gebieden en grootstedelijke regio’s.

About Vesteda
Vesteda is an investor with a clear focus on the Dutch residential real estate market. Vesteda invests funds for institutional investors, such as pension funds and insurers. Vesteda has a total capital of more than 9.4 billion euro invested in residential real estate. The company’s rental portfolio stands at a total of approximately 28,000 residential units. Vesteda’s homes are mainly located in economically strong regions and core urban regions.

Name: Parkbridge

Name: JFL.inc

JFL Living. Refúgios autênticos para o seu estilo de vida.

Name: Monarch Investment and Management Group
Description:
Monarch Investment and Management Group ("Monarch") specializes in the acquisition and management of income-producing real estate, particularly multi-family apartment communities. Through these real estate investment vehicles, we provide investors with the opportunity for quarterly income as well as an excellent long-term return on investment.

Unlike investment brokers or REITs (Real Estate Investment Trusts), Monarch remains part of the process all the way through conclusion. The same people who approve the project are the ones who are actively involved in managing the property every day. We are personally invested and highly committed to the success of the project at every phase.

It is this unique and continuous involvement that separates Monarch from the competition and drives superior returns for our investors.

                                                                 Our Mission:

Monarch’s mission is to be a leader in multi-family company in the industry. Our processes and people set us apart, in an effort to deliver superior results to all stakeholders. (Residents, staff and investors)

                                                                  Our Vision:

Monarch Investment and Management Group strives to be the best multi-family company in the industry. We achieve our goal by hiring dedicated team members, well-suited for their individual positions, who take pride in their work and in their co-workers.

MIMG self-manages by providing in-house property management, maintenance, accounting, marketing, and legal services. We work daily to maintain and improve the rental experience in a cost effective manner. Our integrity in achieving the best value for our residents’ money, also adds value to our investment and superior returns to our investors.

We wish to acknowledge our entire staff. The way team members perform their duties reflects on themselves and the company as a whole.

Name: SEMSAMAR
Description:
Depuis 1985, la SEMSAMAR, Société d'Economie Mixte de Saint-Martin, apporte des solutions dans les domaines de l’aménagement urbain et de l’immobilier pour le compte des collectivités, de l’État, des entreprises privées et des particuliers. 

Nous sommes l’unique entreprise à offrir ce niveau d’expertise locale à la fois à Saint-Martin, en Guadeloupe, en Guyane et en Martinique. La SEMSAMAR est devenue un acteur important dans l’immobilier qui investit, chaque année, plusieurs dizaines de millions d’euros dans ces territoires. 

Sur chacun de ces territoires, nous avons construit pas à pas des équipes dédiées et tissé un réseau de partenaires locaux qui nous permettent d’offrir un haut niveau d’expertise et d’apporter des solutions sur l’ensemble de la chaine de valeur immobilière.

Nous proposons un large panel d’expertises en aménagement et en immobilier. Nous pouvons jouer plusieurs rôles  :
- Aménageur urbain,
- Bailleur social ou privé,
- Promoteur aménageur,
- Constructeur de logements, d’immobilier d’entreprises ou d’équipements publics,
- Promoteur immobilier,
- Développeur et gestionnaire d’équipements à vocation touristique

Sur chaque territoire, nous avons implanté des agences afin d’assurer de la proximité et un service pertinent à nos clients. Nous avons la chance d‘avoir des collaborateurs aux compétences très diverses qui renforcent notre capacité à anticiper les problèmes, à réagir rapidement et, in fine, à trouver des solutions.  

En nous rejoignant, vous serez étonné par la diversité de nos activités, des profils de nos collaborateurs ainsi que des challenges à relever quotidiennement.

Name: Vaca Muerta Housing

Más de 35.000 trabajadores se hospedan con nosotros desde 2017

Contactanos para obtener más información sobre nuestros servicios de alojamiento en Añelo, Vaca Muerta!

Name: Luxe Premium Holiday Homes
Description: At Luxe Premium Holiday Homes, we take the hassle out of property management and add a sophisticated and luxurious touch. Located in Dubai, we are a boutique holiday home property management company with a flair for the finer things. Our AI tech-driven business model is sure to turn heads, while our wide range of services, the latest property management technology, combined with our attentive 24/7 customer support and expert management team, will leave you feeling pampered. Name: Aquitanis - Office public de l'habitat de Bordeaux Métropole
Description:
Opérateur urbain et social en territoire depuis 1920, Aquitanis, Office public de l’habitat de Bordeaux Métropole, a pour mission de concevoir, produire et gérer durablement des sites d’habitat adaptés aux défis de notre société.

Il intervient sur le territoire de Bordeaux Métropole, sa collectivité de rattachement, et en Gironde mais également au travers d’opérations d’aménagement en région Nouvelle-Aquitaine. Il accompagne les politiques publiques de l’habitat et les nécessaires transitions écologiques et sociétales des territoires.

Il y co-construit en coopération avec celles et ceux qui y vivent et les font vivre des réponses solidaires et responsables intégrant les trois axes qui signent ses projets innovants de bailleur social, maître d’ouvrage public et aménageur urbain régional : pouvoir d’agir et implication des habitants, développement de la nature à vivre et nourricière, production d’un habitat frugal et essentiel.

Son action s’incarne dans une démarche stratégique de Responsabilité Sociétal de l’entreprise, engagée dès 2008, en lien avec les 17 Objectifs de Développement durable fixés par l’ONU. Elle est évaluée "RSE exemplaire" depuis 2016 par afnor certification selon le modèle international AFAQ 26 000. Elle s’inscrit dans une raison d’être forte* et engageante coconstruite avec l’ensemble de ses partie-prenantes (administrateurs, salariés, locataires et leurs représentants, élus, financeurs, fournisseurs…). Ainsi, nous réinterrogeons en permanence nos activités et nos pratiques au regard des enjeux économiques, sociétaux et environnementaux d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

* Notre raison d’être : Parce que nous, équipes d’aquitanis, sommes convaincues qu’habiter le monde en respect des humains et du vivant est possible, nous nous engageons en coopération avec celles et ceux qui vivent et font vivre les territoires à créer des réponses solidaires et responsables. Nous faisons le choix de l’essentiel et nous croyons au pouvoir d’agir collectivement.

Name: Triad Vacation Rentals
Description:
Booked by Triad. Hosted by you.

Triad Vacation Rentals helps homeowners, property managers, and investors across the U.S. make short-term rentals more profitable - and less stressful.

We handle the digital side of hosting - pricing, strategy, and listing optimization - while you focus on the guest experience. Our AI-powered pricing tools, guided by experienced analysts, adjust nightly rates in real time and adapt to each property’s strengths.

We manage listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com, and offer monthly performance reviews with a dedicated U.S.-based account manager to keep your goals on track.

Triad has grown through referrals by delivering results and treating every homeowner as a partner.

Follow us for insights on pricing, digital marketing, and short-term rental trends.

Name: Nohée
Description:
Nohée, propose partout en France des résidences créatrices de lien destinées aux seniors d’aujourd’hui et demain. Avec une architecture et un style affirmé mais propres à chacune, nos résidences promettent bien plus qu’un chez-soi. Nohée permet de concilier le plaisir de moments de découverte et de convivialité à une vie indépendante, à son rythme et selon ses envies et en toute sérénité grâce à la présence d’équipes engagées et positives, et à un esprit de famille chaleureux.

Gates Hudson works one-on-one with our clients, always putting real relationships with real human beings first which allows for us to create custom solutions that serve each project’s unique objectives, challenges and opportunities. Name: Ramada Inn
Description:
Located in Southern Utah in the ever growing city of St George you’ll find a gorgeous multi family housing community with exquisite amenities. The best management team to make you truly feel a part of your neighborhood. Maintenance free living close to area shopping and dining. Adjacent to the gorgeous bike trails on the south side of the Virgin River. Scheduled activities and well appointed apartment homes. 1-2-3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms with ample storage in every unit. Garages and covered parking included. Energy star appliances and LVP flooring in every room. Easy to maintain and affordable! Wi-fi includes as well as valet trash services. On site management and service team to attend to every need. Enjoy the great outdoors at nearby state and national parks. UTV and ATV trails and roads abundant. A short drive to the local airport or shuttle to Vegas. Several golf courses within miles. Pet friendly community with nearby parks.
Enjoy your life in beautiful and historic St George!

Name: NEXITY STUDEA
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ? 
Acteur de référence dans le secteur des résidences avec services, Nexity Studéa a connu toutes les évolutions de ce marché depuis sa création en 1987. 

Aujourd’hui, Nexity Studéa compte plus de 120 résidences en France, présent dans plus de 50 villes, réalisant plus de 27 000 locations chaque année. Nous sommes un acteur pérenne en perpétuel développement et affichons fièrement notre position d’acteur de référence portée par nos valeurs que sont la proximité, le bien-être et la responsabilité.

Notre expertise / Notre concept 
Studéa, facilitateur de vie, propose un concept de résidence & de co-living, humain, collaboratif et connecté, en proposant des appartements prêts à vivre, des espaces facilitant la rencontre et la convivialité, une offre de services responsable et digitale. Notre concept est pensé pour et avec nos locataires.

Par ailleurs, notre offre est en permanente adaptation aux besoins de notre clientèle et des collectivités et propose des gammes de produits adaptés à chaque territoire.

Nos valeurs 
Nos actions sont portées vers le bien-être de nos locataires et la création de symbioses avec les villes et les quartiers qu’ils occupent. 
Nous nous intégrons à la ville et intégrons les villes dans nos résidences. Des initiatives concrètes sont mises en place, preuves de notre engagement sociétal.

Plus qu’un simple hébergeur, nous avons un véritable enjeu sociétal à relever.

Name: Groupe Medway
Description:
Medway est un promoteur immobilier spécialisé dans le domaine de la santé et un partenaire administratif pour des groupes de médecine de famille (GMF) du réseau de la santé publique. 

À ce jour, l’entreprise assure la gestion de plus de 20 immeubles à usage mixte à travers le Québec, totalisant plus de 850 unités locatives, et près d’un million de pieds carrés de locaux commerciaux. Medway accompagne également dix GMF, représentant plus de 225 médecins de famille et médecins spécialistes, dans leurs activités administratives.

Nos complexes, modernes et pensés pour répondre aux besoins de chacun, permettent de faire cohabiter harmonieusement les communautés résidentielles, médicales et commerciales. Cette mixité enrichit chaque milieu de vie que nous créons et repose sur notre vision de bâtir le plus vaste parc immobilier dédié à la santé au Canada.
______________________________________________________

Medway is a real estate developer specializing in the healthcare sector and an administrative partner for Family Medicine Groups within the public healthcare system.

To date, the company manages over 20 mixed-use buildings across Quebec, totaling more than 850 rental units and nearly one million square feet of commercial space. Medway also supports ten FMGs—representing more than 225 family physicians and specialists—in their administrative operations.

Our complexes, modern and thoughtfully designed to meet diverse needs, bring together residential, medical, and commercial communities in a harmonious way. This mix enhances every living environment we create and reflects our vision of building the largest healthcare-focused real estate portfolio in Canada.

Name: Paris Ouest Sotheby's International Realty
Description:
Sotheby’s International Realty a réalisé 167 milliards de dollars de CA en 2022, devenant ainsi LA référence de l'immobilier de prestige, bénéficiant d'une implantation internationale avec plus de 1.075 bureaux immobiliers dans les plus grandes villes : LONDRES • TOKYO • MARRAKECH • LOS ANGELES • NEW YORK • RIO DE JANEIRO • MIAMI • DUBAI • HONG KONG • DOHA • TAIPEI • MALTE • TORONTO • ABU DHABI • TAHITI • SAO PAULO • MONACO • SINGAPOUR • dont 70 agences en France. 

26 000 agents immobiliers dans 81 pays.

48 000 000 de visites sur le site Sotheby's International Realty en 2022

Plus d'1 million d'abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux.

Depuis 50 ans, le leader national en France propose des propriétés de prestige à la vente, allant du pied-à-terre à l'hôtel particulier, assurant ainsi une couverture nationale sans précédent sur le marché immobilier français.

1. Expert Rental Training  
We offer specialised, online courses and live webinars, covering vital topics such as legislation, lease agreements, rental mandates, as well as key rental processes. with a specific focus on legal compliance, best practices and communication with all stakeholders.

In our webinars & courses we dive deep into key rental processes like breach management, rental mandates, and the tenant exit process. Each session is designed to offer practical insights and tools that agents can immediately apply in their businesses.

2. Compliance Consulting
We provide consulting services to ensure residential rental businesses stay compliant with the plethora of laws that impact on rental management operations in South Africa. Our expert guidance, as well as our best practice & legally compliant rental process blueprints help agencies streamline operations, mitigate risks, and improve service to landlords & tenants.

3. Rental Training Club Membership
Our Rental Training Club offers members access to exclusive monthly webinars, expert guidance, and industry updates. Members benefit from ongoing professional development to stay ahead of market and regulatory changes.

4. Best Practice Rental Process Blueprints Document Packs
We provide legally compliant rental process blueprints process checklists & stakeholder communication templates for most of the crucial day-to-day rental management processes. These are essential tools for any rental agent aiming to manage properties effectively and professionally.

Name: Baugenossenschaft Bahnheim eG
Description:
Konstant faire Wohnungsmieten statt Preisexplosion durch Spekulation. Dauernutzungsrecht statt befristete Mietverträge. Geldanlage statt Kaution ... Wo gibt es denn so etwas?

Die Genossenschaftsidee ist heute zeitgemäßer, moderner und konkurrenzfähiger denn je. Da die Genossenschaft nicht gewinnorientiert arbeiten muss, ist das Wohnen außerordentlich günstig. Genau hier liegt das gemeinsame Interesse aller Beteiligten: einerseits das der Baugenossenschaft Bahnheim eG, die schöne Wohnungen zu vernünftigen Preisen anbieten möchte, andererseits das der Mitglieder, die dieses Angebot gerne annehmen. Und dabei eigentlich gar keine Mieter sind, sondern Miteigentümer. Positiver Nebeneffekt: Statt Kaution zu zahlen, erwirbt jedes Mitglied Genossenschaftsanteile. Hierauf werden maximal 4 Prozent Dividende gezahlt.

Zur Zeit zählt die Baugenossenschaft Bahnheim eG knapp 1.200 Mitglieder. Möchten auch Sie bald dazugehören? Wir würden uns freuen!

Louer en confiance, c’est ça le bon sens!
Tylit connecte les propriétaires de résidences secondaires avec des locataires responsables, sur le modèle d'un abonnement de jours forfaitaires sur 1 an.
Ce fonctionnement simplifie la gestion locative, réduit les incertitudes et assure un revenu stable, tout en offrant au propriétaire la confiance et la sérénité nécessaires pour louer son bien en toute tranquillité. 

Tylit, 1ère plateforme de mise en relation et de location de résidences secondaires par abonnement annuel, entres hôtes responsables.
Un modèle unique : 
 Un propriétaire amortit le coût de sa résidence secondaire en louant un forfait de jours à
 Un locataire unique, qui cherche un pied-à-terre pour
 Un an.

Tylit, c’est une nouvelle forme d’habitat basée sur une location touristique récurrente et responsable. 

Avec sa branche Mobitylit, TYLIT répond également aux besoins des entreprises et institutions en quête de logements meublés adaptés pour leurs collaborateurs sur des contrats courts et moyens termes, dans des territoires où l'offre de logements locatifs disponible est inexistante.

NOS ENGAGEMENTS
1)	Assurer le maintien de l’écosystème des territoires

Accéder à la propriété dans ce secteur devient donc, de plus en plus, une réelle problématique pour de nombreux ménages.

Notre ambition : 

- Permettre à la majorité de devenir propriétaire, sous conditions de revenus. 
- Proposer les prix les plus bas du marché. L’OFS Tous propriétaires permet de réaliser des programmes immobiliers neufs en Bail Réel Solidaire (BRS) afin de proposer aux ménages des logements neufs à des prix nettement inférieurs à ceux du marché.

Notre objectif :

- Élargir au plus grand nombre l’accession à la propriété dans une zone où la charge foncière est élevée.
- Permettre aux habitants de se loger dans leur commune, près de leur lieu de travail et de l’endroit où leurs enfants sont scolarisés.

L’OFS Tous propriétaires, un OFS qui rassemble.

Name: Gamla Byn AB
Description:
Gamla Byn AB är det kommunala fastighetsbolaget i Avesta kommun. Även Gamla Byn AB:s dotterbolaget Avesta Industristad AB, där vi bland annat hyr ut kontors- och industrilokaler, får också lite uppmärksamhet i denna kanal.

Gamla Byn AB har 1099 lägenheter med en sammanlagd yta av cirka 73 400 m² och ett lokalbestånd som uppgår till cirka 128 900 m². Dotterbolaget Avesta Industristad AB innehar ett lokalbestånd som uppgår till cirka 98 100 m².

Koncernen Gamla Byn AB ägs till 100 % av Avesta Kommun. I koncernen ingår sedan 1999 även dotterföretaget Avesta Industristad AB, som ägs av moderbolaget till 100 %.

Name: WGLi Wohnungsgenossenschaft Lichtenberg eG
Description:
Die WGLi Wohnungsgenossenschaft Lichtenberg eG, gegründet 1954, ist mit einem Bestand von mehr als 10.000 Wohnungen eine der großen Wohnungsgenossenschaften in Berlin.

Durch ihren sanierten Wohnungsbestand und die Gestaltung schöner Wohnumfelder ist sie vor allem bei jungen Familien beliebt. Dank des lebenslangen Nutzungsrechtes und der modernen Ausstattung unserer Wohnungen lässt es sich bis ins hohe Alter gut und schön leben. Mit fairen Nutzungsgebühren durch ein eigenes Mietenkonzept gibt die WGLi ihren Mitgliedern Sicherheit und Geborgenheit.

Die WGLi arbeitet weiter intensiv daran, die Wohnungen und Grundstücke möglichst ökologisch, ökonomisch und sozial nachhaltig zu bewirtschaften. Jedes Jahr investiert die WGLi einen zweistelligen Millionenbetrag in Instandsetzung und Modernisierung, um den Mitgliedern ein hohes Maß an Wohnkomfort zu bieten.

Im Mittelpunkt ihrer Arbeit steht die Förderung der mehr als 11.000 Genossenschaftsmitglieder. Die WGLi organisiert regelmäßig Veranstaltungen wie Hoffeste und unterstützt die Bildung von KiezForen und Nachbarschaftstreffs sowie Gemeinschafts- und Begegnungsgärten.

Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams – Ihr berufliche Zukunft beginnt hier:
Wir sind ein Unternehmen, das nicht auf Profit ausgerichtet ist, sondern das Wohl seiner Mitglieder im Fokus hat. Wir bieten interessante und zukunftsorientierte Aufgabengebiete – eine gute Perspektive für die eigene Karriere!

Bei uns zu arbeiten, bedeutet auch Teil einer Gemeinschaft zu sein, die sich für nachhaltiges und sozialverantwortliches Wohnen einsetzt.

Description:
California Apartments offers spacious apartment homes in the Absecon, New Jersey area. We offer varied lease lengths and furnished or unfurnished apartment homes. Signature, Contemporary, and Classic finish options are available in our unfurnished apartments as well as free water, sewer, and garbage. All apartments include central heat and air conditioning, an all major appliances.

Starting with the community building where we host monthly events such as wine and paint parties, catered dinners, and social mixers, California Apartments sets the stage for a vibrant living experience. Residents can also reserve the community room for their own private entertaining.  Нашата цел е да създадем уютни и стилни домове, където гостите могат да се насладят на уникални моменти. От подбора на имотите до внимателното им управление и внимание към най-малкия детайл, ние вярваме във принуса на качеството и комфорта върху пътешествията.

Description:
Mistoria Worsley is a residential lettings and sales agent offering the highest quality services. We have been looking after all different types of properties for more than a decade and boasting staff with over 30 years combined experience. 

We offer a wide range of services from HMO'S to plots of land a 1 bedroom flat to large industrial units. No property will be to big or to small. 

We have tenants waiting to pay YOU rent!

The rental market is a booming industry and as fast as the market place grows, legislation and regulations evolve too. Selecting experienced professionals like Mistoria to manage your property could ensure you continuous yield, keep your financial investment growing and allow you to relax in the knowledge that both you and your nest egg are being well cared for 24/7.

Here at Mistoria, our highly successful and efficient team bring landlords and tenants together to create long lasting and beneficial results for all parties. We want your tenants to stay with you and maintain your property’s earning power so we take extra care, right from day one. We don’t cut corners and we treat your valuable possession with the care it deserves.

We provide landlords with a selection of contracts to allow you to choose your own level of service.

DSS and Social Housing

Mistoria are a DSS friendly estate agent based in Walkden, Salford and DSS tenants are welcomed. We offer a wide range of accommodation, from fully furnished house shares with bills included, flats and 2,3 and 4 bed houses to suit everyone’s needs.

Unlike other agents the Mistoria team does not discriminate against tenants who are in receipt of Housing Benefit or Universal Credit. All applicants will be treated fairly and there is a reference process. However where applicants are not able to meet certain requirements regarding guarantors or deposits for example – Mistoria can access services to assist with securing a tenancy such as by using rental bonds and advance payments.

Name: Hawes House
Description:
Experience the best of Los Angeles living at Hawes House. This architectural gem was designed by the renowned architect Arther W. Hawes in 1938. Over the past years, Hawes House was carefully restored and thoughtfully upgraded. It offers original charm with modern-day convenience and technology. Tucked away in the cozy, prestigious, and quiet neighborhood at the crest of Beverly Hills and West Hollywood, this tree-lined and calming environment offers homes away from home. The property is on-site managed, gated, and camera monitored. Hawes House feels like a remote oasis, yet it is just footsteps away from world-class dining, culture, and shopping. Hawes House welcomes artists, creatives, travelers, and professionals of any kind, for an unforgettable time in Los Angeles. The stay duration at Hawes House is between one month and one year with the option to extend. 

Hawes House landscaping was designed with native and low-water usage plants by the awarded architectural design firm Lifescapes International, Inc, Newport Beach (Bellagio, Las Vegas/ The Grove, Los Angles). Five private patios offer space for concentrated work, collaboration as well as meditation, and leisure. Enjoy the scent of Jasmine, Lavender, and Rosemary. Feel the healing energy of surrounding trees like avocado, lemon, orange, kumquat, peach, bird of paradise, cactus, and succulent. Ambient outdoor lighting and under-tree lights illuminate pathways and patios. The gas fire pit spreads warmth and coziness. Enjoy a perfect LA evening!

All apartments are preciously furnished and decorated. It is our priority to offer a relaxing stay, good sleep, and well-being during your time in Los Angeles. The apartments feature hardwood floors, high-quality metal/wood windows, wooden blinds, ultra-high-speed internet, "The Frame" smart TV, a new sound system, "Phenomenal Aire - natural ionization air filtration", and much more.

Name: Al Sidra Middle East Facilities Management LLC
Description:
AL SIDRA Middle East Facilities Management provides complete solutions for all the facilities & property management needs. Our approach is to provide Integrated facilities management (IFM), which is the method of consolidating the property services under one contract and a single management team. 

Our client focuses on their core business and we take care of all the associated works. 
• Community/ Accommodation Management 
• Catering Services 
• Soft Services 
• Hard Services 
• Laundry Services 

Community/ Accommodation Management : 
Al Sidra is operating 2 accommodation communities of around 50,000 population. It is indeed a great opportunity & challenge to manage diversified populations with different nationalities, religious thoughts, language, ethnicity & so on. 

Catering Services : 
Al Sidra operates 2 of the biggest central food production units in UAE. These facilities can serve around 200,000 meals per day. Our operations are fully compliant with HACCP & ADAFSA guidelines as well ISO certified. 

Laundry Services: 
Al Sidra operates one of the biggest central laundry production units in UAE. This facility can handle around 70 tons per day. 

Hard Services: 
Al Sidra is the one source and main contractor that provides facilities with cost-effective maintenance services. Al Sidra’s approach in managing assets is to implement a planned maintenance program which minimizes repairs, reduces ongoing maintenance spend, and increases the facility’s operating life. 

Soft Services:
We provide a wide range of general cleaning services for various sectors. We work with our clients to gain a detailed understanding of their needs, challenges, short- and long-term objectives. In order to maintain hassle-free environment expert teams are deployed to carry out the required services in utmost professional manner.

Em 2024, o sucesso se consolidou com o lançamento do Portofino Eco Residence, empreendimento que teve mais de 70% das vendas realizadas na primeira semana.

Em 2022, a Vista ao Mar adquiriu as cotas da Oceania, marcando o início de uma parceria ainda mais forte. Agora, com o rebranding em 2024, as duas empresas se fundem sob uma nova identidade, Vista 1942 Incorporações, representando o compromisso com a inovação, a qualidade e o respeito ao meio ambiente que sempre definiram ambas as marcas.

Combinando a expertise e a tradição da Oceania com a visão moderna e sustentável da Vista ao Mar, a Vista 1942 Incorporações surge para liderar o futuro do mercado imobiliário de alto padrão, desenvolvendo projetos que valorizam a natureza, a cultura local e o bem-estar de seus clientes.

Name: Archipiélago Inversiones Inmobiliarias SpA
Description:
Archipiélago Inversiones Inmobiliarias

En Archipiélago acercamos el mundo inmobiliario a más personas, ofreciendo una forma simple, transparente y accesible de participar en inversiones con activos reales.

A través de nuestro modelo de inversión colectiva, cada proyecto se estructura legalmente bajo una Sociedad por Acciones (SpA), de la cual cada inversionista es socio. La SpA es propietaria del departamento, y Archipiélago se encarga de su administración integral, asegurando que todo funcione correctamente desde el arriendo hasta la distribución de los ingresos.

 Ingresos mensuales: cada socio recibe su parte del arriendo, una vez descontados los costos de administración.
 Gestión profesional: nos ocupamos de la búsqueda del arrendatario, cobro de rentas, mantención y toda la administración del inmueble.
 Crecimiento en el tiempo: las inversiones aumentan su valor gracias a la plusvalía del departamento y a la variación de la UF.
 Liquidez: ofrecemos mecanismos que permiten vender acciones y hacer líquida la inversión en plazos breves.

Nuestros proyectos —como Isla Meulín, Isla Lemuy, Isla Quenac e Isla Cailín— mantienen vacancia histórica cero, con propiedades arrendadas y rentas distribuidas mes a mes entre los inversionistas.

En Archipiélago creemos que invertir en bienes raíces no debe ser un privilegio, sino una oportunidad concreta y bien gestionada.

Te invitamos a conocer más en:
 www.archipielagoinmobiliario.com

 contacto@archipielagoinmobiliario.cl

Name: Apartment for Rent - דירה להשכיר
Description:
Apartment for Rent was established in 2013 with the purpose of helping to advance feasible solutions for the housing crisis in Israel, including the encouragement, development and assimilation of a “long term rental” model, that will provide a regulated and attainable long-term alternative for purchasing an apartment. the “long-term rental”model create certainty and stability in Israel’s rental market.

Apartment for Rent is a headquarters company with a wide range of activities:
1. The company functions as a governmental executing arm for a variety of activities:  promoting statutory planning for residential areas on state-owned and private land, including residence under the long-term rental model.
 2. The company is experienced in managing contracting procedures of state-owned land for long-term rental  projects. We manage the entire project timeline, from early advertisement ,up to overseeing and supervising throughout the long term rental periods, focusing on protecting the renters’ rights.
3. The company owns projects under the “Rent and Fast” initiative - In order to increase the rate of apartments available for long-term rental.
4. The company provides assistance in promoting and executing  residential projects for government offices, as the need arises both during routine or in times of emergency.
5. The company is engaged in developing an institutional market for rentals (Law for promoting capital investment, REITs and more) and is advancing parliamentary legislation in an effort to institutionalize, advance and improve market conditions for both developers and residents. 
6. The company is engaged in a variety of additional activities advancing housing solutions: accelerated statutory planning of residential neighborhoods in local councils, advancing projects on land with multiple owners, promoting projects for student dormitories, developing advanced housing models and more.
Today, Apartment for Rent is a major player in Israel’s real-estate markets.

Name: Hey Roomy Rentals
Description:
Hey Roomy began life as the HMO management arm of a well-established and multi award-winning Lettings agency in West London, back in 2013. The lettings business identified a gap in the private rented sector, specifically for professionals, often new to the area, who did not have friends or family to live with, and so were often forced to rent expensive one-bedroom self-contained properties. What this group needed was a less expensive way to rent in the area, and the opportunity to meet new people, hence the concept of room rentals in shared accommodation.

In 2021 the lettings business was acquired by the one of the largest property services groups in the UK, and as such, Hey Roomy was born, as a standalone shared residence specialist.

Currently the portfolio of properties and clients we work with span across the Southeast. We are able to service properties as small as two-bedroom apartments, right up to eight bedroom detached houses. Our offering provides a rent guarantee to the homeowner for a lengthy initial tenancy term of up to 60 months, positively impacting void periods and significantly reducing dilapidations, as properties are returned as found. We are also able to take on properties that have experienced significant wear and tear, and return them to their former glory using our own contractors, creating strong cost savings for the homeowner.

In a fast paced and transactional world, Hey Roomy seeks to bring back the human touch, building long term relationships with both the homeowners we service and residents we support.

Hassle-Free Property Management:

Secure and Reliable Tenants:

Comprehensive Support:
Our team of experts provides exceptional support throughout the leasing process. From property listing and tenant screening to lease agreements and ongoing management, we ensure a seamless experience.

Name: Hardtwaldsiedlung Karlsruhe eG
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen!

Wohnen hat bei uns Tradition – und entwickelt sich stetig weiter. Seit 1919 sorgt die Hardtwaldsiedlung Karlsruhe eG als Baugenossenschaft dafür, dass Mitglieder in Karlsruhe gut und verlässlich wohnen können. Unsere Wurzeln sind gewachsen, unser Blick bleibt nach vorne gerichtet.

Wir bieten bezahlbaren Wohnraum in attraktiven Stadtlagen von Karlsruhe. Viele unserer Häuser liegen zentral, sind grün eingebettet und stehen für ein nachbarschaftliches Miteinander. Genau dieses Zusammenspiel aus Wohnqualität und Gemeinschaft macht unsere Genossenschaft aus.

Der Bestand wird kontinuierlich modernisiert – mit Blick auf Energieeffizienz, Barrierefreiheit und digitale Services. So bleibt das Wohnen langfristig attraktiv und zukunftsfähig. 

Unsere eigene Spareinrichtung ermöglicht sichere und faire Sparanlagen für Mitglieder und deren Angehörige. Die Einlagen fließen direkt in unsere Modernisierungs- und Zukunftsprojekte und stärken damit unseren Bestand und die Lebensqualität vor Ort.

Wir stehen für Verlässlichkeit, Nähe und ein genossenschaftlich getragenes Zuhause in Karlsruhe. Gemeinsam schaffen wir Wohnraum, der Bestand hat und gleichzeitig Raum für Entwicklung lässt.

Zukunft gestalten. Tradition bewahren.

Name: NESST Singapore Limited
Description:
NESST Singapore Limited (NESST) is a company limited by guarantee, set up by the Ministry of Manpower (MOM) to operate the two MOM-owned Purpose-Built Dormitories (PBDs) for migrant workers. The set up of the CLG is part of MOM’s commitment to fortify migrant worker housing for greater resilience and liveability.

NESST’s vision is to Nurture and Engage a community of Support to Shape and Transform migrant work housing and management for the future. NESST’s direct management of the new PBDs in partnership with the private sector, aims to bring on board expertise and insights from both within and outside the dormitory industry. 

Through proactive engagement with public and private stakeholders, NESST drives best practices, pioneer scalable solutions, and advocate for a progressive, future-ready housing ecosystem. By shaping standards and championing transformation, NESST strives to create a more sustainable, inclusive, and resilient model for migrant worker accommodations in Singapore and beyond.

For career opportunities, please send your resume to hr@nesst.sg. We will reach out if a suitable opportunity arises.

 Basenów: wewnętrznego, zewnętrznego (latem z ratownikiem) i brodzika dla dzieci

 Lokalizacja:
 500 m od cichej, szerokiej plaży

¿Cómo puedes empezar?

Usted proporciona la ubicación de la propiedad.

Después de proporcionar la ubicación de la propiedad y las imágenes, ejecutaremos un informe comparando lo que está ganando ahora con lo que podría ganar a través de nosotros.



Proporcionamos una cotización de honorarios de gestión.

Después de determinar si deseamos seguir adelante con la administración de su propiedad, le ofreceremos una cotización con nuestra comisión.



Tu entregas las llaves

Una vez que ambas partes acuerdan las tarifas, tomamos el control total y usted no tiene más responsabilidad con la administración de la propiedad.

Name: The Octagon

Inside its 49 storeys and 370 thoughtfully designed one-, two- and three-bedroom apartments, residents benefit from spacious layouts, large opening windows that frame city panoramas, and an atmosphere of refined modern living. 

The building’s amenity suite is crafted for effortless everyday living: a stylish resident lounge, private dining area, purpose-built co-working spaces and a fully equipped gym. Every day at The Octagon is anchored in convenience, comfort and a sense of exclusivity.

Nestled within the transformational Paradise development, you’re in the heart of Birmingham’s most dynamic neighbourhood, where dining, arts, entertainment and heritage all converge. The Octagon isn’t just a place to live; it’s a gateway to the city, offering more sides to city living than ever before.

Why not pay us a visit and experience elevated living for yourself?

Description:

This unique approach and our commitment to hiring the very best professionals have resulted in strong business growth and our long-lasting tenure in the area, making us one of the most respected and trusted local property management companies. 
Because our business model focuses solely on the management of our rental properties, we’re able to concentrate our efforts to maintain a constant presence in local markets, creating value in all phases of the owner's management cycle. Name: Broadview at Purchase College
Description:
Broadview at Purchase College is the only university-based retirement community located in the Tri-State area. Our innovative approach challenges the traditional narrative around aging in America that suggests retirement is a time to wind down, step back from the workforce, and pause education. Instead, here at Broadview, we’re focused on continuing education through intergenerational learning, being part of a robust, vibrant community embedded on a college campus, and fostering lifelong friendships.

We are currently expanding our team in preparation of the community opening in Fall 2023. Interested applicants should embrace and exemplify our guiding principles:
•	We serve the customer, first and foremost. 
•	We deal honestly and fairly, with integrity and openness. 
•	We maintain a long-term perspective. 
•	We are diligent and persevering. 
•	We are interconnected and interdependent.

If you are interested in joining the employee team at Broadview, please know that open positions will be posted on this page, as well as on our Indeed.com page as soon as they become available. These postings will be made timely when a position opens and will be removed promptly when they are filled. You may wish to “follow” Broadview at Purchase to be notified of new career opportunities as soon as they become available.

Multiple types of employment opportunities will be posted this year to hire exceptional talent including:
Physical Plant: such as general maintenance, grounds, security and IT technology;
Environmental Services: including janitors, laundry, housekeeping; 
Food & Beverage: including chefs, sous chefs, servers, cooks, utility workers;
Resident Services: such as fitness, wellness, activities, social services, concierge and drivers.

You should apply directly online for any available position matching your skills and interests. For general employment inquiries, you can also contact Charly Casali at CharlyC@broadviewseniorliving.org.

Built by landlords, for landlords, we combine real experience with modern systems, clear communication, and genuine care for the homes we manage.

 Proactive, not reactive. We fix issues before they become problems.
 Transparent. No hidden contractor fees, ever.
 Personal. Because relationships still matter in property.

Name: Rouse
Description:
Rouse - Management. Development. Community.  

WELCOME HOME!  Rouse is proud of its locally owned and managed rental apartment homes in the Greater Madison and Milwaukee area for over 35 years.

Rouse has a portfolio of award-winning apartment homes that range from college student housing to affordable, luxury, and senior living in the greater Madison area and Milwaukee.  In addition, there are also some commercial properties.

At Rouse, we are passionate about delivering the best customer service in the industry. We achieve this by hiring friendly and professional staff, maintaining beautiful and inviting properties, and always being attentive and proactive to our residents’ needs and expectations.

Rouse was founded by Fred Rouse in 1965. Initially, he purchased a few houses in downtown Madison. As time went on he acquired larger apartment communities and started to form partnerships allowing him to develop new sites. His current portfolio includes over 1600 apartments in the greater Madison area and Milwaukee.

Even though Rouse Management Company has grown substantially over the years, Fred has never lost sight of the values and ideals that helped him to achieve success. He remains dedicated to hiring the best people who share his beliefs in taking a proactive approach, providing excellent service, and maintaining apartment communities to the highest standards. Several apartment communities have won awards for property of the year, manager of the year, and maintenance person of the year which reinforces the dedication shown by all levels of his organization.

Rouse continues to grow and most recently has expanded into commercial real estate. Our company looks forward to future developments while at the same time remaining committed to our core values of providing the best apartment communities and service.

We encourage you to experience Rouse.

Name: HAB Bolig
Description:
HAB er Haderslevs største almene boligorganisation, med over 2.300 boliger i Haderslev Kommune - og en enkelt ny afdeling i Vejen.

HAB blev stiftet som Haderslev Andels Boligforening i 1938, og har lige siden skabt rammerne om gode hjem.

I dag er vi en moderne og smidig boligorganisation. Vi kan tilbyde et bredt spænd af boligtilbud, alt lige fra ungdomsboliger og  familieboliger i alle størrelser til seniorbofælleskab og plejehjem. Vores ambition er at kunne tilbyde et godt hjem til alle – livet igennem.

At bo til leje er ikke ensbetydende med, at man ikke kan sætte sit eget præg på sit hjem. Vi tror på, at man skal have indflydelse og mulighed for at vise sin personlighed i sin bolig – også når den er en almen bolig, man bor til leje i.

Vi gør meget ud af at have et veludviklet beboerdemokrati, som vi altid er i dialog med, når der skal renoveres, bygges om eller bygges nyt.

Nos résidences sont conçues pour créer un équilibre entre l'intimité de la maison individuelle et les opportunités d'interaction sociale au sein de la communauté. 

En choisissant AVILIA, vous optez pour plus qu'une simple location de logement pour séniors. Vous choisissez une expérience de vie enrichissante, axée sur le respect mutuel, la solidarité et la célébration de chaque étape de la vie. Le chalet offre une salle à manger avec 8 places assises, un comptoir avec 6 places assises et une aire commune à aire ouverte où la cuisine ne manque rien de ce qui se passe dans le salon tout en gardant un œil sur la chaleur du foyer.

Le chalet offre aussi une très grande terrasse avec une salle à manger extérieure, un BBQ Napoléon pour chef avisé, un spa de 6 places et un espace pour finir vos soirées au bord d’un feu de camp .

Le chalet offre un décor moderne à l’écart du voisinage. Le chalet est connecté par Internet Starlink pour les télétravailleurs et les adeptes de télé en diffusion continue.

Les moments en famille ou entre amis seront des plus mémorables, tout comme la beauté de la nature qui entoure le chalet .

Name: LouezAvecNous
Description:
In the dynamic and often challenging Montreal rental market, LouezAvecNous stands as your dedicated partner, simplifying the process of apartment leasing for both tenants seeking a new home and property owners looking to maximize their investments. Our name, meaning "Rent With Us," embodies our commitment to a collaborative, transparent, and efficient rental experience across this vibrant city.

For Tenants: Navigating Montreal's Competitive Market:

Finding the ideal apartment in Montreal, particularly in mid-2025, requires more than just searching online – it demands expertise and local insight. The market continues to be characterized by high demand and persistent supply shortages, leading to significant rent increases in recent years. While some recent data suggests a slight moderation in overall average rent increases, neighborhood-specific variations remain substantial, and competition for desirable units is still strong.

For Property Owners: Maximizing Your Investment:

For landlords in Montreal, efficient and reliable apartment leasing is crucial for consistent returns. LouezAvecNous provides a full spectrum of services designed to alleviate the burdens of property management while ensuring high occupancy rates and qualified tenants.

Our Commitment

At LouezAvecNous, our commitment is to provide fair, transparent, and highly efficient apartment leasing services. We leverage our deep understanding of the Montreal rental market, coupled with a client-centric approach, to ensure that whether you're searching for a new home or looking to lease your property, the process is as seamless and stress-free as possible. We are dedicated to building long-term relationships based on trust and successful outcomes for everyone who chooses to "Rent With Us" in Montreal.

Name: Valleyre, un projet modèle
Description:
Le projet de Valleyre est un projet d’immobilier durable modèle parce qu’il inverse les priorités. D’habitude, on privilégie le bâti et on y ajoute un peu de nature.
 
Pour construire de manière responsable et durable à Valleyre, on a fait l’inverse. D’abord, un écologue a déterminé quels éléments environnementaux devaient primer sur toute autre considération architecturale. Ensuite, mais ensuite seulement, les architectes ont créé le projet sur la base des contraintes fixées par l’écologue.

En clair, sachant que Valleyre était un terrain prévu à la construction, tout le travail a été mené pour privilégier le naturel sur le bâti. Pour réunir surtout, réconcilier presque, la vie conjointe des futurs habitants et celle prioritaire de la nature.
 
Afin de construire de manière responsable, plusieurs facteurs sont pris en compte. Une construction en bois et béton est privilégiée. Les places de parc ont toutes été aménagées afin de limiter l’impact visuel et de donner de la place à la nature en surface.
 
La pose de panneaux photovoltaïques permettra de favoriser l’indépendance énergétique. Les immeubles pourront s’autogérer grâce à une énergie 100% renouvelable et une autoconsommation électrique.
 
Il faut construire
 
Le 3 mars 2013, le peuple suisse accepte la LAT et donne à toutes ses autorités fédérales, communales et cantonales un mandat clair et obligatoire nous devons : densifier les agglomérations, concentrer les constructions en bordure des zones déjà bâties, réduire les zones de villas individuelles et encourager une politique de logement cohérente.

Le projet répond à toutes les contraintes légales et à une situation de grave pénurie de logements. Il y a pénurie lorsqu’il y a moins de 1,5 % de logements vacants disponibles dans le district. Avec 0,56% de logements vacants dans le district, c’est le cas.
 
Pour en savoir plus allez sur www.valleyre.ch

Nossa visão de futuro inclui expandir parcerias e colaborar com comunidades locais, valorizando não só as propriedades, mas também contribuindo para o desenvolvimento sustentável das regiões onde atuamos.

Name: Rent Qube
Description:
RentQube is a rental management platform that helps property owners and landlords manage their rental properties. The platform provides a variety of tools and features that make it easy for landlords to list and advertise their properties, screen tenants, collect rent, and handle maintenance and repair requests.

Some of the features of RentQube include:

Online listing and advertising: RentQube allows landlords to list their properties on popular rental websites, such as also allows them to create their own listings on the RentQube website.

Tenant screening: RentQube provides landlords with tools to screen potential tenants, such as credit and background checks.

Rent collection: RentQube allows landlords to collect rent online, through direct deposit or credit card payments.

Maintenance and repair management: RentQube provides landlords with tools to handle maintenance and repair requests from tenants, such as a built-in work order system.

Reporting and analytics: RentQube provides landlords with detailed reports and analytics on their rental properties, such as occupancy rates and revenue.

RentQube is a great option for landlords looking for an easy way to manage their rental properties, it offers a comprehensive solution for landlords who want to take more control over their rental property.

We are completely transparent too.  Our automated online process ensures that we can look after your tenants and the property they are living in effectively and responsibly. Our platform gives you 24/7 access to what is happening with your portfolio, at a time to suit you.
Our lettings platform is not only for Landlords, it also gives tenants a simple and effective way to contact us, organise inspections and perform maintenance with minimum disruption.
You want your tenants to have a comfortable home and our role is to ensure that renting from you is a very pleasant experience. Our platform is designed to work with tenants and fit around their busy lives. 24/7 access, flexible viewing arrangements, digital signatures, easy document uploads and a dedicated maintenance portal are all part of the service.

Every property manager knows the drill. Tenant move-ins, move-outs, routine checks. Hours of manual inspections. Subjective reports. Endless disputes. What if we told you there's a better way?

Meet Xelidoni – where your smartphone becomes a property inspection expert.

 One video. Five minutes. Complete transparency.
Our proprietary AI see what you see and catches what you miss. Cracks forming behind furniture. Early mold signs. Appliance wear patterns. All documented with forensic precision.

 Beyond detection, we predict the future.
Why wait for complaints? Our contextual AI flags maintenance needs before they become expensive problems. Think of it as having a crystal ball for your properties.
The numbers speak for themselves  200+ inspections completed
 85% AI accuracy (vs. manual guesswork)
 3x faster than traditional methods
 CHF 500-1200 saved per anomaly caught early

Backed by the best Venture Kick (shareholder), EPFL innovation ecosystem, and InnoSuisse Core Coaching. We're not just another PropTech startup – we're rebuilding the industry standard.

Our SaaS + API model integrates seamlessly into existing PMS and InsurTech platforms. No disruption, just evolution.

 Born in Switzerland. Scaling across Europe. Going global.
For property managers Faster, fairer, fully auditable reports
For tenants Transparent, objective documentation
For the planet Predictive maintenance = reduced waste and CO₂ emissions.

Ready to see the future of property inspections?
Because your properties deserve better than guesswork.

I dag forvalter og leier vi ut til nær 1500 beboere fordelt på 750 boliger. I tillegg disponerer vi over 20 000 kvm kontor- og næringslokaler, samt besitter tomter for utvikling.

Vi fokuserer på å utvikle fremtidens boliger og har en sterk tro på sosiale boformer som co-living, der beboere har sin egen private bolig samtidig som de deler på fellesarealer og tjenester. Dette gjør det enklere for folk å leve mer aktive liv, samtidig som vi får utnyttet ressursene våre bedre – til glede for flere.

Som trønderhovedstadens største private boligutleier mener vi at boligutvikling må handle om mer enn å gi folk tak over hodet – vi skal bygge boligområder hvor folk ikke bare skal bo, men leve gode og meningsfulle liv. Det er bra både for folk og byen.

Description:

Zeker Vastgoedbeheer beheert woningen, appartementen en kantoren voor kleine en grote vastgoedbeleggers (vanaf vijf objecten). Wij bieden verschillende pakketten aan tegen een vast laag bedrag per maand. Hierin wordt onderscheid gemaakt tussen technisch-, financieel- en commercieel
beheer. 

Zeker vastgoedbeheer is opgericht met een belangrijk doel: de kwaliteit en dienstverlening binnen het vastgoedbeheer in de randstad verbeteren. In vastgoedbeheer gaat het vaak over grote beslissingen waar veel geld mee gemoeid is. Door communicatie en transparantie op een te zetten hopen wij verandering te brengen in vastgoedbeheer in Nederland. Dit doen wij altijd tegen een scherpe prijs en tegen een goed rendement van uw belegging.

Name: EV Solutions Group Ltd
Description:
EV Solutions Group was created to overcome the multitude of obstacles associated with providing Electric Vehicle charging capabilities to leasehold developments.

As every good property manager knows, everything starts with the lease.  At EV solutions group, we know leasehold and our solution is NOT just restricted to supplying and installing EV chargers.

Feasibility

Our feasibility assessments start with the lease and extend through to how an EV charging system could be implemented at your site.

We cover all of the following aspects:

-	Lease reviews and recommendations
-	Building Infrastructure review
-	Site power review
-	DNO level power review
-	Responding to leaseholder questions and queries
-	Leaseholder billing systems
-	Ongoing management of the system

System Design, implementation and Leaseholder management

Once we have established how an EV system could be implemented (and there are many ways to go about this), we can manage the project from initial design through to full implementation.

From a property managers perspective, we take the stress out of the whole process. We field all leaseholder queries and hand-hold you through the section 20 process (for which we would do the specification document and respond to all comments).

Name: Golden Luxe
Description:
Golden Luxe è una realtà consolidata nel segmento luxury, punto di riferimento per la gestione di proprietà di pregio in affitto a breve termine. Custodiamo un portafoglio selezionato di 60+ ville e appartamenti tra Versilia, Forte dei Marmi, Firenze, Porto Cervo e altre località esclusive in Italia, con servizi 360°: compravendita, charter di yacht, noleggio supercar e concierge
Operiamo con un approccio sartoriale, curando ogni aspetto dell’esperienza abitativa e di viaggio per una clientela internazionale che ricerca eccellenza, privacy e personalizzazione assoluta.

La nostra competenza abbraccia l’intero ciclo di vita dell’investimento immobiliare: dalla selezione delle migliori opportunità sul mercato alla gestione operativa e strategica delle proprietà, fino alla rivendita. Grazie a un’accurata ottimizzazione dei processi e a un network consolidato di partner di fiducia, garantiamo massima redditività e incremento del valore nel tempo.

Per il settore degli affitti brevi di lusso, offriamo una gestione “chiavi in mano” che comprende marketing avanzato, gestione delle prenotazioni, servizi di concierge, manutenzione e cura dell’immobile. Ogni ospite vive un’esperienza unica, arricchita da servizi esclusivi come chef privati, tour personalizzati, esperienze enogastronomiche e transfer privati.

Il nostro dipartimento Yacht Charter completa l’offerta, proponendo imbarcazioni di prestigio per crociere indimenticabili nel Mediterraneo e oltre. Dai superyacht ai day charter, creiamo itinerari su misura che coniugano comfort, stile e scenari da sogno.

La filosofia di Golden Luxe si fonda su tre pilastri: lusso, trasparenza e risultati concreti. La nostra missione è trasformare ogni proprietà o viaggio in un’esperienza memorabile, con la certezza per i nostri clienti di avere un partner affidabile, discreto e orientato all’eccellenza.

Operiamo in Versilia, Forte dei Marmi, Firenze, Porto Cervo, Venezia, Milano e collaborazioni internazionali.
 www.goldenluxe.it

Name: Touro Company
Description:
Overview
At Touro Company, we specialize in acquiring and operating value-add multifamily assets with a focus on improving communities while maximizing investors’ returns.
As a DFW-based company, Touro has direct access and daily interaction with the DFW Multifamily market. We have deep knowledge of every submarket in the area and acquire selected projects only when our extensive investment criteria list is met. Through its detailed due-diligence process, Touro has developed a track record of overdelivering to its investors on every single one of its projects.

Our Vision
Touro Property Management provides a boutique experience to Touro Company’s tenants, lenders, and investors alike. We do this by providing amazing customer service and follow through, being on top of operations and accounting, and caring deeply for our onsite staff, who are the face of each property and are responsible for its success.

Our Mission
We strive to be the best managers for our assets and always maintain a low ratio of staff to number of units, providing the boutique experience to all that we interact with while delivering superior customer service and financial performance.

Our Approach
Recruiting experienced, high achievers in property management, accounting, and maintenance, we have built the best team possible to take Touro’s assets to a superior level of performance. Our goal is not to proﬁt from property management, but to help Touro assets achieve their full potential and beyond. With that goal in mind, Touro’s staff genuinely prioritize customer service, tenant well-being, and maintenance upkeep, as well as ﬁnancial performance. Our company culture allows the onsite staff to learn, grow, and participate in the success of the assets.

Name: Saint-Germain By Cecile
Description:
L’Art de l’Hospitalité Parisienne de Luxe | Saint-Germain-des-Prés
Chez Saint Germain by Cécile, je redéfinis l’hospitalité haut de gamme à Paris en transformant des appartements d’exception en véritables expériences sur-mesure au cœur de Saint-Germain-des-Prés.

Une Vision Forgée par l’Expérience:
Avant de créer ces adresses parisiennes, j’ai exploré les plus beaux établissements du monde en tant que voyageuse exigeante. Cette perspective unique de cliente m’a permis de comprendre ce qui distingue le remarquable de l’exceptionnel. Chaque détail de mes appartements – des quartzites nobles aux équipements soigneusement sélectionnés – reflète cette expertise du luxe authentique.

L’Empathie comme Philosophie:
Le véritable luxe réside dans l’attention portée à l’autre. Mon approche empathique me permet d’anticiper vos besoins et de créer une hospitalité calibrée sur votre rythme personnel. Vous n’êtes jamais un simple client, mais un hôte privilégié dont le confort et l’authenticité sont au centre de chaque attention.

La Maîtrise des Nuances:
L’excellence s’exprime dans les équilibres subtils : présence et discrétion, luxe et authenticité, service et complicité. Ma psychologie ajustée et mon sens de l’observation me permettent de percevoir ces micro-signaux qui font toute la différence dans votre expérience.

L’Expertise Locale Reconnue:
Parisienne de Saint-Germain-des-Prés, je partage les secrets authentiques du quartier : galeries confidentielles, artisans d’exception, tables privilégiées. Reconnue par Forbes US pour mon expertise locale et les meilleurs hébergements pendant Roland-Garros, je transforme votre séjour en véritable immersion parisienne.

Saint Germain by Cécile : où l’excellence des matériaux rencontre la justesse de l’accueil, et où l’hospitalité devient un art subtil pratiqué avec empathie et discernement.

#HospitalitéDeLuxe #SaintGermainDesPrés #ParisLuxury #LocationPrestige #luxurytravel #hospitality #parisianlife

Name: Prosperity Alliance

For a long time, homeownership felt out of reach.
Not because people didn’t work hard.
But because the system didn’t work for them.

We saw it firsthand.
Families doing everything right—
And still being locked out.

That’s what drove us to build Prosperity Alliance.

We’re a minority-led development company based in Charlotte, NC.
We don’t build for profit margins.
We build for people.

People who want a place to raise their kids.
Start new chapters.
Leave something behind that lasts.

Because owning a home isn’t just about shelter.
It’s about stability.
It’s about pride.
It’s about generational wealth.

And that’s what we’re here to build.

We develop attainable housing across the Carolinas.
In cities like:
Charlotte
Winston-Salem
Henderson
Greensboro
Durham

We’ve led 10+ projects and counting.
Each one is designed with care.
Each one is shaped by the communities we serve.

We work hand-in-hand with:
- City leaders
- Nonprofits
- Faith-based groups
- Investors who care about impact

Because when we build better housing,
We build stronger communities.

And when families get the keys to their first home.
Everything changes.

Let’s make that happen—together.

Name: FöretagsBostadsBolagen - FBB
Description:
Företagsbostadsbolagen (FBB) består av åtta företag som tillhandahåller tillfälliga bostäder till företag och offentliga verksamheter som behöver bostäder till personal.
För den som kommer till Sverige för att arbeta är det ofta svårt att på egen hand ordna ett boende, helt enkelt för att hyresvärdar ofta kräver en hög grad av etablering i samhället för att acceptera en person som hyresgäst.

Vi vill att det ska vara lätt för företag och offentliga verksamheter att erbjuda anställda bostäder i form av tidsbegränsade andrahandshyreskontrakt. Tyvärr är så inte fallet idag. Rättsläget är osäkert och allt för begränsande. Det vill vi att regering och riksdag ändrar på genom att införa nya regler i hyreslagstiftningen.

Att kunna attrahera nyckelmedarbetare till specifika orter och uppdrag är helt centralt för svenska företags konkurrenskraft. Allt för ofta misslyckas detta på grund av svårigheter att ordna en bostad till den som ska rekryteras. Sverige har jämfört med andra länder, såsom till exempel Finland, en mycket reglerad hyresbostadsmarknad. Det leder till bostadsbrist och köer som i sin tur skapar rekryteringsproblem för många företag. Som en funktion av bostadsbristen har andrahandshyra av företagslägenheter vuxit fram – och blivit räddningen för många bolag, organisationer och universitet.

Vi är FBB:

AB Beautiful Apartments
Apart Direct AB
Be Resident AB
Bostad Direkt AB
Företagsbostäder Sverige AB
Logitjänst Forenom AB
Newstay AB

Name: Canada Senior Lifestyle
Description:
We are a full-service senior living community developer. We create value by transforming raw unserviced land into all-inclusive resort-style independent senior living communities. 

We capture maximum value with total value chain ownership. Farm to table supply chain ensures quality control and variable cost stability.

The majority of skilled labor on earth is leaving the workforce for retirement. The baby boomer generation is the world's largest demographic segment. When people retire and their income is limited to investment income from the money they’ve saved throughout their careers their consumption of products and services is significantly less. In the United States, the world's wealthiest economy more than 70% of the money available to consumers is held by those ages 65+. 

The value chain for developing new senior living communities begins with customer segmentation. Identifying which properties will cater to each segment of the continued care spectrum influences design and construction choices. Independent living community development in Canada is ideal for avoiding regulatory requirements associated with assisted living and memory care facilities. 


Designing retirement communities for maximum value creation means master plan integration. Governments at all levels use master planning to guide the development of nations, provinces, cities, communities, etc. We leverage demographic data combined with the municipal master plans relevant to our business operations region. Using public datasets and machine learning technology  we identify all the upstream inputs coming into our region and partner with other businesses that have non-competing synergies (e.g. maybe we partner with all the hotels in our area to organize group buying of common products like linens, cleaning supplies, etc. for the economies of scale pricing advantage.)      

“A master plan is a dynamic long-term planning document that provides a conceptual layout to guide future growth and development. Master planning is about making the connection between buildings, social settings, and their surrounding environments. A master plan includes analysis, recommendations, and proposals for a site’s population, economy, housing, transportation, community facilities, and land use. It is based on public input, surveys, planning initiatives, existing development, physical characteristics, and social and economic conditions.”

Interhouse is een landelijk netwerk van makelaarskantoren met sterke lokale wortels. Sinds 1998 begeleiden we mensen bij het verhuren, verkopen, aankopen en beheren van woningen. Dat doen we met oog voor jouw situatie, je wensen en je drijfveren.

Onze vestigingen bedienen een exclusief werkgebied en combineren lokale marktkennis met landelijke slagkracht. Daardoor kunnen we vraag en aanbod effectief samenbrengen en woningen optimaal presenteren. Of het nu gaat om tijdelijk verhuren via de Leegstandwet, de verkoop van een gezinswoning, de aankoop van een appartement en de verhuur van uw commerciële vastgoed: Interhouse biedt maatwerk en denkt met je mee.

Met ruim 25 jaar ervaring, integriteit en resultaatgerichtheid mag je rekenen op een betrouwbare partner die je volledig ontzorgt. WHAT MOVES YOU?

Name: Interhouse verhuurmakelaars (Haarlem) - Omdat een woning verhuren een kunst op zich is
Description:
Haarlem en omgeving is gewild om een woning te verhuren of te huren. Interhouse verhuurmakelaars Haarlem is gespecialiseerd in woningverhuur in de regio Haarlem en beschikt over een uitgebreid netwerk en uitstekende lokale marktkennis om u optimaal van dienst te kunnen zijn. Door het internationale karakter is het de regio Haarlem bij uitstek geschikt voor de (tijdelijke) verhuur van woningen aan expats, die bekend staan als betrouwbare huurders. Het kantoor is gevestigd op een markante hoek aan de Wilhelminastraat. De bekende toegangsweg en nabij het stadscentrum. Als u deze vestiging wilt bezoeken, dan bent u gedurende openingstijden van harte welkom.

Het werkgebied van Interhouse verhuurmakelaars Haarlem bestaat naast de stad Haarlem uit diverse plaatsen er omheen, zoals o.a. Heemstede, Aerdenhout, Bloemendaal, Bennebroek, Santpoort-Noord, Vijfhuizen en Zandvoort. Een courant gebied voor woningverhuurders en woningzoekenden vanwege de centrale ligging midden in de randstad en pal naast de hoofdstad Amsterdam. Dit gebied ligt aan de kust en heeft volop werkgelegenheid. De medewerkers van deze vestiging kennen dit gebied en lokale huurwoningmarkt tot in detail. Hierdoor kunnen zij u optimaal van dienst zijn. Wilt u uw huis verhuren in Haarlem e.o.? Deze verhuurmakelaar is dé lokale specialist voor woningverhuur in Haarlem.

Name: Al Rashid Residence Hotel
Description:
Al Rashid Residence Towers is a prestigious luxurious deluxe residential project under Al Rashid Trading and Contracting Company located west of Al Khobar city on Khadem Al Haramein Road, Dhahran Road, just 25km away from Dammam. The project has a strategic location, in the heart of Khobar, and few blocks away from the prestigious residential area of the city, and close to the shopping malls, hospitals, schools, ARAMCO, KFU University …. 
The project is of 5 residential towers as a gated compound, each tower enclosing different types of units, one-bedroom apartment type, two-bedroom apartment type, and three-bedroom apartment type. The well designed and furnished apartments are split into types according to area and room numbers. The distinction of the exterior design applies as well to the interior through the carefully selected finishing materials like the porcelain flooring, gypsum ceilings, Italian made wooden doors and the high-quality modern kitchens that are equipped with the best well-known brand appliances. 
Each tower of the five towers is a 13-floor high rise tower, with a unique contemporary design that combines the integrity of modern architecture with the authenticity and details of the local architectural heritage. The towers are interconnected with a well finished and air-conditioned bridge at the first-floor level which extends to link the whole project with Al Rashid Mall. 
This bridge secures an easy, comfortable and indoor access for all the residents and provides a very convenient shopping pleasure and makes all the facilities of the mall within the reach of every resident. 
The air-conditioning system is through a chilled water network provided by nearby district cooling plants which insure the best air-conditioning performance with the least energy consumption, in addition to reliable heat insulation to all buildings, complying with international standards of energy-saving and green building. The project comprises a high-capacity R.O plant.

Name: La Marguerite des Champs
Description:
Habitat Partagé pour Seniors en milieu rural, nous sommes situés en Pays de Mormal, région de l'Avesnois, département du Nord.

La Marguerite des Champs est constituée de 11 logements privatifs dont 1 réservé à de l'accueil temporaire (< 2-3 mois) et de 150 m2 d'espaces communs intérieurs. Notre habitat rural, fait aussi la part belle à sa vie extérieure : plus de 2.000 m2 de jardin est à la disposition des habitants.

Notre habitat partagé est aussi accompagné. Nous avons signé une convention avec le Département du Nord, ce qui permet d'accompagner les habitants avec un soutien à la coordination des tâches de la vie quotidienne (repas collectifs, petits travaux, mise en place d'animation selon les souhaits des habitants...).

Le bâtiment de notre habitat partagé, un corps de ferme, a été rénové sur 18 mois, rénovation terminée en 2023. Des investissements écoresponsables ont été réalisés : très bonne isolation, récupération des eaux de pluie, chaudière à bois déchiquetté avec ressource locale... Nous avons été récompensés de ces efforts par un PEB / GES de niveau B.

Cette page est dédiée à vous partager des nouvelles de La Marguerite des Champs : la vie "à bord", nos engagements, nos rencontres...

Description:
Benvenuti nel meraviglioso mondo di SOGI Gestioni, dove trasformiamo la tua esperienza di proprietario immobiliare in qualcosa di straordinario. Se sogni una gestione del tuo patrimonio che sia non solo efficace e remunerativa, ma anche estremamente soddisfacente nel tempo, sei nel posto giusto.

Noi siamo qui per te, per guidarti verso il successo nella gestione dei tuoi immobili residenziali a breve termine. La nostra missione è semplice ma ambiziosa: gestire i tuoi immobili come se fossero nostri, garantendo un'attenzione impeccabile sia all'immobile stesso che agli ospiti che vi soggiornano.

La storia di SOGI Gestioni ha inizio nel 2010, a Vittorio Veneto (TV), grazie all'incredibile intuito della nostra socia fondatrice, Sonia Canal. Con il suo patrimonio immobiliare come campo di prova, ha sperimentato personalmente i benefici e l'efficacia degli affitti a breve termine, sviluppando un metodo innovativo per valorizzare al massimo le proprietà.

Grazie alla nostra esperienza in costante crescita, oggi gestiamo direttamente centinaia di unità abitative in tutto il Paese, soddisfacendo le esigenze reali dei nostri clienti giorno dopo giorno. Sia che tu sia un ospite in cerca di una sistemazione confortevole, o un proprietario che vuole ottenere il massimo dai suoi investimenti immobiliari, noi siamo qui per te.

Crediamo nella forza delle nostre squadre, formate da persone solari e audaci che si dedicano anima e corpo ai nostri clienti. La nostra costante formazione e aggiornamento ci permettono di offrire un servizio sempre all'avanguardia, superando le aspettative e ottenendo risultati concreti.

Ma la nostra ambizione non si ferma qui. Nel 2019 abbiamo dato il via al nostro progetto di franchising, formando imprenditori italiani pronti a eccellere nel settore turistico. Condividiamo con loro le nostre linee guida etiche di successo, aiutandoli a raggiungere i propri obiettivi e garantendo ai proprietari immobiliari il miglior servizio nel tempo, con una gestione continua e di qualità.

SOGI Gestioni è più di una semplice azienda. È una famiglia che abbraccia la passione per l'ospitalità e il desiderio di rendere ogni esperienza unica ed indimenticabile. Siamo qui per rendere il tuo viaggio nella gestione immobiliare un vero successo, con un tocco di emozione che ti porterà oltre le tue più alte aspettative.

Vieni a scoprire il nostro mondo. SOGI Gestioni ti aspetta a braccia aperte.

Our team is our best company asset. In an industry with an average 1-3 year staff turnover, we are proud to say that the majority of our team members have been with us for 15 years or more. Our senior property manager has worked with us for 20 years! 

Our Broker is a charter member of the National Association of Residential Property Management (NARPM), an organization that exists to elevate the property management industry through professional development, advocacy, and community. Wilson Management Group participates actively with this organization, and focuses on legislative efforts with NARPM, personally meeting with legislators and representatives annually in Washington, DC and in Tallahassee, FL advocating for property owners' rights.

Our favorite stories from our long-standing community presence relate to former residents, some of whom become vendors for us, that ultimately become homeowners, then landlords, and then ask us to manage their investment assets for them. Not only does that journey speak to the American Dream success story, but it demonstrates our commitment to fostering long-standing relationships that lead to mutual success.
