Een mooi appartement met meer dan voldoende ruimte voor u en uw partner. Een prachtig uitzicht op de Bergse Plassen. Zes dagen per week een driegangen diner naar keuze, met verse ingrediënten bereid door onze eigen "sterrenchef" . Op zaterdag een uitgebreide lunch. Gasten zijn van harte welkom.
Regelmatig een koffieconcert op de zondagmorgen, bridge-avonden, groepen bewoners die het uitstekend met elkaar kunnen vinden. En bij dat alles het uitgangspunt, dat u volledig zelfstandig bent in uw eigen appartement en dat u verder uw leven inricht, zoals u dat gewend bent, maar wel met een heleboel kopzorg minder! Dat alles én meer, biedt Hillegonda Serviceflat. 
Op dit moment hebben wij nog enkele 2-kamer appartementen ter beschikking voor de verhuur. Voor de 3-kamer hoekappartementen bestaat een wachtlijst voor echtparen.
Als uw interesse gewekt is, kunt u een afspraak om ter plaatse de mogelijkheden te ervaren en te bespreken.

Description:

The area houses numerous Fortune 500 companies and includes copious amounts of office and industrial space, along with a plethora of retail for the convenience and enjoyment of residents.

The newly passed Project Connect program, on track to add a diverse selection of transportation options throughout the Austin MSA, has a light rail dedicated within a ten-minute walk.  Both the Red and Purple lines connect to the airport and downtown.

Additionally, Presidium Waterford is one of the few multifamily sites available along the US-183-corridor, allowing for direct access to either Highway Loop 1 or Interstate 35. This provides tremendous ease of access to all major commercial hubs in and around the City – and is unmatched by any of the surrounding luxury housing options.

Name: Luxulting - Luxury Consulting
Description:
THE PARTNER TO BRANDS IN THE BRANDED REAL ESTATE MARKET

Founded in 2017, LUXULTING was created with a mission: taking luxury & lifestyle brands into the real estate market. Working exclusively as the brand partner, LUXULTING identifies, structures and nurtures the best business strategy to infuse brand DNA into real estate projects. The end results are extraordinary homes created for the most discerning brand lovers.

We are long term partners to the brands with whom we work, which include ARMANI/CASA, KARL LAGERFELD, MISSONI, ASTON MARTIN, PININFARINA among others.

OUR SERVICES:
1. PROCUREMENT OF THE BEST COMBINATION OF PROJECT AND DEVELOPER
It’s not enough to find the perfect project for a brand, we believe a successful collaboration requires the right mindset from the developer and all the teams involved. We are focused on long term partnerships, not quick wins.
2. ADVISORY ON PROPOSAL STRUCTURING AND NEGOTIATION
As strategic partners, we advise on the best business model for each brand, for each project. 
This includes structuring of all key elements – commercial, financial, legal – and advisory throughout the negotiation process.
3. SUPPORT THROUGHOUT THE EXECUTION OF THE PROJECT
Luxulting is the reliable partner that ensures that every stage of the partnership runs smoothly, all the way to key handover.We are like maestros, making sure all the different players are in sync throughout the entire process – architects, interior designers, project managers, development teams, marketing and communication, sales reps, finance teams.
4. TAILOR-MADE TRAINING PROGRAMS - TO ENSURE THE FULL IMMERSION OF BRAND DNA IN THE TEAMS WORKING ON THE PROJECT
We design training programs in collaboration with the brand to ensure all those involved can immerse themselves in the brand values.

https://luxulting.com/

Name: AYA Holding Group

 Services complets, tout sous un même toit 
Nous offrons une gamme complète de services : de l'avocat au financement et à l'aménagement intérieur  notre offre est entièrement adaptable pour répondre à vos besoins. CAP ESPAÑA vous garantit un achat clés en main.

Name: Foncière du Logement Abordable
Description:
La Société publique locale du Logement Abordable a été créée par la Ville de Paris et la Ville de Saint-Ouen pour développer une nouvelle offre locative à loyers maîtrisés à destination des classes moyennes.

Dans un contexte de forte pression immobilière, elle agit pour permettre aux actifs, jeunes ménages, familles monoparentales ou travailleurs-clés de continuer à vivre et à travailler au cœur de la métropole.

Son objectif : proposer des logements à loyers significativement inférieurs aux prix du marché, dans des quartiers bien desservis, en mobilisant des leviers publics et en s’appuyant sur des partenariats solides avec les bailleurs sociaux.

Société publique à gouvernance locale, elle combine ambition sociale, efficacité économique et agilité opérationnelle. Elle contribue pleinement à la stratégie de la Ville de Paris en matière de logement public, dans une logique de mixité sociale et de réponse aux besoins des classes moyennes, souvent exclues des dispositifs existants.

Elle travaille en lien étroit avec les services de ses collectivités fondatrices, les opérateurs publics et privés, les acteurs du logement et les institutions financières.

Son assemblée générale est composée de 5 membres : élus de la Ville de Paris et de la Ville de Saint Ouen. Elle est présidée par Barbara Gomes et dirigée par Charles-Antoine Depardon.

Name: Fairfield Homes, Inc.
Description: Founded in 1947 by the late Frank L. and Mary M. Gorsuch, Fairfield Homes, Inc. is recognized as a major developer of single family homes and subdivisions, commercial construction, historic restorations, and multifamily housing. In 1957, Fairfield Homes expanded its’ operations to include Property Management for the purpose of managing single family rental properties constructed by Fairfield Homes. Since that time, the organization has expanded to provide management services to four segments of the housing industry: Affordable Multi-Family Housing, Senior Housing, Permanent Supportive Housing and Conventional Multi-Family Housing. This diversity allows Fairfield Homes to apply its experience and expertise in the management of a variety of Affordable Housing programs at both the state and federal levels. When Frank L. Gorsuch passed in 1959, his wife, Mary Gorsuch, continued the family business until 1969, when the company grew into the second generation with their son, Leonard Gorsuch, as CEO.

Цената за настаняване включва всички режийни разходи за ток вода, интернет и телевизия.

Клиентите могат свободно да ползват не само жилището, в което са настанени, но и всички публични пространства в сградата като фитнес зала, клубна стая, покрив за социални събирания и барбекю, coworking пространство с wi-fi и др.

Нашата цел е не просто да предоставим луксозен и комфортен втори дом за всеки наш гост, а да развиваме една сплотена и социално активна общност.

Name: Serenity Parks Ltd
Description:
Serenity Parks was born out of an absolute belief in the huge potential of park home living and its tremendous benefits, not only for park residents, but also for park owners, developers, and local authorities. 

There has been a seismic change in perceptions of park home living, especially among the over 50s who are placing more importance on leisure and the freedom that park home living can offer. The recent changes to housing policy also mean that residential park homes are now accepted as a dedicated form of housing, which gives us greater confidence in planning policy for more plots.

The potential saving to the public purse from park home developments is massive, not to mention the solution they can offer to aid the national housing supply crisis.

Our current park locations are areas of high demand for homes and there is simply not enough accommodation to go around.  Many areas of the country have the same situation and frustratingly, we believe that not enough is being done to pass off sites for development.

We see this challenge as a unique opportunity to change out-dated misconceptions about the park home lifestyle.

We choose the most exclusive locations for our bespoke residential park homes across the country, each focussed on delivering attractive, comfortable homes in peaceful and relaxing environments. Offering a more affordable alternative to a traditional bungalow, the homes on each of our Serenity Parks sites are high-end, contemporary one-floor properties furnished to the highest standards and filled with all the luxuries and creature comforts you’re accustomed to.

We are ready and able to invest in redevelopment opportunities nationwide, where we can transform tired sites to offer prestige park home communities in desirable areas. 

We are actively looking for diversification partnerships.  For landowners, we offer a wide range of diversification options, one of which could be creating a business that supports retirement to rural communities.

Name: RentPERKS Technologies Inc.
Description:
RentPERKS: Elevating Property Value Through Sustainable Tenant Engagement

RentPERKS is transforming property management with a unique, rewards-based Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) that combines tenant engagement, operational efficiency, and sustainability. By rewarding tenant loyalty and eco-friendly behaviors, RentPERKS not only boosts occupancy rates and tenant satisfaction but also fosters stronger communities, aligning well with key Build-to-Rent (BTR) trends for 2025.

Why RentPERKS?

Community-Centric Design & Flexibility: Our rewards model cultivates tenant loyalty and community bonds, while flexible leasing options attract diverse tenant demographics.

Smart Technology & Automation: RentPERKS uses automated systems for energy management, lighting, and waste reduction, making properties more efficient and sustainable.

Geofencing for Reduced Commuting Emissions: AI-enhanced geofencing helps tenants find properties near essential amenities and transit, reducing long-distance commutes and transportation emissions.

AI-Driven Infrastructure Management: Predictive AI optimizes maintenance, extending building life, reducing resource use, and lowering costs, ultimately advancing our zero-carbon goals.

Incentive-Based Sustainable Living: Tenants are rewarded for sustainable choices—like recycling or green transportation. This gamified approach makes eco-conscious living attractive and easy.

Creating a Zero-Carbon Real Estate Future

RentPERKS’ innovative approach to property management supports the transition to a zero-carbon world. Through smart technology, AI, automation, and tenant incentives, our properties reduce emissions and promote greener urban lifestyles.

Join the RentPERKS Movement

RentPERKS offers property owners and tenants a way to actively contribute to sustainability while enhancing property value. Become part of the shift toward environmentally responsible real estate—one property at a time.

Description:

As a next-generation real estate business, we specialize in creating luxurious urban sanctuaries that blend the comfort of “home” with the thrill of city life and exploration all around. Our offering includes fully furnished, move-ready homes and apartments in co-living setups, perfect for college students and young working professionals looking for a stress-free living experience in their new city.

Our philosophy is that the place where we reside, no matter how long, is an extension of our personalities. That’s why each of our properties is designed to complement modern lifestyles and personal space with a sense of community in carefully chosen safe neighborhoods.

With no binding long-term lease agreements and secure, straightforward digital processes for bookings, conversations with hosts, and handling monthly rentals, Live Eat Love prioritizes convenience with integrity and honesty. Description:

Vores boliger er placeret i Danmarks største og mest attraktive vækstbyer og forstæder. Vi tilbyder blandt andet boliger i København, Aarhus, Odense og flere andre byer, og vores portefølje udvides konstant med nye lejemål.

Vi udlejer moderne boliger, der passer til enhver livssituation og økonomi. Vi tror på, at når hverdagen føles nem, så trives mennesker. Vi tror på godt naboskab og sociale fællesskaber omkring hjemmet som en vigtig kilde til livskvalitet og en meningsfuld hverdag.

Når du lejer en bolig gennem Go’Bolig, kan du trygt læne dig tilbage og vide, at du er i gode hænder. Vi stræber nemlig efter at skabe den bedst mulige lejeroplevelse, hvor din komfort og tilfredshed er i centrum.

Vi værdsætter åben kommunikation og gennemsigtighed, så du kan være sikker på, at der ikke er skjulte overraskelser. Vores dedikerede team af udlejningskonsulenter er her for at vejlede dig gennem hele lejeprocessen og sikre, at du finder den perfekte bolig, der matcher dine behov og ønsker. 

Hos Go’Bolig er der plads til at være!

Name: Foncière Patrimoine & Rendement
Description:
La Foncière Patrimoine et Rendement est une structure organisée sous forme de holding, qui détient plusieurs activités immobilières à travers une SASU (Société par Actions Simplifiée Unipersonnelle). Sa stratégie repose sur une gestion patrimoniale diversifiée, orientée à la fois vers la création de valeur et l’optimisation fiscale.

Organisation & Pôles d’Activité

La société se divise en deux grands pôles principaux :

1. Centre de profit
Ce pôle vise la génération de profits via différents types d’investissements immobiliers :
- Investissement locatif patrimonial de rendement (IDR dans le 41) à travers des SCI à l’IS (par exemple : SCI Local AGCT, SCI Père & Fille ARGA).
- Marchand de biens sous la Loi Malraux (Région Centre), structuré via une SSCV 

2. Centre de coût
Ce pôle regroupe des actifs résidentiels qui présentent une vocation plus personnelle ou à long terme :
- Investissements à moyen et long termes, notamment via l’acquisition de biens en viager (libres et occupés), portés par la SCI France Viager AGGPR.

Modes de gestion

- La structure opère un arbitrage permanent entre sociétés à l’IS (favorisant la capitalisation et la fiscalité sur les sociétés) et à l’IR (privilégiant la fiscalité sur le revenu).
- Les filiales sont organisées selon la nature des opérations et la finalité fiscale recherchée, optimisant ainsi la gestion des flux financiers et des charges.

Objectifs

La Foncière Patrimoine et Rendement vise l’acquisition, la valorisation et la gestion efficace d’actifs immobiliers, tout en assurant un équilibre entre rentabilité, transmission patrimoniale et optimisation fiscale. التزمت شركتنا بالتفاصيل المعمارية الفريدة مع نخبة من أفضل المهندسين والمخططين الموهوبين في مختلف المجالات للمساهمة في النمو الاقتصادي للدولة. لقد استهدفنا الوعي القانوني والعقاري وبناء ثقة استثنائية مع العملاء.

تتمتع مصر اليوم بوضع اقتصادي مستقر يدعم بقوة الاستثمارات العقارية. نجحت شركة رخا في بناء سمعتها من خلال التصاميم المبتكرة والذكية والصديقة للبيئة، فضلاً عن البناء عالي الجودة والتسليم في الوقت المحدد. كما ساهمنا في التوعية المجتمعية من خلال دورات مجانية لخلق جو مناسب في معرفة الحقوق العقارية لكل فرد يرغب في الاستثمار.

تحتفظ جميع مشاريعنا، المنتشرة في جميع أنحاء البلاد، بطابعها المعماري الفريد وجمالها البصري وجودتها الدائمة. والنتيجة هي جذب استثمارات من خارج الدولة للمساهمة في التنمية المستدامة والثقة.

Name: ZLIP
Description:
Zlip es un ecosistema inmobiliario que nació con una misión clara: transformar propiedades en negocios vivos, rentables y sostenibles. No somos una inmobiliaria tradicional ni una simple administradora: somos un puente entre propietarios, inversionistas y desarrolladores que buscan maximizar el valor de su patrimonio a través de nuevas formas de habitar, rentar e invertir.

Nuestro trabajo se divide en tres grandes vertientes:
Inmobiliaria (Zlip Inmobiliaria): Nos enfocamos en la venta y renta de propiedades con visión estratégica, conectando a compradores e inversionistas con inmuebles que generan plusvalía y alto potencial de rentabilidad.

Hospedaje (Zlip Housing): Administramos y operamos propiedades en formatos de Airbnb, coliving, glamping, hoteles boutique y modelos híbridos. Creamos experiencias que van más allá de la simple estancia, combinando hospitalidad con estrategias de marketing digital y operación profesional.

Desarrollo de Proyectos (Zlip Host): Reconversión de casas, edificios y terrenos subutilizados en modelos innovadores como coliving temático, núcleos médicos o espacios de hospitalidad sustentable. Diseñamos proyectos integrales que van desde la conceptualización hasta la operación.
Aunado a estas tres áreas, en Zlip también formamos y compartimos conocimiento a través de cursos, workshops, conferencias y mentorías, capacitando a propietarios e inversionistas para que aprendan a gestionar y escalar sus propios proyectos.
Creemos que cada propiedad tiene un potencial oculto. Lo que para muchos es una casa vacía o un edificio detenido, para nosotros es el inicio de un proyecto que puede generar ingresos, empleo, experiencias únicas y valor a largo plazo.
En Zlip combinamos experiencia, creatividad y estrategia para reimaginar el futuro del sector inmobiliario. Nuestro propósito es claro: maximizar la rentabilidad de cada propiedad y al mismo tiempo crear proyectos con impacto real.

Name: Taj Group
Description:
Taj group is an international investment hospitality platform. 
We start our process by showing the list of apartments suitable for both investment and hospitality in Istanbul. 
Together with owned apartments presented to us by clients. In this case, our team immediately tests it for whether it meets our operating standards or not. If not, we take care of it until we make it suitable to be operated and listed by us. In this step, we make the necessary flips until we meet all the standards needed to add the house to our system. 
Now we move to the magic, operations! We list the apartments on our personal platform, as well as the global hospitality platforms which are: Airbnb, Agoda, Booking, and Mariott. We receive our guests' bookings and run them through our systems, making sure they are safe, suitable, and are coming to the most convenient place for their case. We send out our maintenance team to make sure everything is perfect; along with the cleaning team to professionally clean the unit before each check in.
And finally, our field operators take care of the check in process where they welcome the guests, give them the keys and take them on a little tour in their place. 
We gratefully end up with happy guests, and happier investors!

Name: Short Term Rentals Help
Description:
We may have started the gig economy.

At Office Angels, we solve two economic and social problems by delivering cost-effective business services to small companies AND by offering flexible opportunities to business professionals. 

Our clients want to focus on their core priorities. So, they call us for marketing support, accounting, bookkeeping, graphic design, HR, social media, and other back-office operations. 

Our “Angels” are experienced professionals who want meaningful work on a part-time or project basis. They may have left the full-time workforce to care for family members, or they have retired or been laid off. 

We work on-site or remotely. What makes Office Angels unique, is that each client and Angel are personally matched. 

Typical clients are start-ups who can’t justify full-time employees. Coaches, consultants, and speakers enjoy our services. Service companies hire us for accounts receivable management. And professionals such as dentists, psychologists, and Realtors contract with us for ongoing or occasional services.

Office Angels was founded by Essie Escobedo after a 25-year career as a small business owner in Atlanta. Her husband’s creative hair design business had grown into 4 salons and a prestigious cosmetology school and Essie handled all the business operations. 

As vendors, friends, and graduates of their school came to Essie for business advice, she recognized a huge skills gap—and opportunity—and Office Angels was born! 

Now we have xxx contract employees who serve xxx clients per year, almost exclusively by referrals.

In March 2023, Marika Ponton partnered with Essie to focus on business development and growth opportunities for the entire Angel network, current and future! As a business owner and CPA, Marika is uniquely qualified to expand our reach as she understands both sides of the business that Essie has built. (She once worked for us as an Angel, and later hired us to help with a franchise that she owned!)

Keine Zusatzpakete. Keine Überraschungen. Kein Packstress.

Hinter VennVan steckt Leidenschaft für echtes Reisen, persönliche Betreuung und der Anspruch, Vanlife neu zu denken – komfortabler, digitaler und individueller. Wir kombinieren hochwertige Fahrzeuge mit smarter Ausstattung und persönlichem Service – damit du dich unterwegs wie zuhause fühlst.

Unser Versprechen:
 Mehr Komfort – durchdachte Ausstattung & klare Strukturen
 Mehr Freiheit – unabhängig reisen, überall verbunden
 Mehr Persönlichkeit – ehrliche Beratung & Betreuung von Anfang an

VennVan ist kein anonymer Vermieter, sondern ein Herzensprojekt mit Anspruch und Qualität. Unser Ziel: Vanlife so zugänglich, entspannt und inspirierend zu machen, dass du nur noch eins willst – losfahren.

Miete Komfort. Erfahre Freiheit.
Das ist VennVan – dein ready to go Campervan.

Name: EasyColiving
Description:
EasyColiving est une société foncière spécialisée dans le Coliving en Ile-de-France à destination des jeunes actifs. 

Sous l'impulsion de Vincent Fourcaut, des amis d'enfance ont décidé de s'associer post-covid pour recréer davantage de lien social grâce à l'habitat. 

Toutes nos maisons sont localisées près de transports publics efficaces et offrent des chambres individuelles meublées avec salle d'eau privative et wc (comme des suites d'hôtel). Les espaces partagés sont conçus autour de la vie en groupe avec séjour, grande cuisine conviviale et un très beau jardin. 

Depuis 2020, nous avons rénové plus de 3,000m² de bâtiments anciens et créé plus de 100 unités de logement avec le concours de nos familles, d'amis, d'investisseurs, de partenaires bancaires et d'artisans, tous soucieux de soutenir cette volonté d'apporter aux jeunes qui démarrent dans la vie professionnelle un logement de grande qualité avec un loyer compétitif..., en échange d'une vie en communauté. 

Cette approche nous permet de rénover une partie du parc immobilier résidentiel d'Ile de France qui est souvent délaissé par les propriétaires à cause de l'importance des travaux à devoir réaliser en matière d'efficacité énergétique et d'adaptation aux nouveaux besoins. Nous espérons pourvoir restaurer de nombreuses et belles bâtisses dans les années à venir avec le concours de chacun d'entre vous qui trouve cette initiative utile pour l'environnement et la jeunesse.

Ron Angel, a former U.S. Army veteran, software engineer, engineering leader, and longtime real estate investor, is the founder of Present Day Properties. This apartment combines comfort, practicality and an ideal location, whether for pleasure or for work. Book now for a unique stay near Disneyland Paris!

Name: Hornera
Description:

¿Quiénes somos?
En Hornera, nos enorgullece ser expertos en brindar soluciones de alojamiento para todas tus necesidades temporales. Ya sea que estés visitando Rosario por negocios, placer o cualquier otro motivo, estamos aquí para hacer que tu estadía sea lo más cómoda posible. Nuestro equipo apasionado se dedica a proporcionar opciones de alojamiento que se adapten a tu estilo de vida y presupuesto.

Nuestros Servicios
Asesorías: Si sos propietario podes contar con nosotros para asesorarte sobre alquiler temporal, por ejemplo, contamos con consultas personalizadas y también una suscripción mensual llamada Emprende en compañía.
Apartamentos Amueblados: Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de apartamentos completamente amueblados y equipados con todas las comodidades que necesitas para una estancia cómoda y en una ubicación estratégica.
Atención Personalizada: Nuestro equipo está disponible para ayudarte en cada paso de tu viaje, desde la reserva hasta el check-out. Estamos comprometidos con tu satisfacción total.

Únete a Nuestra Comunidad
En Hornera, valoramos las conexiones y creemos en construir relaciones sólidas. Únete a nuestra red para mantenerte informado sobre ofertas especiales, consejos de viaje y eventos locales. Estamos aquí para servirte y hacer que tu tiempo en Rosario sea inolvidable.

Contáctanos
Si estás planeando tu próximo viaje a Rosario o necesitas información sobre alquiler temporal, no dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros. Estamos disponibles para responder a todas tus preguntas y proporcionarte la mejor solución de alojamiento.

Descubre por qué Hornera es la elección principal para alquileres temporales en Rosario. Esperamos darte la bienvenida pronto!

Alain Immo est une agence immobilière congolaise fondée par M. TSHILOLO MBUYI Alain, ingénieur réseaux. Depuis sa création en 2014, notre agence met à votre disposition une double compétence unique qui combine expertise technique et connaissance approfondie du marché immobilier.

Nous offrons un service complet incluant la vente, la location, la gestion et l’expertise de votre bien immobilier. Notre priorité est de mobiliser toutes nos ressources afin de vendre ou louer rapidement, efficacement, et dans les meilleures conditions possibles.

Nous prenons également en charge la gestion des biens pour les clients éprouvant des difficultés à faire gérer leurs propriétés sans trop de tracas. Notre service de gestion simplifie la vie de nos clients en assurant un suivi rigoureux et une administration efficace de leurs biens.

Conscients de l’importance de la qualité, nous sélectionnons rigoureusement nos clients vendeurs et locataires. Nous ne traitons que des dossiers qualifiés et vérifiés, ce qui nous permet d’assurer une réactivité optimale et d’accompagner soigneusement chaque acquéreur potentiel jusqu’à la conclusion de la transaction, pour chacun des biens confiés.

Grâce à cette approche rigoureuse, Alain Immo s’est rapidement imposée comme spécialiste des biens atypiques. Notre capacité à résoudre efficacement les problèmes spécifiques à chaque bien nous permet de trouver les acquéreurs adéquats, même pour les propriétés d’exception telles que les villas de luxe.

Notre politique est claire : grâce à notre double expertise d’ingénieur et d’agent immobilier, nous garantissons la vente ou la location de votre bien au meilleur prix, auprès d’acquéreurs fiables et solvables, et dans des délais très courts, quelles que soient les caractéristiques de votre bien immobilier.

Par ailleurs, nous proposons également un service de conseil et d’accompagnement personnalisé pour les projets immobiliers. Nous accompagnons nos clients tout au long du processus d'acquisition.

Name: Bath Rental Partners Ltd
Description:
Prefer A Long-term Tenant Who Invests £1000s In Your Property For Free?
Worried About AST Contracts And The Increasing Renters Rights?
Wanting To Help House Key Essential Workers In The Bath & Support Local Charities?

Here at BathRentalPartners We partner with landlords and letting Agents exclusively in Bath Somerset, paying a guaranteed rent with 0% management fees, to provide high-end accommodation to our working professional clients.

Our clients include working professional firms such as Royal United Hospital and many other firms as well as emergency housing for providers such as Livewest Homes.

Each Approved Property benefits from:
1. Professional interior design and furnishings costing over £5000.
2. Housing key essential workers for long term lets.
3. Weekly cleans and interior condition reports.
4. Long-term rental payment with zero void periods.
5. Complete cosmetic maintenance coverage over our contract. 

As a partner of the Bath Rental Group:
1. You keep your client and get paid as normal. The other difference is you’ll get paid for a long-term arrangement without any of the stress or costs that comes with managing tenants and building itself.
2. We are not in breach of any short term lease restrictions as our working professional clients stay for 90 days or more at a time, being categorized as a mid or long term let.
3. As a letting agent, you will have all your time back to focus on growing your client base and scaling your business.
4. You will be supporting local Bath charities, such as the St Johns Foundation and the Bath Rugby Foundation through being our partner.
5. You will help provide accommodation to key essential workers, such as those in Royal United Hospital and various other local companies.

If this is off interest message pop us and we'll see if we can help.

Name: Villa Handrès | Holiday Rental in Provence
Description: Villa Handrès is a little gem located in Nans-les-Pins, in the heart of Provence Verte, at the foot of the magnificent Sainte Baume massif. This rental villa in Provence, fully renovated, fully equipped, and air-conditioned, welcomes you on a one-hectare shaded property, with a heated pool, in absolute tranquility. Villa Handrès can accommodate up to eight people. It features four very comfortable, air-conditioned bedrooms. Subtly decorated, they include two single beds (90 cm wide) or a double bed (180 cm wide). Additionally, the rooms are equipped with window screens. The villa has the advantage of two bathrooms. It is advantageously nestled in the heart of a shaded hectare of land. To the south, there is a vast field with olive trees, cherry trees, roses, vines, and blue cypresses. Large trees provide delightful shade in the summer. To the north, a large oak forest is perfect for morning strolls to the sound of birds in spring. You can also enjoy the large terrace, equipped with a plancha grill and a large table for eight, ideal for family or friends' meals. There is also an outdoor living area perfect for evening aperitifs. A large heated pool (5 x 10m) allows for refreshing swims and relaxing laps. Afterward, you can sunbathe on one of the eight loungers on the solarium. Villa Handrès is ideally located for numerous activities. We have listed some ideas for you: visits and tourist sites, horse riding, hiking, canoeing/kayaking, eco-tourism, vineyards, and cycling. Within one to two hours by car, you can go everywhere! From the Luberon in the west to the Côte d’Azur in the east, including all of the Aix and Var hinterlands.

Name: NEMA San Francisco
Description:
San Francisco’s original lifestyle pioneer, NEMA is an award-winning luxury residence in the heart of SOMA. An extensive resort-style collection of serviced amenities includes indoor/outdoor terraces and lounges, a year-round outdoor pool, a leading-edge fitness center, and a business center with private boardroom. Powered by technology, NEMA places the best of San Francisco living at residents' fingertips with its bespoke event programming, fitness classes, and a custom mobile app for amenity and service reservations. 

Featuring oversized windows, modern interiors, and spacious floor plans, the residences at NEMA are designed to create an elevated daily experience, a new kind of home. Intelligently designed kitchens let you make the most of organic local farm deliveries, while spacious bathrooms with soaking tubs provide the ultimate retreat to relax at the end of a busy day. Smart home technology makes each apartment secure, device-friendly, and effortlessly comfortable.

NEMA San Francisco was designed by Glenn Rescalvo, a partner at Handel Architects. The building’s façade, composed of multi-faceted glass and dark metal, reflects the light of the city sky and recalls the silvery tones of the Pacific coastline. Its striking silhouette symbolizes NEMA’s unique take on NorCal living. The buildings comprising NEMA include the South Tower with 24 floors, South Midrise with 11 floors, North Tower with 37 floors and North Midrise with 14 floors. At the street level, floor-to-ceiling glass storefronts combine to create 13,500 square feet of retail and restaurant space. NEMA is a responsible member of the local community and holds the LEED Silver Certification from the U.S. Green Building Council.

Name: Lace Village
Description:
Lace Village is an incredible community revitalization success story created over several years through the vision of Lace Building Affiliates LP.  Restoring the campus of the Scranton Lace Company and preserving its original buildings constructed in 1891 was at the forefront of the plan. Nine of the thirty-two original buildings dating back to 1901 were restored and majestically brought back to life. From 1916 to 2002, the Scranton Lace Company remained the first and largest known producer of Nottingham Lace in the United States. Today, it is listed on the National Historic Registry.

The revitalized, original clock tower serves at the center and heartbeat of Nottingham Square (the center of the Village). Lace Village will feature restaurant/bar, beauty salon & spa, hot yoga studio, provisional market, espresso bar, pickle ball courts, picnic & grilling area, dog park & dog washing stations, access to Lackawanna Heritage River Trail, educational collaborative classroom/workspace, EV charging stations, and bike share program. Residents, visitors and guests will walk along beautifully landscaped walkways, courts, and sidewalks, while appreciating the exterior accent lighting that articulates the bygone features of the 11 acre site.

Name: Tenant Access
Description:
Tenant Access helps property owners and property managers eliminate keys, lockboxes, and rekeying for good—while reducing operating costs across scattered-site portfolios. Centralize access to rentals of all types—single-family, multifamily, industrial, and retail—into one secure system.

What Tenant Access Does

Tenant Access connects properties to top-rated smart lock and access device brands, giving owners, managers, tenants, and vendors secure, keyless access without operational complexity. Teams can switch to keyless in one affordable rollout without disrupting cash flow.

From one platform, teams can:

Manage access across all properties
Eliminate keys and lockboxes
Reduce turnover costs and days of vacancy
Monitor vacant properties with connected devices
Keep access auditable and controlled

No more chasing keys or switching systems.

Keyless Even During Active Leases

You don’t have to wait for renewals. Tenants may voluntarily opt in to smart access benefits during active leases—only where it benefits them. Tenant opt-in helps offset owner and management costs so teams can go keyless immediately.

Eliminate Hard Costs Day One:

Rekeying and key chauffeuring
Lockboxes
Drive time and staff labor

With tenant opt-in, the net cost to owners averages about $0 to $11/month, often less than rekeying alone. Property managers pay a simple monthly platform fee—charged once, not per property or user.

Done-for-You Rollout

Tenant Access provides equipment ordering, installation coordination, portfolio-wide rollout, lease financing, and owner/tenant communication templates—removing upfront costs and friction.

Keys are an operational tax. Tenant Access removes it.

Built by a property manager, for property managers.  

 Book a conversation: https://calendly.com/sales-mytenantaccess/30min

Name: Circle Sage Property Management
Description: The circle has always been an important symbol to Tribal people.  It represents the sun, the moon, the cycles of the seasons, and the cycle of life to death to rebirth.  Everything in the universe is contained within a circle.  Although everything has its own character and occupies a special place, each thing is dependent on everything else.  The interdependence of these things forms a whole and without all the parts, others are affected.  Sage has been recognized by Tribal people as a tool for purification.  In some Tribes, smoke from Sage is believed to ward off negative spirits and cleanse spirits and dwellings.  Circle Sage Property Management embraces our identity as a 100% Tribally-owned enterprise.  We see our role as community helpers who make Tribal and non-Tribal people whole by providing access to quality, affordable homes, and workspaces in healthy circles.

Name: Kolob Canyons Ranch, LLC
Description:
Homes
Kolob Canyons Ranch is a private 106 acre retreat with 3 homes, 2 of which are available as short term rentals - Kolob Lodge and Treehouse - which can be rented together or individually.

Owners
In 2016, Brad and Maggie purchased the first 20 acres as a homesteading site that would eventually become Kolob Canyons Ranch. After building their private residence in 2019, they felt compelled to share the incredible experience of living on the mountain with more than just close friends and family. Amazingly in 2022, the two neighboring lots - Treehouse on 40 acres and Lodge on 46 acres - went on the market! The couple acquired both with the intent to share the ranch with like-minded individuals and families seeking to immerse themselves in the beauty of Southern Utah. The new homes were remodeled and made ready for vacation rentals. The combined properties are known as Kolob Canyons Ranch due to their close proximity to the west entrance to Zion National Park known as Kolob Canyons. 

A Place to Reboot
The vision for the ranch is to provide a private retreat away from other homes, traffic, and noise. Both homes have ample parking, even for oversized vehicles such as motorhomes, and are dog friendly. Each home has private fire pits and wraparound decks for entertaining friends and family, or for couples seeking the ultimate romantic getaway.

Name: Stay Well Solutions Ltd
Description:
Stay Well Solutions Ltd delivers compliant and scalable housing solutions across the UK. We bridge the gap between landlords, Councils, and communities by offering quality accommodation that meets regulatory standards and evolving local needs.

We specialize in subletting and managing residential properties, providing guaranteed rent schemes for landlords while supporting local authorities and other partners with reliable, ready-to-let homes. Our end-to-end service includes property sourcing, refurbishment, tenant placement, compliance, and ongoing management.

Our portfolio serves a range of uses — from temporary accommodation to emergency housing and long-term placements — always aligned with the relevant standards and expectations. Every property is maintained to meet Health & Safety and quality benchmarks, ensuring safe and dignified living spaces.

By helping ease housing pressures and offering landlords secure, hands-off income, we contribute to a more stable and responsive housing ecosystem. Our approach is ethical, transparent, and operationally robust.

Whether you're a landlord, public body, or housing-focused organization, Stay Well Solutions is your trusted partner in delivering housing that works — for people, for communities, and for the future.

Name: Blue Skies Property Management
Description:
Blue Skies Property Management is a family business. Our goal is to help property owners be profitable and make guest's stay as welcoming and easy as possible so they can focus on relaxing during their trip. 

Our properties offer comfortable and charming accommodations in peaceful and picturesque settings. We pride ourselves on making our properties the perfect place for our guests to relax, unwind, and have the dream vacation they have always wanted.

We do not charge any upfront costs for our property management services. We only get paid once owners do! Using tools like MarketMaker, and PriceLab we can determine the best prices for your property by looking at real-time data from comparable properties and what guests pay for similar properties during peak and slower times.

We started our property management services career with our own home in 2006 on the coast of North Carolina. We enjoyed it so much that we began helping family members manage their properties. After much success and growth, we have expanded to take on new properties. You can see from our many 5-star reviews that we are passionate about customer service and ensuring that guests and owners are satisfied.

We proudly offer our property management services to those seeking quality management for their own short-term vacation rentals and long-term residential rentals. We have the experience and provide a service level that can offer our clientele peace of mind.

Name: HomeLife Property Management BC
Description:
We help property owners get great tenants—without the hassle, guesswork or risk.

At HomeLife Property Management BC, we help property owners protect their investment and maximize rental income by handling the most stressful parts of owning a rental: finding great tenants and managing the property end-to-end.

Most owners try to self-manage—only to get burned by bad tenants, incomplete lease agreements, or costly mistakes that end up as unpaid rent or penalties that show up during RTB arbitration. We significantly reduce that risk.

How we do it:

Massive Listing Exposure & High End Marketing: Your property gets professional photography, 360° Virtual Tours & laser-measured Floor Plans that is then pushed across more than SIXTY (60+!) top rental & real estate platforms automatically. 
More eyeballs → more qualified applicants.

Rigorous Tenant Screening: Credit checks, income verification, employment verification, employer & landlord references, and public record checks for both  civil and criminal. We don’t guess.

Hands-Off Property Management: Move-ins, maintenance, inspections, lease enforcement—we handle it all.

And the best part? When managing your property, we only get paid when you get paid. No upfront fees. No surprises. Just aligned incentives.

With 150+ Google reviews and a 4.9-star rating, we’ve become the trusted choice for owners who want predictable rental income and peaceful property ownership.

If you want better tenants, less stress, and a property that practically runs itself—we’re your team. Give us a call today.

Nicki has also achieved the status of QRPM (Qualified Residential Property Manager) from the Residential Property Managers Association (RPMA). Qualified Residential Property Managers of RPMA are individuals who have a minimum of 5 years experience in the industry, obtained a NZ Certificate of Residential Property Management (or equivalent) and completed the RPMA Ethics module.

As an owner-operator, consistent continuity of service and rapport with both owners and tenants achieves the best outcomes before, during, and after a tenancy and for the care of your property.

As an active member of the Taranaki Property Investors’ Association, we keep abreast of legislation changes, regulations and market issues affecting residential property and the property investment industry.

Residential tenancy management is continuously changing, we are an accredited member of the RPMA - Residential Property Managers Association. Part of this membership includes the following obligations:
observe the RPMA Code of Ethics;
commit to Continuing Professional Development (CPD);
complete a Criminal History Check (CHC); and
hold public liability insurance.

Name: Alice Delvar - Coaching immobilier
Description:
"L'argent est un moyen de faire des choses plus rapidement et plus facilement, mais il ne peut pas tout acheter." disait Steve Jobs. Une vision holistique*** des finances nous rappelle que le véritable succès financier ne réside pas seulement dans l'accumulation de richesses, mais dans l'harmonie entre notre situation financière, notre bien-être et nos aspirations les plus profondes.

*** holistique : adjectif qui fait flipper les gens, mais qui en réalité dérive simplement du terme “holisme” = “la tendance dans la nature à constituer des ensembles qui sont supérieurs à la somme de leurs parties, au travers de l'évolution créatrice” selon Jan Christiaan Smuts. C’est donc l’idée que, pour une approche plus pertinente, chaque sujet doit s’apprécier dans l’ensemble auquel il appartient.

Une approche holistique des finances personnelles, c'est comme un smoothie financier, où chaque ingrédient (budget, épargne, investissements, développement personnel) est soigneusement choisi et dosé pour créer une boisson délicieuse qui nourrit non seulement votre portefeuille, mais aussi votre esprit et votre âme

Name: gîte de groupe Val d'Orey / centre de séminaire Val d'Or
Description:
Bienvenue à vous !

 

Au cœur du Bugey dans une ancienne maison du 18ème siècle, nous vous accueillons dans une ambiance conviviale et chaleureuse.



La maison peut accueillir jusqu'à 35 personnes avec une vaste salle à manger de 80 m² ouverte sur une terrasse et un grand espace clos de verdure arboré, idéalement situé au centre du village de Ruffieu, dans le Valromey, espace de nature préservée.


Le gîte de groupe Val d'Orey, magnifique construction en pierre est situé en moyenne montagne à 700m d’altitude, sur la pointe sud du massif du Jura. Le grand Colombier, col mythique du Tour de France, est le belvédère de 3 lacs, Léman, Bourget et lac d'Annecy.


Amateurs de convivialité, voici le lieu idéal pour célébrer en famille ou entre amis. Mariages, Baptêmes, anniversaires, cousinades, ou simplement se retrouver pour un moment festif.

 

Pour les sportifs, vous trouverez chez nous le point de départ idéal de vos randonnées (cyclo, VTT, raquettes, ski, pédestre) car "dans le Valromey le bonheur est sur les chemins".

toutes les Activités, Découvertes, Terroir et Gastronomie sur le site de l'Office de Tourisme de Bugey Sud

 

Activités dans le village de Ruffieu, La tribu d'éponel (ballade à poney) et Le village des étoiles (planétarium, découverte des étoiles).

 

Pour vos réunions d'entreprises, formations ou séminaires, vous avez la possibilité de louer deux magnifiques salles d'activité atypiques.

Vous apprécierez notre salle d'activité avec son plafond très haut, son immense cheminée d’ornement et ses stucs. Bordée de très grandes fenêtres donnant sur notre parc, elle est d’une luminosité exceptionnelle (80m² environ).
En complément, notre yourte posée à proximité de la salle de restaurant, vous offrira une ambiance cosy et feutrée (35m² environ). Un dôme vitré et une grande baie lui offrent une belle luminosité. Vue sur le parc assurée. Chauffage en hiver.



location en gestion libre ou en pension (complète ou 1/2 pension) 


 

Depuis plus de 15 ans des animateurs et des formateurs nous font confiance.

 Le lieu peut accueillir sur place jusqu'à 34 personnes (60 avec les gîtes alentour) avec une vaste salle de séminaire de 80 m2 ouverte sur une terrasse et un grand espace clos de verdure arboré.

Notre cuisinière vous enchantera avec ses plats créatifs et pleins de saveurs.

Name: SubRent.Info
Description:
Chi Siamo:
In un mondo in costante evoluzione, l'innovazione è la chiave per l'eccellenza. SubRent è il ponte tra l'innovazione e il turismo, unendo la passione per l'ospitalità e la visione di condividere il fascino delle destinazioni con il mondo intero. La nostra storia inizia con la convinzione che ogni casa possa diventare una destinazione straordinaria, offrendo agli ospiti esperienze uniche e memorabili.

Il Fattore Turismo:
Il turismo è un settore in crescita, e noi lo rendiamo accessibile a tutti. Attraverso la nostra piattaforma, trasformiamo residenze vacanze, appartamenti e spazi unici in punti di destinazione per i viaggiatori di tutto il mondo. Ci impegniamo a valorizzare il patrimonio di ciascuna località, offrendo a viaggiatori e host la possibilità di esplorare nuovi orizzonti. Dal cuore delle città ai luoghi nascosti, il nostro impegno è quello di accogliere il mondo in ogni casa.

Facility per gli Host:
La facilità è alla base di tutto ciò che facciamo. Per gli host, offriamo una soluzione completa. Gestiamo il subaffitto su piattaforme di sharing economy come Airbnb, liberandoli dal peso della gestione quotidiana. Dalla creazione degli annunci alla gestione delle prenotazioni, ci prendiamo cura di ogni dettaglio. L'arredamento impeccabile e le pulizie senza compromessi mantengono l'integrità della proprietà, creando un ambiente impeccabile per gli ospiti. Grazie alla nostra competenza nelle tariffe di mercato e nella valutazione dei prezzi, massimizziamo i guadagni. La nostra affidabilità si traduce in partnership solide e proficue.

La Nostra Missione:
La missione di SubRent è trasformare la gestione delle proprietà in un'esperienza senza paragoni. La nostra dedizione all'innovazione e all'eccellenza nell'ospitalità è evidente in ogni dettaglio. Siamo il partner ideale per gli host che cercano di massimizzare le opportunità di reddito e per i viaggiatori che desiderano scoprire il mondo con comfort e autenticità.

Name: Rooftop Franquias
Description:
Para quem acredita em impacto real. A Rooftop nasceu com um propósito:  ser a virada de chave para pessoas que buscam uma alternativa para seguir com os seus planos de vida.

O HomeCash, já movimentou mais de R$ 300 milhões em operações formalizadas com empresários e profissionais liberais. 

Agora lançamos o modelo de microfranquia - CashPlanner, uma oportunidade para empreendedores que querem ir além da teoria e fazer a diferença com resultado real. Entregamos um modelo de negócios validado, com payback em até 2 meses*, suporte completo e liberdade para crescer de acordo com a dedicação de cada franqueado. 

Hoje, a Rooftop atua em diversas regiões do Brasil com expansão acelerada, impulsionada por um modelo único, sem ponto físico, oferecendo ao franqueado a chance de gerar renda real com um produto único, inovador, validado e de alto impacto social. 

O seu negócio é do tamanho do seu sonho. 
O céu nunca foi o limite.

Name: Apartamento Serendipia
Description:
Serendipia Resort es un apartamento situado en el complejo Parc de Mar en la zona de Cala Bona que pertenece al municipio de Son Servera en la isla de Mallorca.
Es un agradable y bonito apartamento de 100 m2 situado en segunda linea de la playa. Piscina comunitaria con hamacas disponibles.
Dispone de dos habitaciones dobles, 2 baños con uno de ellos en suite. Cocina equipada con todos los electrodomésticos necesarios.
Salón muy amplio con aire acondicionado y una amplia terraza amueblada con mesa y sillas donde poder disfrutar cómodamente de bonitas vistas y de momentos de relax.
El apartamento esta situado a 5 min caminando de la zona de Cala Millor, donde podrán disfrutar de diferentes locales y actividades de ocio como son restaurantes y tiendas de ropa entre otros. Y a 20 min en coche del centro de la ciudad de Manacor, donde esta ubicado el famoso centro Rafa Nadal Academy.
Es una zona tranquila donde poder disfrutar de la playa y piscina en época de verano. En todo el paseo de la playa se dispone de diferentes locales de souvenirs, restaurantes y cafeterías.

Name: Coolliving.io
Description:
Coolliving.io es la plataforma que transforma la gestión de colivings, alquileres y ventas en un proceso ágil, seguro y totalmente automatizado. Nuestro objetivo es que tanto propietarios individuales como agentes profesionales puedan gestionar sus propiedades con la misma eficiencia que una gran empresa, pero sin complicaciones ni costes ocultos.

Con Coolliving.io ahorras tiempo y eliminas tareas repetitivas:

95% menos tiempo de gestión gracias a la automatización de contratos digitales con IA, firmas electrónicas y verificaciones instantáneas de identidad y documentación.

Gestión escalable y sin errores: controla colivings, alquileres y ventas desde un único dashboard con estadísticas en tiempo real.

15x más capacidad operativa gracias a métricas financieras, analíticas automáticas y coordinación de equipos multi-agente.

Pagos integrados y seguros con seguimiento en tiempo real, domiciliaciones SEPA y próximamente integración con Stripe.

Contratos inteligentes y personalizables que se adaptan a cada operación y reducen al mínimo el riesgo legal.

La plataforma está diseñada para diferentes perfiles:

Propietarios particulares, que quieren simplificar la gestión de sus viviendas en alquiler o venta.

Agentes independientes, que necesitan escalar su cartera sin añadir más trabajo manual.

Equipos profesionales, que requieren herramientas avanzadas de coordinación, control financiero y gestión de múltiples colivings.

Nuestra tecnología permite operar de principio a fin: solicitudes, verificaciones, contratos, pagos, renovaciones y reportes financieros, todo en un solo lugar.

Coolliving.io no es solo un software: es un socio tecnológico que multiplica la rentabilidad y libera tiempo para lo que realmente importa — hacer crecer tu negocio.

 Solicita una demo o empieza gratis en https://coolliving.io/

Při cestování sami milujeme pohodlí a komfort, a to chceme zajistit i vám. Jsme tu pro vás od prvního kontaktu až po celou dobu vaší cesty. Dbáme na osobní přístup a především vaši spokojenost. 

Naše obytňáky – Karla, Luďka a Huga – jsme s láskou vybavili a pečlivě udržujeme tak, aby vaše cestování bylo co nejpříjemnější. Díky nim se budete během celé své cesty cítit jako v bavlnce. A to je náš cíl.

Notre réussite, basée sur la confiance continuellement manifestée par nos partenaires, est le résultat du travail accompli et du respect de nos engagements. Ce sont des valeurs fondamentales qui font la signature de BTL AFRICA CONSTRUCTION : 
           La qualité de nos prestations ;

Vår uthyrningsbara yta är ca 60.000 kvm som förvaltas av egen personal. Dessutom förvaltar vi ca 65.000 kvm åt Uppvidinge kommun, främst lokaler till de kommunala verksamheterna inom skola och omsorg.

Ми працюємо з любов’ю до своєї справи та клієнтів, тому кожен з вас отримає персональний підхід і підтримку на всіх етапах угоди.

Name: Annama Coliving
Description:
ANNAMA CO.LIVING è un concetto innovativo pensato per rispondere alle mutevoli esigenze abitative della città di Brescia. Il coliving è una soluzione di abitazione condivisa nella quale stanze private, che garantiscono la totale privacy dei residenti, e aree comuni, destinate al co-working e al tempo libero, si combinano in maniera organica per sostenere la filosofia della condivisione.
ANNAMA CO.LIVING è un'iniziativa imprenditoriale di Anna Maria Zani, la quale, dopo aver vissuto poliedriche esperienze internazionali, ha concretizzato il suo desiderio di portare a Brescia un modo di vivere innovativo, una forma moderna di abitazione condivisa già ampiamente utilizzata a livello globale e pensata per rispondere alle esigenze dei giovani professionisti.
Anna Maria Zani, sorella del compianto Paolo Zani fondatore di Brixia Finanziaria, ha voluto realizzare tale innovazione proprio nel 2023, anno di Brescia e Bergamo Capitale Italiana della Cultura.
Il primo passo è stata l’individuazione di un immobile da ristrutturare che presentasse le caratteristiche necessarie. Dopo attente ricerche, l’attenzione si è posata sul vecchio hotel “Antica Villa” di via San Rocchino allo studio ABnormA architetture.
Oggi, a distanza di due anni dall'inizio delle operazioni e nell'anno di Brescia e Bergamo Capitale Italiana della Cultura, la visione di Anna Maria Zani è una realtà che, con la suggestiva denominazione ANNAMA CO.LIVING apre sul mondo le porte della nostra città, offrendo una soluzione abitativa ad alto contenuto tecnologico, nella quale le nuove tecnologie si sposano alla perfezione con gli ambienti e le atmosfere frutto di un attento restauro conservativo dell'originale villa.
Il nome scelto, ANNAMA, è esotico e al contempo italiano, come ANNA, e sottende inoltre un gesto di amore, AMA, per tutti i luoghi e le persone della vita di Anna Maria Zani.

Name: Sunlux & Francept
Description:
The real estate market in Portugal is divided into two groups: the broker who places all the properties he finds on national free portals and waits for a client; and the mediator who specializes in a single field and grows every day, researching customers, opportunities and promoting his products internationally.


For us, this has been our philosophy from the beginning.


We are land and village specialists. We could handle the entire real estate market, apartments, storage garages, office construction and long-term leases, but we strongly believe that the real estate market, like any specialty, needs expertise and competence. That's why we specialize in villas and building plots.


Keeping in mind that moving to another country is not the same as moving to another street or neighborhood, as you will find a different culture, a different language and even though most Portuguese are friendly and welcoming, there are certain issues in the Portuguese bureaucracy which sometimes clashes with logic.


In our services, we handle all the legal documentation, from the promissory contract to the deed, this is what any company normally offers. But this is where we make the difference, from SEF to taxes, water, electricity, internet, health, insurance, bank accounts, cars, importing goods, architects, engineers, builders, swimming pools, and any difficulty that may arise, we are here for resolve and if it is very specific we can appoint a lawyer or solicitor specialized in the required area.

Dlouhodobý a spolehlivý pronájem.

Name: Century 21 Agence du Lac Annemasse
Description:
NOTRE COEUR DE MÉTIER

Spécialisée dans les transactions immobilières et référence sur le bassin annemassien, l'agence immobilière Century 21 Agence du Lac Annemasse s’engage à devenir votre partenaire privilégié dans l’accompagnement de vos projets immobiliers.

Notre équipe de conseillers met son expertise et son temps à profit dans la réalisation de tous vos projets : ventes, achats, programmes neufs ou locaux commerciaux, ou encore estimation de vos biens.

Nos collaborateurs vous font bénéficier de leurs connaissances approfondies du marché immobilier en haute-savoie et sur le grand genève, de leurs qualités professionnelles et également humaines. Chaque professionnel bénéficie d'une formation continue et régulière de qualité au sein du réseau Century 21.

 

 POURQUOI NOUS ?

Acheter un bien, qu'il s'agisse de son habitation principale, secondaire ou encore d'un investissement locatif, est un acte qui requiert du temps, de l'attention et de réelles connaissances. C'est un investissement important. C'est aussi une nouvelle vie qui commence. L'agence Century 21 Agence du Lac située à Annemasse (74100) est à vos côtés, avant, pendant et après votre acquisition. C'est pour chaque professionnel de notre agence immobilière une opportunité de vous guider dans le cadre de la réalisation de ce nouveau projet de vie, en vous offrant le meilleur service jamais offert par aucune autre organisation immobilière.

 

 

 NOTRE ZONE D'ACTION

Nous opérons principalement sur Annemasse et son agglomération (Ambilly, Bonne, Cranves Sales, Étrembières, Gaillard, Juvigny, Lucinges, Machilly, Saint-Cergues, Vétraz-Monthoux, Ville-la-Grand,...) ainsi que sur le bassin Genevois. Name: Punkin Manor
Description: Punkin Manor is a lavish one-level custom craftsman estate situated at the heart of the Willamette Valley’s wine country. The immaculate private gated estate spans almost two acres and boasts several water features, a gourmet kitchen, hot tub, gazebo and an indoor basketball court. The estate has five main level bedrooms, one with its own small kitchen and living area, which offers an added privacy for couples or those seeking quiet time. The entire 5,500+ square foot mansion was designed and furnished with style and comfort in mind, making it a perfect location for a luxurious vacation rental. The sitting room is bathed in natural light from an enormous bank of beautiful windows and features a grand piano, while the adjacent study is perfect for professionals. The formal dining room seats ten, and the fully stocked, massively upgraded kitchen is perfect for aspiring chefs. Guests can relax on the plush oversized sectional couch to stream their favorite shows or movies next to the cozy seating area next to the fireplace and custom pool table. For those who want to stay active, the estate has a small workout studio and an indoor basketball court for kids and adults alike that offers hours of entertainment. With so many amenities available, it is understandably a difficult decision to decide to leave the house. However, the home’s location is equally impressive, with downtown Newberg being just a mile away. Groceries, shopping, and entertainment are all less than five minutes away from the estate. In conclusion, Punkin Manor is the perfect vacation rental that marries style, comfort, and location. The estate offers exceptional amenities and luxury to make anyone feel pampered and relaxed. The interior décor and furniture in every room create a cozy and sophisticated atmosphere, making the vacation almost effortless to enjoy!

Name: Smart Locations rental software

With this software, I am able to manage my rentals myself, communicate with my tenants, and have clear monitoring of my rental activity.

Thanks to this web software, and as a manager, I can manage my addresses, my owners, my tenants, and also my rentals and my receipts.

I send the claims, receive the payments in my account, then send back the rent receipts.

With the monthly and annual reports, as well as the statistics page, I can follow my rental activity, and the payments made that I have received over time.

Monitoring the receipt allows you to automatically recover unpaid amounts from the past month.

Clear notification emails are sent to the tenant and the owner, which allows your rental activity to be monitored.

The cost of use is approximately €3 per receipt per month, with no long-term commitment: you pay for what you use.

Sending by email is free. It is also possible to send requests/receipts by post directly from the software, without traveling, for your tenants who do not have an email address.

maintaining the historic industrial windows. In Chicago, similar 1920s
buildings were encircled by a trolley; Sixth Street Exchange is directly on
the route of The Connector, Cincinnati's streetcar, which navigates a 3.6-
mile loop throughout Downtown every 15 minutes. With a stop at the
corner just outside Sixth Street Exchange, residents enjoy free
transportation every day and evening to all areas of Downtown, including
The Banks, OTR, Washington Park, Findlay Market, Great American
Ballpark, Paycor Stadium, and more. The perfect mix of industrial chic and
architectural significance in a prime location, Sixth Street Exchange is your
home in the heart of the city.

Name: RentU
Description:
RentU is a peer-powered rental marketplace designed for the next generation of renters. We connect graduating students, young professionals, alumni, and current tenants to make apartment handoffs in NYC faster, more transparent, and more human.

Instead of relying solely on traditional broker-driven listings, RentU empowers the current tenant — the person who knows the apartment best — to share real insights, open the door for tours, and help the next renter transition into the city with confidence.

For landlords, RentU functions as a zero-cost leasing alternative, delivering fully vetted, high-quality applicants through a FARE Act–compliant model that accelerates lease-up without disrupting exclusive brokerage relationships.

How RentU Creates Value

For Renters:

- Access pre-market and off-market listings
- Speak directly with the outgoing tenant
- Tour with someone who actually lives there
- Verified young professional network
- A more human rental experience

For Outgoing Tenants:

- Earn a free move
- Help someone entering the city for the first time
- Seamless scheduling through in-app messaging

For Landlords & Operators

- Zero-cost leasing alternative
- Fully vetted applicants with employment and guarantor data
- Reduced vacancy risk with faster placement
- Built for compliance, transparency, and trust

The RentU Platform:

- Gated marketplace access through verified university + employer networks
- AI-enabled leasing assistant (in development)
- Application and document submission engine
- Landlord approval console
- Platform-wide rewards & referral system (MoveU Credits)
- In-app tenant-to-tenant messaging
- Pipeline visibility for pre-market units

Name: Momento Living
Description:
Momento is shaping a new era of renting across Europe. Creating well-designed homes, practical amenities and dependable service that make everyday life feel easier, more comfortable and more enjoyable. Our focus is on thoughtful design, usability and the details that help people settle quickly, supported by consistent service across every location.

We first launched in Hayes, London, followed by Vienna, introducing communities built around quality homes, convenience and customer care. We have since expanded in the UK with Momento Barking, now open and offering contemporary apartments, riverside access and excellent transport connections.

Our European growth continues with two locations now leasing: Berlin, set within a vibrant, well-connected district, and Staines-upon-Thames, offering riverside living with strong links to London and Surrey.

Looking ahead, Momento in Stratford will open in 2026, bringing spacious homes, curated amenities and everyday convenience to one of London’s most energetic and fast-growing neighbourhoods.

Across all our current and future developments, we combine good design, reliable service and practical amenities to create communities that feel welcoming and genuinely easy to live in. Whether residents are seeking calm, connection or simply a home that works better for modern life, Momento is built around the moments that matter.

Alle mennesker trenger
et trygt og godt hjem!
Mennesker er forskjellige, men alle har like stor og uendelig verdi.

Mange opplever også utfordringer i løpet av livet hvor man trenger ekstra hjelp knyttet til det å bo.

Siden Morgenstjernen ble etablert i 2002 har selskapet alltid ønsket å bygge boliger hvor mennesker mestrer hverdagen og opplever å bli sett, inkludert og ikke føler utenforskap.

Derfor utvikler vi tilrettelagte boliger og nye boformer, gjerne med et vertsskap som ivaretar de som bor der både praktisk og sosialt.

Vår drøm er at mennesker opplever fysisk, psykisk og sosial velvære når de bor i våre prosjekter.

Vi har siden selskapets begynnelse utviklet prosjekter rettet mot sosial infrastruktur, men i 2019 bestemte oss for kun å fokusere på dette segmentet, se siden «Våre sosial infrastruktur prosjekter i 2022».

Våre løfter
Vi ønsker å skape steder og konsepter som oppleves som trygge og solide hjem for våre beboere, og gi ordet hjem en bredere betydning.

Vi ønsker også å gjøre noe godt for enkeltmennesker og skape en merverdi for samfunnet. Vi håper at vi i dette arbeidet kan være empatiske, etiske, nyskapende og modige.

Name: Ecco Living
Description:
Ecco Living was created by two friends who were international students attending college in Los Angeles. They lived and experienced co-living and student housing firsthand for many years and quickly realized the issues were always the same. 

Renting a place is incredibly difficult for an international renter or someone lacking credit. And, for anyone looking to split costs, finding a good, reliable roommate is another massive hurdle. Not to mention, making sure the place is well-maintained and actually looks like the pictures in the listings was yet another concern. 

From start to finish, most rental companies out there were flawed. The only thing differentiating them was their shortcomings, either in a specific part of the rental process or throughout it. That is why they decided to join forces and put an end to this once and for all.

They redesigned the whole experience to be the way they envisioned renting in a major metropolitan city like Los Angeles should be. They understand that renting is not always affordable in highly sought-after locations within Los Angeles. So, they help make it attainable for most young professionals and students by creating the roommate experience.

Our goal is to create hotel-like setup and cleanliness in addition to homey comfort. We take pride in providing the best customer service and go above and beyond at delivering services which a regular management company would never be able to do so. We also aim to offer the best competitive rates in the market while providing extreme flexibility for our residents. 

The most important aspect of us is the sense of community. Our residents become a part of our family and can build long lasting friendships. It is very important to us, hence we added the word community to our company name. We are one big, loving community. We love to host our residents, keep them happy and satisfied for however long they would like to stay. We are happy to serve.

Name: Prop247
Description:
Welcome to Prop247 – the future of lettings and property management.
 
Ever wished property management involved less paperwork and fewer headaches — and more reliable, effortless results? That’s exactly why we built Prop247.
 
Prop247 isn’t just another letting agency. We’re a tech-driven property management platform, designed for modern landlords and discerning tenants who expect transparency, efficiency and control.
 
Our approach combines intelligent automation for the everyday tasks with experienced property professionals where human judgement really matters. The result? Seamless, round-the-clock management that protects property investments and improves the tenant experience.
 
All of this is delivered for a fully inclusive 7.5% + VAT management fee, with no hidden extras for inventories, check-ins, check-outs or routine services.

The only additional cost is a £250 + VAT marketing fee, applied only when a property is marketed for a new tenant.
 
What we’re built
1.	Intuitive online portal
One clear, secure hub for everything — maintenance, rent tracking, documents and financial reporting. No chasing emails. No lost paperwork.
2.	Proactive maintenance
Smart systems that identify and address issues early, reducing costly emergencies and keeping tenants satisfied.
3.	Dedicated human support
Advanced technology, backed by experienced property professionals who are on hand when real expertise is needed.
4.	Compliance, simplified
From safety regulations to legislative changes, we handle compliance so landlords can operate with confidence and peace of mind.
 
Prop247 launches on 12 January 2026.
 
Follow us to be part of a smarter, simpler way to manage property — and let’s make property work better for everyone.

Name: Ofertatucasa
Description:
En Ofertatucasa hemos creado una nueva forma de vender y alquilar vivienda: basada en el principio más justo y poderoso que existe: la ley de la oferta y la demanda.

Porque creemos que el valor de una casa no debería fijarlo un algoritmo ni un tercero, sino el mercado real. Por eso, en nuestra plataforma son los compradores o inquilinos quienes hacen ofertas —con documentación verificada— y el propietario quien elige con total libertad la propuesta que más le conviene.

Así de simple. Así de innovador.

 Si quieres vender: publicas gratis, recibes ofertas económicas con perfiles contrastados, y eliges la mejor opción sin presiones.
 Si quieres alquilar: marcas tu precio mínimo y ves cómo los inquilinos compiten entre ellos. Tú decides a quién alquilas, cuándo y cómo.

 Mientras tanto, nosotros te cubrimos la espalda:

- Publicamos tu vivienda en los portales más relevantes.
- Verificamos perfiles para que ahorres tiempo.
- Gestionamos toda la documentación.
- Te atendemos por WhatsApp.
- Y en alquiler, te garantizamos el cobro.

Todo 100% online, pero con personas reales detrás.
Tecnología que no sustituye, sino que simplifica.
Un equipo que no interfiere, sino que acompaña.

Nuestra misión es devolver el control al propietario, sin complejidades ni sorpresas.
Tu vivienda, tu decisión.
Y un sistema que por fin refleja su valor real en el mercado.

Name: Ten Thousand
Description:
Now leasing, by appointment only.

Ten Thousand is a 40-story luxury residential tower created by Crescent Heights and designed by Handel Architects to uniquely fit Los Angeles’ modernist architectural history and its contemporary lifestyle. 

Located at the intersection of Beverly Hills and Century City, Ten Thousand is destined to become one of
the city’s iconic architectural landmarks, distinguished by an unprecedented array of luxury amenities and exclusive hospitality-style services, as well as a private art collection.

Handel Architects’ design for Ten Thousand was inspired by the work of 20th-century modernists whose
residential architecture celebrate the quintessential Los Angeles lifestyle – one where indoor and outdoor are seamlessly, elegantly intertwined. 

Lobby and amenity spaces with vast window walls have been created by Shamir Shah Design to reflect warmth, elegance and sophistication. In the residences above, floor-to-ceiling windows, combined with the building’s unobstructed site lines, result in panoramic views spanning from downtown Los Angeles and the Hollywood Hills to the Pacific Ocean. 

Ten Thousand’s spacious one- to four-bedroom residences with flowing floor plans enjoy extraordinary natural light and panoramic views through floor-to-ceiling windows. Many also feature private balconies, and all corner residences have been designed with a unique three-façade exposure. 

Residents of Ten Thousand enjoy a spectacular 75,000-square-foot collection of lifestyle-enhancing amenities and personalized service by a dedicated house staff including valet, butlers, Lifestyle Concierge, and Wellness and Performance trainers.

In addition to its comprehensive amenities package, Ten Thousand is recognized for its elevated standards of service. A dedicated house staff is professionally trained and personally committed to creating an unprecedented living experience for every resident.

Name: huurNL
Description:
Toegelaten instellingen (woningbouwcorporaties) hebben niet altijd voldoende financiële slagkracht om alle sociale huurwoningen die nieuw aan de markt worden toegevoegd op te nemen in hun woningbouw portefeuille. Dit heeft 2 primaire oorzaken. 

Woningbouwcorporaties moeten met aanvangsrendementen en beheerkosten rekenen, die ervoor zorgen dat woningbouwcorporaties niet voldoende marktconforme eigen ontwikkelingen of nieuwbouw aankopen van projectontwikkelaars kunnen realiseren.

Ten tweede moeten corporaties voldoen aan hun verduurzamingsopgave van hun bestaande woningbezit. Hiervoor doen zij financiële reserveringen die deze investeringen in de verduurzaming mogelijk moeten maken, waardoor er te weinig financiële middelen zijn om alle geprogrammeerde nieuwbouw te kunnen aankopen voor sociale verhuur. 

In de Nederlandse nieuwbouw woningmarkt ligt het initiatief van nieuwbouwprojecten veelal bij projectontwikkelaars of gemeenten. Gemeenten schrijven tenders uit waarbij zij middels een anterieure overeenkomst een minimaal aantal sociale woningen vastlegt. Wanneer de ontwikkelaar al het initiatief heeft doordat zij al eigenaar van de grond zijn, zal de desbetreffende gemeente eveneens middels een anterieure overeenkomst een eis stellen t.a.v. de contingenten van sociale huurwoningen. 

Wij willen de totale sociale opgave per gemeente graag gerealiseerd zien worden. Wanneer de corporatie(s) dat zelf kunnen is onze doelstelling ook gerealiseerd. Maar wanneer dit niet het geval is, willen wij als huurNL deze opgave graag op ons nemen, zodat er in iedere gemeente een aanbod is van nieuwe sociale huurwoningen.

Wij gaan nieuwbouw woningen verhuren aan iedereen die een betaalbare woning wil. Deze woningen zijn gasloos, duurzaam, veilig en gezond. Dit doen wij door de verhuur van sociale huurwoningen. Gereguleerde huurwoningen zijn woningen die een maandelijkse huursom hebben van maximaal € 1.000,-.

Graag gaan wij het gesprek aan met ontwikkelaars en gemeenten.

Name: Get to a C
Description:
The “get to a C” initiative is the perfect tool to support landlords and tenants in understanding how they can make their properties warmer and more energy efficient.
With expected guidelines being imposed for all rental properties to be EPC C by 2025 and EPC B by 2030 now is the time to understand what measures can be taken to get there.

Whether through Government funded initiatives or able to pay landlords we have you covered in upgrading your home, bringing down the cost of bills and making your property warmer.

The process
•	Properties are assessed by our expert team of assessors who will generate a detailed report for you to understand where your house currently stands (EPC rating) and what can be achieved
•	Our expert team will then ascertain if any funding is available based on the tenants’ circumstances and process all paperwork to secure funding
•	The “get to a C” will then carry out and project manage all work on the property to get it up to the agreed new rating

- Patrimonio rentable: Asumimos el alquiler de su propiedad a largo plazo, garantizándole una renta fija y puntual cada mes, eliminando la incertidumbre de los impagos.

- Gestión 360º: Nos encargamos de absolutamente toda la gestión del piso: desde la búsqueda y selección de inquilinos estudiantes solventes, el mantenimiento, las reparaciones, la administración de contratos y la resolución de incidencias 24/7.

- Tranquilidad Total: Devolvemos la propiedad en las condiciones pactadas, eliminando el desgaste y la dedicación que implica el alquiler tradicional.

Nuestro Compromiso con los Estudiantes:

- Ofrecemos habitaciones y pisos totalmente equipados, bien ubicados y diseñados para fomentar un entorno de estudio y convivencia.

En ZENTURA, convertimos la complejidad del alquiler en una inversión segura y pasiva para los propietarios, mientras facilitamos el hogar perfecto para la comunidad estudiantil.

Naša misija nije samo povezivanje – mi redefiniramo način na koji poslovni sektor pristupa smještaju, čineći ga lakšim, bržim i jednostavnijim.

U Najmodavcu se ne fokusiramo samo na kvadrate i krevete – mi stvaramo toplinu doma. Razumijemo potrebe radnika i rukovoditelja, pa svaki smještaj prilagođavamo tako da se svi ljudi osjećaju poštovano i cijenjeno – jer oni su uvijek najvažniji dio svakog poslovanja.

Najmodavac - dom na putu.

 Tenant Find
