Name: Chalupy na Křižánkách
Description:
Chalupy na Křižánkách, definice dokonalého zázemí pro firemní akce i rodinnou dovolenou!

Hledáte místo, kde si skutečně odpočinete, a přitom budete mít dostatek prostoru pro společné zážitky? Naše stylové Chalupy na Křižánkách v srdci Vysočiny vám nabídnou ideální kombinaci pohodlí, soukromí a krásné přírody. Ať už plánujete firemní teambuilding, víkend s přáteli, rodinnou oslavu nebo jen klidný útěk z města. U nás najdete vše, co potřebujete.

Co vás čeká v okolí?

Malebná krajina Vysočiny vybízí k pěší turistice, cyklistice i horolezectví. A přímo u chalup si užijete rozlehlou zahradu u lesa s venkovním bazénem, dětským i fotbalovým hřištěm, grilem a ohništěm, které jsou ideální pro letní večery pod širým nebem.

Ubytování - dvě samostatné, nebo propojené chalupy
Nabízíme pronájem dvou prostorných chalup. Buďto každou zvlášť, nebo obě najednou, dle vašich potřeb. Obě chalupy mají samostatný vchod, ale v případě zájmu je lze propojit do jednoho velkého objektu.

Chalupa 1
18 lůžek (s přistýlkami až 22)

- stylová společenská místnost s kachlovými kamny až pro 30 osob
- plně vybavená kuchyně: plynový sporák, elektrická trouba, lednička, myčka a veškeré nádobí

Chalupa 2
20 lůžek (s přistýlkami až 24)

- velká společenská místnost s barem a velkoplošnou TV až pro 50 osob
- kuchyňský kout s elektrickým sporákem, troubou, lednicí a kompletním vybavením
- navíc finská sauna pro 3 osoby, ideální pro relax po aktivním dni

Ceník, dostupnost a rezervace najdete na našem webu.
Těšíme se na vaši návštěvu v srdci Vysočiny!

Name: Greenlawn Manufactured Homes and Estates (A Blackwood Company)
Description:
Greenlawn Estates, located on East Pike in Zanesville, Ohio, has been a cornerstone of the community since its establishment in 1955. The mobile home park offered a welcoming environment with amenities such as a playground, clubhouse, swimming pool, and basketball court, fostering a strong sense of community for its residents.

The Blackwood family played a pivotal role in its development and management. Martin E. “Skeet” Blackwood, a well-known local businessman, laid the foundation for Greenlawn Estates, shaping it into a family-oriented enterprise. His son, Marty Blackwood, carried on the legacy, dedicating his life to maintaining and improving the park. Under their stewardship, Greenlawn Estates became known for its tight-knit community and resident-focused approach.

Skeet Blackwood passed away from old age, while Marty Blackwood tragically passed away years earlier from overwork, a testament to his relentless dedication to the family business and the people who called it home. After their passing, Greenlawn Estates changed hands, marking the end of an era for the Blackwood family’s stewardship of the community.

Name: Glückauf Wonen
Description:
De vraag naar betaalbaar wonen is in de huidige tijd vrijwel niet meer te overzien en vaak ronduit schrijnend. Tegelijkertijd kenmerkt Parkstad zich met veel, vaak leegstaand zakelijk vastgoed dat al geruime tijd geen kwalitatieve invulling biedt.

Gluckauf Wonen zet zich in om deze plekken te voorzien van een kwalitieve , duurzame invulling voor alle betrokkenen, onder andere door middel van modern leven volgens een uniek concept. In dit concept gaan wij uit van zowel de nieuwe bewoners, alsmede de omgeving maar ook bevordering van de werkgelegenheid en de lokale economie. Tevens krijgt de woon- en leefomgeving van omwonenden een flinke stimulans. Hiermee richten wij ons op een lange termijn verbeterende situatie voor alle betrokkenen, een nog mooier Parkstad.

Wij willen bijdragen aan een Parkstad van morgen, mensen een thuis bieden en/of een werkplek. Dit doormiddel van een initiatief waarbij wij kijken naar de huurder, de buurt, de gevel en tegelijkertijd proberen de lokale ondernemers te stimuleren of zelfs meehelpen op te starten. Graag kijken wij mee vanuit jouw perspectief op de huurmarkt als bewoner en/of ondernemer.

Opgericht door Britt Van Namen en Niels Jochems, belichaamt Flow Living een filosofie van harmonieus leven en verfijnd en doordacht design.

Britt Van Namen, met haar jarenlange expertise in high-end interieurarchitectuur (www.brittvannamen.be), brengt een scherp oog voor esthetiek naar elke ruimte. Bij Flow Living worden we gedreven door onze liefde voor prachtige interieurs en ons verlangen om de wereld wat mooier te maken door ruimtes te creëren waar geluk primeert en mensen moeiteloos hun "flow" vinden. Elk appartement dat we ontwerpen heeft als doel om een omgeving te creëren die geluk en rust uitstraalt.

Name: Bokollektivet AS
Description:
Bokollektivet er et nyskapende boligselskap som spesialiserer seg på å tilby kollektiv- og utleieenheter av høy standard. Vi setter våre leietakere i sentrum, da de representerer selskapet som våre ambassadører, og vi gjør alt vi kan for å legge til rette på best mulig måte for dem.

Vår visjon er å skape et fellesskap der beboere kan nyte en høykvalitets boopplevelse og et trivelig sosialt miljø. Vi forstår viktigheten av å tilby et hjem der våre leietakere kan føle seg trygge og komfortable. Derfor har vi nøye utvalgte boliger og legger stor vekt på kvaliteten på våre fasiliteter og tjenester.

I tillegg til å tilby moderne og attraktive boliger, sørger vi for å imøtekomme leietakernes behov og ønsker. Vi opprettholder åpen kommunikasjon og lytter til tilbakemeldinger, slik at vi kontinuerlig kan forbedre og tilpasse oss. Vårt dedikerte team er alltid tilgjengelig for å håndtere spørsmål, bekymringer eller eventuelle vedlikeholdsbehov.

Vi mener at et harmonisk fellesskap trives best når det er balanse mellom privatliv og fellesskap. Derfor tilbyr vi individuelt utformede rom og fellesarealer som oppfordrer til både sosiale samhandlinger og personlig tid.

Vårt mål er ikke bare å tilby et sted å bo, men å skape et hjem hvor våre leietakere føler seg verdsatt og ivaretatt. Vi jobber kontinuerlig for å gi dem den beste opplevelsen og legger vekt på å bygge sterke relasjoner med hver enkelt beboer.

Bokollektivet ønsker å være en pålitelig og ansvarlig aktør i boligmarkedet. Vi overholder alle relevante lover og forskrifter og legger stor vekt på bærekraftige praksiser. Vi stræver også etter å være en positiv bidragsyter til lokalsamfunnet, ved å støtte lokale initiativer og arrangementer.

Vi er stolte av vårt bokollektiv og ser frem til å ønske nye leietakere velkommen til vårt fellesskap. Ta gjerne kontakt med oss for mer informasjon eller for å planlegge en visning av våre flotte boliger.

Name: ZRently.com
Description:
ZRently is changing how rental marketplaces work by focusing on the one question renters actually care about first: do I qualify?

Every rental marketplace today looks the same. Endless listings, the same filters, and no clarity on requirements. Renters are forced to apply blindly, waste money on fees, and get rejected after the fact. Landlords deal with unqualified leads and constant back and forth.

ZRently changes that.

We let renters search and filter listings by credit score, income requirements, and whether co signers are accepted. Renters enter their credit score and instantly see the places they already know they qualify for. No guessing. No wasted applications.

This approach saves renters time, money, and frustration, while helping landlords attract more qualified leads and reduce unnecessary screening and messaging.

In less than eight months, renters have noticed. ZRently has seen nearly a million views in Los Angeles alone on Reddit, with traffic growing every day. The demand is clear and it confirms what we believe: transparency is the future of rentals.

Our mission is simple. Get every rental in the United States listed on ZRently with clear, searchable credit, income, and co signer requirements.

Try it out. It’s free.

Name: Evernest Dallas Property Management
Description:
Evernest's journey began in an unexpected manner during the 2008 financial crisis. At that time, our founder, Matthew Whitaker, found himself with 30 rental properties he had intended to sell, but the housing market downturn made this impossible. In response, he sought out a property manager who shared his philosophy and approach to business. By the end of that challenging year, Matthew had established Evernest and we proudly opened our doors to the public.
Since those 30 rental houses in 2008, our team continued to grow and now manage over 16,000 properties for over 6,000 owners. This growth is a testament to the hard work our team has embraced while providing owners with a best in class property management experience. What’s the secret to our success? Having a team who embraces the Evernest core values is what matters first.

Fara Living is looking for new sites to develop and grow across the South Coast.  Richmond House with 84 apartments will be ready in the Autumn of 2023 and Bournemouth House with 63 apartments will be ready in the Autumn of 2024.

Name: Mama HACs
Description:
Mama HACs assists self-managing landlords with 10 units or more. Our most popular service is assistance with current tenants. We address tenants' questions, concerns, and issues; coordinate maintenance requests; assist with the renewal and non-renewal/move-out processes; provide notices for inspections and late payments; implement tenant retention and more. 

We also offer stand-alone packages for those that have property management under control but may need additional assistance during the busy season with processing applications. Or maybe they would like to implement tenant retention but do not have the time. 

Heather A. Cook, aka Mama HACs, is first and foremost a wife to a very caring husband and a mother to two energetic toddlers. She was an on-site property manager where she managed an 87 unit complex, an 18 unit building, and 2 single-family homes for 6 years before focusing fully on assisting properties remotely. She has an ARM (Accredited Residential Manager) certificate from IREM.

She has helped first-time landlords navigate the property management world, set policies and procedures, implement retention practices, and set up property management software programs. Tenants love how friendly and approachable she is and landlords love that she is firm and fair.

She loves spending time with her family, crocheting, and decorating cookies. Her background as a paralegal, administrative assistant, office manager, and property manager has provided her with the experience to complete administrative tasks effectively and efficiently. Her love of learning, attention to detail, desire to help others, and organizational mindset make her the perfect candidate to help grow your business.

Cosa facciamo:
– Locazioni brevi in appartamenti residenziali al mare e in montagna
– Gestione operativa di immobili destinati ad uso turistico (check-in, pulizie, coordinamento fornitori)

Nous sommes conscients que la réussite d'une location passe par un état des lieux minutieux, c'est pourquoi nous sommes déterminés à offrir des services sur mesure et adaptés aux besoins de nos clients. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les agences immobilières et les syndics de copropriété et assurons une communication fluide et efficace tout au long du processus.

Chez Logexpert, la priorité est la satisfaction de nos clients. Nous sommes fiers de notre expertise et de notre professionnalisme et sommes convaincus que notre expérience et notre savoir-faire peuvent vous apporter une valeur ajoutée.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter, quelque soit votre taille ou votre localisation géographique, nous vous apporterons une réponse adaptée à vos besoins.

Name: Finca Los Paseros
Description:
¿Te gustaría disfrutar de unas vacaciones de ensueño en la Axarquía? Descubre el encanto de Cómpeta, Málaga, en Finca Los Paseros, una casa de alquiler vacacional con todo lo que necesitas. Esta acogedora y espaciosa villa te ofrece:

Piscina privada con tumbonas y sombrillas, WiFi gratis y aire acondicionado en todas las habitaciones, oficina aislada con excelentes vistas y tranquilidad, aparcamiento privado para varios vehículos, barbacoa y chimenea para disfrutar de una buena comida al aire libre o de una noche acogedora. A solo 70 minutos del aeropuerto de Málaga y 30 minutos de la playa. La casa tiene capacidad para 8 personas y cuenta con 4 dormitorios, todos con baño privado. Dos dormitorios tienen una cama doble, y los otros dos tienen dos camas individuales. La villa tiene un amplio salón, cocina totalmente equipada, ropa de cama, toallas, TV, barbacoa, 2 terrazas y un solárium con espectaculares vistas al mar y a la montaña.

Finca Los Paseros se encuentra en Cómpeta, un pintoresco pueblo blanco de la Axarquía, donde podrás disfrutar de actividades cercanas como senderismo, ciclismo, kayak, buceo … o simplemente relajarte en el ambiente tranquilo y rural.

No pierdas esta oportunidad y reserva tu estancia en Finca Los Paseros. Envíame un mensaje directo o un correo electrónico para consultar los precios especiales y la disponibilidad.

Ces formations sont à destination des : 
 
- Investisseurs particuliers ou professionnels

-  Manager d'Agence immobilière
 
- Consultant en immobilier
 
- Négociateur ou responsable du service location 
 
Afin de leur permettre de : 

- Réduire les frais de rédaction d'actes
 
- Utiliser des modèles conformes à la Législation

Name: Rentiful
Description:
Rentiful is an AI leasing platform for Build-to-Rent operators, combining commercial efficiency with beautiful renting.

Build-to-Rent operators lose value through inefficient leasing, poor lead quality and avoidable vacancy. Rentiful addresses this by focusing on renter discovery and qualification upstream of the leasing process.

We originate and qualify renters through targeted marketing, AI-led matching and a purpose-built renting platform, then pass high-quality, proceedable prospects to operators’ leasing teams. Operators only pay when a lease is signed, aligning cost directly to outcomes and protecting NOI.

Renters benefit from a clearer, simpler journey to finding their next home, while operators gain better lead quality without upfront risk.

Name: Malta Townhouse Rentals
Description:
Step into a world of timeless elegance and modern luxury at this one-of-a-kind holiday retreat! 

In today's urban landscape, there is a growing demand for property and living spaces that offer a multitude of desirable attributes, including multi-usage space, innovative design concepts, historical significance, and the preservation of unique architectural features. Real estate developers are increasingly focused on optimizing available space, with properties lacking distinctive appeal, often through the replacement of older buildings.

Recent research shows a huge gap in the market and that the current offerings in the real estate market may lack the distinctive character and charm associated with properties possessing significant historical value and traditional features. 

The strategic approach adopted for our project took a distinctive path. Beginning in 2018, we embarked on a journey to revive a property with a rich history dating back approximately 150 years, offering an immersive experience for those interested in its historical significance. Our goal was twofold: to preserve a unique townhouse from potential demolition and a transformation into residential units, and to provide an opportunity for heritage-minded tourists to immerse themselves in its living history.

To achieve this vision, we collaborated with one of Malta's leading architects, committing to a thorough and meticulous process. Rather than opting for quick fixes or modern interventions, we chose a more intricate and time-consuming route. This involved carefully integrating additional space into the property while adhering to its original contextual design and construction techniques. Every effort was made to meticulously restore and retain each original exterior and interior feature we encountered, honouring the property's authentic charm and character.

Description:
Be2Beach Group SL is a sole proprietorship company that stands out for its diversified investment positions, especially in the wellness and hospitality sectors. Founded and wholly owned by the sole shareholder Manuel Gruni, Be2Beach Group SL is rapidly expanding and making significant strategic acquisitions.

Wellness Segment
In 2024, Be2Beach Group SL acquired 80% of the capital of Fabbrica Benessere, a significant step to strengthen its presence in the wellness segment. In addition to this acquisition, the company has recently incorporated For My Well and For My Teraphy into its portfolio, further expanding its offerings and consolidating its position as a leader in the wellness sector.

Tourism and Hospitality
Be2Beach Group SL is actively involved in other activities closely connected to the world of tourism and hospitality. Among these is the revenue participation in Club Cala Domingos, an exclusive complex of 120 beachfront chalets located on the island of Mallorca. Additionally, the company manages RevenHome.com, an innovative platform that guarantees income to owners of second homes and villas without the obligation of rigid and long-term contracts. Be2Beach Group SL also handles XML flows for the B2B demand and supply of recreational boats for rental.

Future Prospects
Be2Beach Group SL is committed to continuing its development and growth path, expanding into the most promising sectors of the moment, including wellness and hospitality. The company is also exploring new opportunities in the crypto and digital fields, demonstrating an innovative and forward-thinking vision.

In conclusion, Be2Beach Group SL represents a dynamic and ever-evolving reality, ready to consolidate its market presence and seize new growth and development opportunities in various strategic sectors.

BFI Finance telah melayani ribuan nasabah di seluruh Indonesia dan telah mendapatkan kepercayaan dari masyarakat dalam menangani transaksi gadai BPKB mobil.

Salah satu keunggulan utama BFI Finance adalah cakupan nasional mereka. Mereka memiliki cabang dan mitra usaha di berbagai wilayah Indonesia, sehingga Anda dapat dengan mudah mengakses layanan mereka di mana pun Anda berada. Ini adalah nilai tambah yang sangat penting, terutama jika Anda tinggal di daerah yang terpencil atau jauh dari pusat kota.

Proses Cepat dan Mudah
Proses gadai BPKB mobil dengan BFI Finance sangat cepat dan mudah. Mereka memahami bahwa kecepatan adalah kunci, terutama ketika Anda membutuhkan dana tambahan dalam waktu singkat. Dengan prosedur yang disederhanakan dan tim yang terlatih dengan baik, Anda dapat mengharapkan pencairan dana dalam waktu singkat setelah mengajukan permohonan.

Penawaran Kondisi yang Kompetitif
BFI Finance menawarkan kondisi yang sangat kompetitif dalam hal suku bunga dan tenor. Mereka memahami bahwa setiap nasabah memiliki kebutuhan keuangan yang berbeda, dan mereka berusaha untuk memberikan solusi yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan Anda. Name: RentSafe
Description:
L'état des lieux est un processus crucial pour assurer la protection juridique des locataires et des propriétaires. Malheureusement, il est souvent méconnu dans le marché de la location saisonnière, et peut devenir source de contentieux entre les parties.

Notre outil, Rentsafe, permet aux propriétaires et locataires de gagner du temps et d'éviter les litiges grâce à des états des lieux précis et fiables, réalisés en moins de 3 minutes. Rentsafe utilise une application mobile qui, après inscription et une authentification renforcée, permet de réaliser un état des lieux en filmant la location. Une intelligence artificielle répertorie tous les éléments présents, les liste et les transmet au format état des lieux. Celui-ci est ensuite inscrit dans la blockchain, garantissant ainsi une sécurité juridique optimale et définitive grâce à l'ajout d'une signature respectant la norme eIDAS.

Kirkelien tilbyder 14 nybyggede landsbyhuse i særklasse – moderne huse i naturskønne omgivelser kun 5 km fra Aalborg centrum. De arkitekttegnede boliger er inspireret af den historiske Nørre Tranders Kirke og opført i holdbare materialer.

Hver bolig har sin egen kombination af tegl, mursten og vinduesrammer, som skaber et varieret, harmonisk udtryk. Med privat terrasse eller altan, adgang til fælleshave med fredet bøgetræ og 72 m² orangeri, kombinerer Kirkelien byens nærhed med landsbyens ro.

Ideelt for boligsøgende, der ønsker et luksuriøst hus inspireret af fortiden, formet til nutiden.

Name: KODIAL EIENDOM AS
Description:
Kodial Eiendom AS arbeider med utleie, drift og utvikling av eiendommer i Vestfoldbyene Horten, Tønsberg og Holmestrand. Selskapet kontrollerer og forvalter nærmere 350 utleieobjekter, er en veldrevet bedrift som har eksistert i over 30 år, og består av 25 dyktige og engasjerte ansatte.  

Selskapet har fokus på videreutvikling av eiendomsmassen, oppkjøp av sentrumsnære boliger, trygghet og tilgjengelighet for kundene. Ulike kundegrupper er representert i deres kundeportefølje, og selskapet har boliger i ulike størrelser, fra ett-roms leiligheter for studenter og enslige, til større familieleiligheter og eneboliger.

Ta en kikk på ledige boliger og se om du finner et leieobjekt som passer deg. Bruk gjerne kontaktskjemaet for å søke på bolig. Selskapet vil gjøre sitt ytterste for å finne en bolig som dekker dine behov.

Kontakt selskapet på telefon eller e-post hvis du har spørsmål om leieobjektene. 
Telefon: 33 04 54 75 | E-post: post@kodialeiendom.no

1) Conseils sur la gestion de vos biens, et leur conformité pour la mise en location
2) Recherche de locataires, et constitution du dossier

Name: SOFA.bz
Description:
«SOFA.bz» – онлайн-сервис для сдачи в аренду Собственниками своей жилой
недвижимости (через агентский договор с Сервисом) частным лицам для проживания на длительный срок.
Сервис занимается сдачей в аренду подключенных к Сервису Квартир Собственников от их имени Жильцам на правах Агента. А именно:
+ Поиск, заселение и выселение Жильцов с оформлением договора
+ Администрирование взаимоотношений с Жильцами
+ Сбор оплат, работа с задолженностями, выплата собранных средств Собственнику по Договору
+ Поддержание чистоты и комфортного для проживания состояния Квартиры

Sofa – это платформа, она автоматизирует и легализует весь процесс аренды. Для собственника это личный кабинет с отчетами и контролем. Для жильца — мобильное приложение, где он оплачивает счет через Kaspi и решает все бытовые вопросы.
В основе микросервисная архитектура для масштабирования, а всю рутину поиска и поддержки клиентов делают AI-боты в соцсетях.
За пять месяцев мы с нуля подключили более тридцати объектов, заселили больше двухсот человек и вышли на MRR 30 000 долларов. Такими темпами мы достигнем годового оборота в 400 000 долларов, и мы уже прибыльны.
До конца года мы утроим количество объектов и сохраним маржинальность.
Итог: SOFА — это не просто сервис по аренде жилья. Это базовое право на комфортную жизнь и безопасность.

Мы ищем стратегических партнёров усиления команды и масштабирования.

Name: Sunwise Property
Description:
Sunwise Property provides a specialized rental solution for homeowners, architects, and developers with properties awaiting redevelopment. We bridge the gap between design and construction by turning vacant, pre-demolition homes into safe, temporary rentals, without any repair costs, management fees, or tenant risk.

Our full-service model is simple:
We lease the home as-is, invest in essential improvements, place and manage qualified tenants, and guarantee vacancy aligned with your building timelines. This allows clients to earn reliable income during permit delays while keeping the property protected, maintained, and fully compliant with Vancouver’s housing and tax regulations.

At Sunwise, we rethink what’s possible for pre-demo properties. By transforming idle houses into productive temporary homes, we help reduce vacancy, support the local housing supply, and give project teams a trusted partner throughout the redevelopment process.

Name: Downtown Dwellings - Little Rock
Description:
Downtown Dwellings founders, Mark Brown and Jill Judy are dedicated to purchasing distressed buildings in the heart of the historic areas of downtown Little Rock, Arkansas. They thoughtfully restore each property, restoring the architectural features while adding modern elements and conveniences. 
 
“We believe that by preserving these wonderful historic properties, both homes and commercial buildings, and creating in them quality living space for today’s lifestyle makes our community a better place.” 

- Jill Judy, co-owner.
 
Each apartment is unique; each building has a character all its own. The company has restored and created apartment homes and urban lofts from hundred-year-old houses, school buildings, even a former church. The neighborhoods as well have their own special character, with some among quiet, shade-lined streets, others nearer to the bustle of downtown.

“Downtown Dwellings offers more than a place to live. It is all about community, and neighbors, and saving these beautiful old neighborhoods. We invite you to become part of it.”

– Mark Brown, co-owner.

Name: Evernest Nashville Property Management
Description:
Evernest's journey began in an unexpected manner during the 2008 financial crisis. At that time, our founder, Matthew Whitaker, found himself with 30 rental properties he had intended to sell, but the housing market downturn made this impossible. In response, he sought out a property manager who shared his philosophy and approach to business. By the end of that challenging year, Matthew had established Evernest and we proudly opened our doors to the public.
Since those 30 rental houses in 2008, our team continued to grow and now manage over 16,000 properties for over 6,000 owners. This growth is a testament to the hard work our team has embraced while providing owners with a best in class property management experience. What’s the secret to our success? Having a team who embraces the Evernest core values is what matters first.

Name: Villa Golfe & Sens - Séminaire vue mer
Description:
Superbe maison entièrement rénovée en 2024 de 260 m2 sur un site exceptionnel en bord de mer (golfe du Morbihan) et d'une réserve naturelle d'oiseaux. Accès direct à la mer depuis le jardin de 4000 m2 qui domine la nature avec une vue magnifique, de jour comme de nuit (jardin éclairé). Belle terrasse en bois plein sud.
La maison est rénovée avec beaucoup de goût et convient bien à des séminaires, des codirs ou des ateliers de travail d'une ou plusieurs journées.

Événements adaptés pour ce lieu

Séminaire de direction ou codir jusque 20 personnes (sans hébergement ou 8 personnes en résidentiel).
Possibilité de cocktail déjeunatoire ou dinatoire, idem en format buffet avec en option une soirée face à la mer sur la terrasse et dans le jardin magique.
Un lieu très adapté aussi à des afterworks ou soirée d'entreprise surtout les jours d'été pour déambuler. Le calme et la nature sauvage unique alliées au confort et à la proximité de la vieille ville de Vannes et de la gare (5 mns)

Avantages compétitifs

Une grande salle de conférence de 45m2 au r+ 1 pour tenir un codir ou un séminaire avec un plafond cathédrale lumineux avec son plafond en bois blanc peint et 2 grandes fenêtres sud et ouest.
Une grande pièce salon au rdc accueillante donnant sur la vue mer avec une belle cuisine ouverte et moderne.
Une magnifique terrasse de 80m2 qui domine un jardin illuminé le soir de 3000 m2 en bord de mer.
Possibilité d'hébergement avec 5 chambres doubles ou triple pour 10 personnes décorées avec goût

Accessibilité au lieu

La maison est située dans un beau quartier de Vannes dans un écrin de nature en bordure de la réserve naturelle où viennent se reposer les sarcelles, colverts, bernaches et parfois les hérons et cygnes sauvages.
Jolie chemin privé goudronné pour accéder à la maison. Parking visiteurs privé devant la maison où peuvent stationner 5 voitures.
A 5 mns de la gare et de la vieille ville de Vannes en voiture, 10 mns à vélo. Accès direct au GR34.

Name: Bridge2Rent
Description:
Bridge2Rent is a dedicated property solutions provider that specialises in offering temporary accommodation for individuals and families who require stable, short-to-medium-term housing. With a strong focus on supporting vulnerable tenants during times of transition, we work collaboratively with local authorities, landlords, and property owners to provide well-maintained, compliant, and safe living spaces. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to building enduring partnerships with social housing providers and landlords, acting as a trusted intermediary to facilitate smooth, efficient housing solutions.

Our services encompass a wide range of support, including the provision of quality temporary housing for residents awaiting permanent placements. We lease properties from private landlords and commercial owners, transforming them into suitable spaces for social housing. Our close cooperation with local councils allows us to contribute to homelessness prevention and address emergency housing needs. Each property we manage is fully insured, maintained to high standards, and compliant with all necessary regulations. We also place great importance on offering ongoing support and open communication to both our residents and partners, ensuring a professional and responsive service at every step.

Bridge2Rent prides itself on being the dependable connection between temporary accommodation and long-term housing, helping to bridge critical gaps in the housing system and providing reassurance and reliability to both tenants and stakeholders.

Name: Leym Inmobiliaria
Description:
Somos una empresa con personal certificado y dedicado a la asesoría inmobiliaria principalmente de desarrollos de nivel residencial y alta plusvalía, frecuentemente atendemos  personas, profesionistas exitosos, de diferentes áreas, que tienen el interés de invertir en un bien inmueble para asegurar e incrementar su patrimonio, pero que no se deciden.

La causa principal que no les permite concretar una inversión de este tipo es que tienen pensamientos como estos: 

No me alcanza para pagar un terreno
No quiero endeudarme por mucho tiempo con mensualidades que no podré pagar
No se si sea seguro invertir con esta desarrolladora (temor a fraudes)
El desarrollo esta muy lejos de la zona urbana
No son redituables los bienes inmuebles
Es mucho tiempo el que tengo que esperar para que me entreguen mi terreno (en casos de preventa)

Estos pensamiento son comprensibles cuando no tenemos conocimiento de los planes de financiamiento que ofrecen en la actualidad algunas desarrolladoras.

Si estas dispuesto a conocer estos planes de financiamiento y a tomar la decisión de asegurar la estabilidad de tu futuro, te podemos ayudar a resolver todas tus dudas y comentarte de las muchas facilidades de compra que existen hoy día, para que puedas comenzar a formar ó incrementar tu patrimonio.

Imagínate vivir en un Desarrollo totalmente planeado, con urbanización de primer nivel, variedad de áreas comunes de uso exclusivo, seguridad 24/7, con todos los servios a tu alcance y rodeado de la naturaleza. Llámanos al 5514847991 y con gusto te atenderemos.

Kesh Assistance can help you with a variety of tasks related to managing your rental property, including:
Listing your property on rental platforms like #Airbnb and #VRBO
Managing bookings and communicating with guests
Providing check-in and check-out instructions
Preparing the #property for guests
Cleaning the property after guests depart
Handling any maintenance or repair issues
Managing the finances of your rental property
Kesh Assistance provide you with advice and guidance on how to optimize your rental income and make the most of your #investment.
Here are some of the specific things , Kesh Assistance agent can do:
List your property on rental platforms. Create a compelling listing that will attract guests. They can also help you set the right price and optimize your listing for search engines.
Manage #bookings and communicate with guests. handle all the back-and-forth with guests, from responding to inquiries to checking guests in and out. also help you resolve any guest-related issues that may arise.
Prepare the property for guests. your property is clean, stocked with amenities, and ready for guests to arrive. Kesh Assistance can also help you with any last-minute preparations, such as setting up linens or stocking the fridge.
Clean the property after guests depart. take care of cleaning your property after guests depart. This includes making sure the property is spotless, the linens are washed, and the amenities are restocked.
Handle maintenance and repair issues. If there are any maintenance or repair issues that arise, a co-host can help you get them resolved quickly and efficiently. This can save you time and hassle, and it can also help you avoid costly repairs.
Manage the finances of your rental property. Track your rental income and expenses. They can also help you with tax preparation and other financial matters related to your rental property.

Name: Meu Locador
Description:
O Meu Locador é a solução perfeita para quem quer deixar a gestão de imóveis mais prática, segura e, por que não, divertida! Esqueça os processos tradicionais e complicados que fazem o tempo passar mais devagar do que o normal. Com a nossa plataforma, você pode criar contratos de locação de forma simples e eficiente, sem precisar sair do lugar. E tudo isso com a tranquilidade de saber que sua assinatura digital é válida juridicamente e super segura.

Aqui, o que vale é a praticidade. Criar, personalizar e assinar contratos nunca foi tão fácil! E com o Meu Locador, você não precisa mais se preocupar com papéis espalhados pela casa ou com o medo de perder algum documento importante. Com a nossa plataforma, tudo é armazenado na nuvem, o que significa que seus contratos estão sempre à mão, prontos para serem acessados de onde você estiver.

Mas o Meu Locador não é só sobre criar contratos. Nossa plataforma vai além, facilitando a comunicação entre locador e inquilino, além de enviar lembretes automáticos para garantir que nenhum prazo passe despercebido. E a segurança dos seus dados? Aqui não há espaço para preocupações. Usamos criptografia de ponta para garantir que tudo fique protegido, desde os documentos até as transações financeiras.

E para quem tem mais de um imóvel, a coisa fica ainda mais interessante. O Meu Locador oferece ferramentas para gerenciar vários contratos ao mesmo tempo, com total controle sobre pagamentos, vencimentos e renovação de contratos. O objetivo aqui é te dar mais tempo para se concentrar no que realmente importa: administrar seus imóveis com mais eficiência e menos dor de cabeça.

Por isso, se você é um locador que quer simplificar a gestão e deixar o trabalho pesado para a tecnologia, venha para o Meu Locador. A plataforma que facilita, organiza e deixa a gestão do seu imóvel mais divertida do que você imagina. Não perca tempo, cadastre-se hoje mesmo e comece a transformar sua locação!

Name: Leasee Rent
Description:
Dans un monde où la mobilité professionnelle est essentielle, nous proposons une solution innovante : la mise à disposition de logements destinés aux professionnels. Cette initiative répond aux besoins des employés et des entreprises en offrant une alternative pratique, confortable et économique aux séjours prolongés à l'hôtel.

Leasee Rent c'est :

1. Logements Confortables et Équipés :
Nos logements sont entièrement meublés et équipés pour garantir un séjour agréable et productif. Ils incluent une cuisine équipée pour la préparation des repas, un espace de travail avec une connexion internet haut débit, un coin détente avec télévision et des chambres confortables avec linge de maison fourni.

2. Flexibilité de Location :
Pour s'adapter aux besoins variés des professionnels, nos logements sont disponibles pour des locations de courte, moyenne et longue durée. Les contrats peuvent être ajustés selon la durée des missions professionnelles, offrant une grande flexibilité.

3. Proximité des Centres d'Affaires :
Nos logements sont situés à proximité des principaux centres d'affaires, des infrastructures de transport et des commodités locales, réduisant ainsi le temps de trajet des professionnels et optimisant leur emploi du temps.

Vous y gagnez :

1. Réduction des Coûts :
En optant pour des logements professionnels plutôt que des hôtels, les entreprises peuvent réaliser des économies significatives sur les frais d'hébergement, surtout pour des séjours prolongés.

2. Bien-être des Employés :
Offrir un logement confortable et bien situé contribue au bien-être et à la productivité des employés en déplacement, réduisant ainsi le stress lié aux voyages et aux séjours dans des environnements impersonnels.

3. Simplification Logistique :
La gestion centralisée des logements et des services associés simplifie la logistique pour les départements des ressources humaines et des services généraux, permettant de se concentrer sur d'autres priorités stratégiques.

Name: Valley Grove Properties
Description:
Transparent, Affordable, Relatable Property Management in Utah and Salt Lake Valleys.

Hiring Property Managers is expensive and scary – 
Are you getting what you pay for?
What are you paying for exactly?
Is your property being cared for the same way you would look after it?
Hi, I’m Brett Jackson, owner of Valley Grove Properties, a local small business based in Utah Valley. 
I started this company to make it easier for new Landlords to get started, since I faced these challenges myself.

--

Transparent: We clearly outline everything we provide and send you transparent documents with pictures anytime we interact with your investment. Every repair, change, and decision are approved by you, so you know exactly what is happening with your property.

Affordable: You want an asset which provides positive cashflow and every dollar spent lowers your margins. Our unique, all-inclusive pricing model is the most affordable out there because our overhead is low, and we don’t charge for things you don’t NEED.

Relatable: I own multiple properties in Utah Valley myself, so I treat your home like my own, because I get it. I even provide an optional Landlord Training Service where I spend 2 hours a month, for one year, showing you everything I do, and how I do it, so you can one day become independent and replace me with yourself.

Name: River Vista
Description:
Welcome to this stunning, architecturally designed home. Resting on an elevated 1546m block, this home boasts a bold and modern façade with landscaped gardens, and amazing panoramic views of the North Pine River and mountains. The finishing texture and design of this home speaks for itself.

Three words to describe this property:
‘Tranquility, Modern & Creators Heaven’
Brisbane’s River Vista is the perfect home for your creative mind.

This stunning home is perfect for:
Workshops & Retreats.
Photo/Video shoots for  – Weddings/Elopements, Boudoir, Family, Branding, Fashion and Lifestyle – Fitness, Health and Healing, Product, Corporate – endless creative expression.

The entry itself is a private secluded little spot, perfect for a photoshoot, evoking feelings of awe and serenity as if you’re in your own little Mediterranean like sanctuary. Together, the arches and stones create a feeling of timelessness and sophistication. It’s clear that this is a luxurious family home, with an abundance of light. The two-story floor plan is filled with natural materials and high-end finishes, creating an opulent and inviting atmosphere. The upper level features a chef’s dream kitchen, complete with a Smeg oven, a butler’s pantry. A living room where you can retreat to watch a little TV by the fire. The dining area and entertaining deck overlooks the captivating panorama and infinity pool. Turn on the waterfall and you will find your own sanctuary ‘Under a waterfall’ cascading from top floor! This huge waterfall would be perfect for swimsuit shoots!

The lower level of the home is perfect for entertaining, with an open-plan space that flows seamlessly to the infinity pool, built-in outdoor kitchen, and a yoga room with an infrared sauna and sofa bed to accommodate extra friends and family. This level also includes a full bar/kitchenette, another living space adjacent to the lower deck, a separate laundry, and a third bathroom.

Name: The Corporate Lettings Company
Description:
The Corporate Lettings Company is a professional relocation agency covering the entire UK, working with companies, universities and hospitals to find accommodation for their employees and students.

Are You A UK Landlord Or Letting Agent?

We understand that sometimes, it can be hard to find the right tenant for your properties in the best timeframe. This is where we come in... we have a waiting list of professional clients, and we’re eager to work with you to help fill your properties!

How Does It Work?

We essentially take on management of your property and pay you a guaranteed sum of rent each month, over a long term (usually at least 3 years).

It’s then our job to keep the rooms let to our professional clients, while you relax and simply collect your rent. We cover all your letting costs and even do most small repairs ourselves. You got into property for the investment, not the headaches, after all!

Sit Back And Leave It To Us!

For a landlord or agent, the benefits of working with us are many:

Guaranteed rent 52 weeks a year, rain or shine

Long lease so you don’t need to worry about voids (typically between 3 & 7 years)

All letting administration and headaches taken care of

Small repairs and gardening done, so you don’t have to

The benefits are clear and if you’d like to explore how we can work together, contact us

Name: Hudson McDonald Properties
Description:
Hudson McDonald has been buying, building and investing in the City of Berkeley for more than 20 years. With a focus on high-quality architecture, environmental sustainability and a commitment to adding great buildings to Berkeley's urban fabric, Hudson McDonald has been involved in the entitlement, construction or acquisition of 15 projects comprising almost 800 units of housing and more than 100,000 square feet of commercial uses. Our projects include more than 120 below-market-rate housing units, new space for local nonprofit organizations, and the retention of long-time Berkeley businesses.

Our real estate practice includes new development and value-add acquisitions with an emphasis on renovation and restoration. All of our buildings are constructed or renovated to a high degree of energy and water efficiency, seismic safety and architectural quality. Our projects have received awards and recognition from design groups, real estate professionals, and environmental organizations. Our innovative projects have served as case studies for a variety of groups seeking to replicate our success.

In addition to our commitment to creating a better built environment, Hudson McDonald is also involved in civic activities and community organizations. The firm attempts to work with locally owned businesses whenever possible. In one recent project, more than 70% of the project costs were contracted to firms and organizations located in Berkeley and Oakland. The principals have sat on numerous nonprofit boards including the Berkeley Public Schools Fund, Livable Berkeley, the Berkeley Chamber of Commerce and the Downtown Berkeley Association. They are involved in fundraising for local causes and are active participants in local politics. As long-time Berkeley residents and Cal grads, both principals share a strong commitment to enhancing and improving the city.

Name: HacerHouse
Description:
INVESTING IN POTENTIAL:  PEOPLE AND PROPERTY

Subscription-membership based where the metrics of a worthy resident are non-traditional are not tied to do paystubs, income to rent ratios, or credit scores. We're reinventing property management for the needs of the 21st century economic workforce. May include options for equity in lieu of cash payments.
In the future, we will assess the economic potential of the companies formed, additional product lines added, and other constructive projects of the members that contribute to society. Possibilities for fintech products related to assessing potential.

Research shows Millennials and GenZ professionals (remote workers, contingent workers, solopreneurs and small entrepreneurial teams) going to startup hubs such as Mexico City and Barcelona (or even temporarily to Bali) to avoid the hoop-jumping of North American housing markets which is becoming stricter and more structured in terms of screening processes due to consolidation in the real estate industry. Or if they do stay in North America, they seek out coliving/coworking Airbnbs (prepaid; no credit score, no paystub, no 30% income limit) that cater to those on a similar journey with camaraderie and informal think tank/incubator feel in places such as SF, Austin, and Miami.

Hacer House is also a network of coliving homes, multi-family developments, and vacation rentals (for short-term business offsites and retreats) that focuses on servicing the new workforce. An entrepreneurial creative (A.C.E. = artist, creator and/or entrepreneur) becomes a subscribing member when they are actively reside at a Hacer House (on pause when they are not on network). 

Medium-term housing solutions for founders, creatives, freelancers and side-hustlers going all in. 

The first housing available will cater to the entrepreneurial spirit of the classic Silicon Valley garage and communal hacker house and be located in Las Vegas.

La terrasse

Name: Golden Luxe
Description:
Golden Luxe è una boutique agency specializzata nella gestione, compravendita e valorizzazione di proprietà di pregio, nell’organizzazione di affitti brevi di lusso e nel noleggio di yacht esclusivi.
Operiamo con un approccio sartoriale, curando ogni aspetto dell’esperienza abitativa e di viaggio per una clientela internazionale che ricerca eccellenza, privacy e personalizzazione assoluta.

La nostra competenza abbraccia l’intero ciclo di vita dell’investimento immobiliare: dalla selezione delle migliori opportunità sul mercato alla gestione operativa e strategica delle proprietà, fino alla rivendita. Grazie a un’accurata ottimizzazione dei processi e a un network consolidato di partner di fiducia, garantiamo massima redditività e incremento del valore nel tempo.

Per il settore degli affitti brevi di lusso, offriamo una gestione “chiavi in mano” che comprende marketing avanzato, gestione delle prenotazioni, servizi di concierge, manutenzione e cura dell’immobile. Ogni ospite vive un’esperienza unica, arricchita da servizi esclusivi come chef privati, tour personalizzati, esperienze enogastronomiche e transfer privati.

Il nostro dipartimento Yacht Charter completa l’offerta, proponendo imbarcazioni di prestigio per crociere indimenticabili nel Mediterraneo e oltre. Dai superyacht ai day charter, creiamo itinerari su misura che coniugano comfort, stile e scenari da sogno.

La filosofia di Golden Luxe si fonda su tre pilastri: lusso, trasparenza e risultati concreti. La nostra missione è trasformare ogni proprietà o viaggio in un’esperienza memorabile, con la certezza per i nostri clienti di avere un partner affidabile, discreto e orientato all’eccellenza.

Operiamo in Versilia, Forte dei Marmi, Firenze, Porto Cervo, Venezia, Milano e collaborazioni internazionali.

Description:
Pomáháme investorům v rozvoji a správě jejich nemovitého majetku. Máme více jak 13-leté zkušenosti se správou nemovitostí. Aktuálně spravujeme přes 1000 nájemních jednotek svých ale i investorů v Praze, Brně, Ústeckém, Libereckém, Středočeském, Plzeňském a Karlovarském kraji. 

Pilíře naší správy nemovitostí

 1) Propracovaný systém výběru nájemníků
Výběr nájemníka je klíčovou disciplínou naší správy nemovitostí. Klademe důraz na důkladné prověření každého zájemce o bydlení.
 Vyhledáme pro vás nejlepšího nájemníka. Prověříme jeho finanční situaci i případné dluhy.
 Naše dlouhodobá úspěšnost: téměř plná obsazenost nemovitostí v naší správě.

 2) Úspora času a transakčních nákladů investora
Zajišťujeme všechny potřebné úkony za vás.
 Šetříme váš čas, emoce i náklady:

Připravujeme smlouvy a dodatky
Vyřizujeme prodloužení nájmů
Zajišťujeme kalendářní vyúčtování záloh a mimořádné vyúčtování při odchodu nájemníka
 3) Nebojíme se problémových nájemníků a neplatičů
Pokud nájemce přestane hradit nájemné nebo se vyskytnou jiné potíže, můžete se spolehnout na naši osobní návštěvu.
 Nebojíme se konfliktu s nájemníkem a hájíme zájmy našich investorů.

 4) Energie pod kontrolou
Provádíme pravidelné odečty měřáků energií (vodoměry, elektroměry aj.) a předcházíme tak nadměrným spotřebám na váš účet.
 Energie, které lze přepsat, vždy přepisujeme na nájemníky a minimalizujeme riziko ztrát.

 5) Provádíme opravy a rekonstrukce
Zajišťujeme dílčí i celkové rekonstrukce nemovitostí.

 6) Máme v práci systém a jsme transparentní
Spravujeme nemovitosti s využitím naší vlastní online aplikace zvladneme.cz. Sdílíme s vámi veškeré soubory a informace 24/7.

 7) Jsme tým, jsme investoři a rozumíme investorům
Sami investujeme do nemovitostí a známe potřeby pronajímatelů investičních bytů.
 Naše zkušenosti: mnohé jsme získali vlastním úsilím a investicemi.
 Pracujeme v týmu s delegovanými odpovědnostmi a jsme zastupitelní.

Name: True Steward Property Management
Description:
The name True Steward is more than just a title for my property management business — it’s a reflection of who I am and what I believe in at the deepest level.

As an eco-conscious, earth-loving person, I’ve always felt a strong calling toward land stewardship — not just caring for the land, but respecting it as a living system that connects us all. I believe that every relationship we hold — with the earth, with one another, and with the spaces we inhabit — deserves our attention, respect, and care.

To be a true steward means to act with integrity, responsibility, and compassion. It means showing up with care for what’s been entrusted to us — whether that’s a home, a tenant, a community, or a natural space. This belief is at the heart of how I approach property management.

My background as a notary and executive assistant gave me a foundation in trust, accountability, and service — qualities that are essential to stewarding not just property, but people’s peace of mind. I've always been drawn to justice and equity, and I carry those values into every decision I make.I wanted a name that stood for something — that spoke to both my values and my vision for how property management can be done differently. True Steward is that name. It represents a promise: to care deeply, act responsibly, and build something lasting — not just in property, but in community and connection.

On the tenant side, Sierra Property Partners provides a wide array of options for both residential and commercial needs. Commercial clients can find various options such as retail spaces, office buildings, and industrial properties, all tailored to meet diverse business requirements.
The company prides itself on its deep understanding of the local market dynamics. Auburn's unique blend of historic charm and modern amenities makes it an attractive location for both residents and businesses. Sierra Property Partners leverages this knowledge to match properties with the right tenants, ensuring mutually beneficial long-term relationships.
In addition to their core leasing services, Sierra Property Partners also provides valuable insights and advice to clients.

Name: Prosperity Lets
Description:
Are you looking for a profitable and hassle-free way to invest in property? If so, you might want to consider HMOs.
HMOs, or houses of multiple occupation, are properties that are rented out to multiple tenants who share facilities like the kitchen and bathroom. They can generate higher rental income and occupancy rates than standard properties, but they also come with more rules and responsibilities for landlords.
That’s where Prosperity Lets comes in. We are a new HMO letting business that helps landlords find, manage, and grow their HMO portfolio. We take care of everything from finding suitable tenants, to ensuring compliance with HMO regulations, to maintaining and repairing the property.
We have a team of experienced and professional HMO experts who can help you maximise your return on investment and minimise your risk and stress. Whether you are new to HMOs or already have a portfolio, we can tailor our services to suit your needs and goals.
If you are interested in learning more about HMOs and how Prosperity Lets can help you, please visit our website or contact us today. We would love to hear from you and answer any questions you may have.
Prosperity Lets - the smart way to invest in HMOs.

Our apartment homes are distinguished by stylish designer features, with beautifully appointed kitchens, quality appliances and hardwood-style flooring.

Name: BlueStoneLettings
Description:
BlueStone Lettings is built on a simple idea: landlords deserve better. Better care, better communication, and better tenants. That’s why everything we do is focused on quality and protecting your property properly, not rushing people in for the sake of speed.

We’re a hands-on letting agency. We meet people, we check people, and we make sure every decision is made with your long-term interest in mind. No shortcuts, no guessing, no leaving things to chance.

Here’s what we do:

High-Quality Tenant Find
We don’t just put your property online and hope for the best. We speak to every applicant face-to-face, run proper background checks, and call previous landlords to make sure they’re reliable.

Full Property Management
If you want everything taken care of, we do it. Monthly inspections, maintenance, communication, updates — the whole lot. You’ll always know where things stand.

Detailed Screening & Vetting
We take tenant checks seriously. Income, reliability, behaviour, references — we make sure the person going into your property is the right fit, not just the fastest to apply.

Targeted Marketing & Tenant Sourcing
Every property has its own audience. Some are perfect for students, some for professionals, some for families. We adapt to your market and go where your ideal tenants actually are — not just the standard listing sites.

Clear, Honest Communication
If you message us, you get a response. If something happens at your property, you hear about it. We’re transparent, straightforward, and easy to reach.

At the end of the day, BlueStone Lettings exists for one reason:
to raise the standard in lettings and give landlords a service they can genuinely trust.

Better tenants.
Better management.
Better results.

Name: Najmito
Description:
V našem nemovitostním fondu se zaměřujeme na vytváření kvalitního a dostupného nájemního bydlení. Naší vášní je proměňovat starší a velkorysé rodinné domy na moderní bytové jednotky, které poskytují pohodlné bydlení za přijatelné ceny. Věříme, že každý si zaslouží místo, které může nazvat domovem, a to bez kompromisů v kvalitě či umístění.

Hlavními faktory při pečlivém výběru našich projektů jsou jedinečnost a potenciál staveb. Specializujeme se na nemovitosti, jejichž úpravy jsou pro jednotlivce rozsáhlé a finančně náročné, zatímco pro tradiční developery představují malý objem prostoru nebo potenciální zisk. To nám umožňuje vyplnit mezeru na trhu a poskytnout našim klientům něco výjimečného. S láskou a odborností přetváříme tyto objekty na byty, které nejen že splňují všechny požadavky na moderní bydlení, ale také si zachovávají svůj jedinečný charakter a historický význam.

V našem fondu klademe velký důraz na udržitelnost a integraci do místních komunit. Všechny naše projekty jsou realizovány s ohledem na minimalizaci dopadu na životní prostředí a podporu pozitivního sociálního vlivu v okolních komunitách. Při přestavbě dbáme na to, aby byly využity ekologické materiály a technologie, které zvyšují energetickou efektivitu a zároveň zlepšují kvalitu života našich nájemníků.

Připojte se k našemu úsilí o tvorbu kvalitního, dostupného a udržitelného bydlení, které obohacuje životy a komunity. Prohlédněte si naše aktuální projekty a zjistěte, jak můžete být součástí této pozitivní proměny.

Situé en plein cœur de Toulon, Ouiliving propose un cadre de vie pensé pour les étudiants et les jeunes actifs à la recherche d’un logement flexible, confortable et convivial.

 Notre promesse
Des logements meublés modernes — chambres, studios ou colocations — avec salle de bain privée, climatisation, wifi haut-débit. 

Des espaces communs stylés et chaleureux (salon, cuisine, lieux de détente) pour favoriser les échanges, la convivialité et l’entraide. 

Une ambiance de communauté dynamique : vivre avec d’autres jeunes, partager des expériences, des projets, des moments. 

Une solution pratique et tout-inclus : démarches simplifiées, logement prêt à vivre, services pensés pour vous faciliter la vie. 

 Pourquoi choisir Ouiliving ?
Parce que le coliving, ce n’est pas juste un logement. C’est un mode de vie, un lieu d’épanouissement. 

Nous offrons une alternative à la location traditionnelle : un espace privatif pour chacun, des zones partagées pour créer du lien, et une communauté avec qui construire votre quotidien — tout en restant indépendant. 

 Notre mission : faciliter l’installation à Toulon des étudiants et jeunes actifs, leur offrir un logement accessible, de qualité et surtout — un vrai foyer où il fait bon vivre, apprendre, travailler et se rencontrer.

Durante la vida del alquiler, coordinamos mantenimiento e incidencias, con comunicación proactiva y tiempos de respuesta rápidos.

¿Qué nos diferencia?

    Renta garantizada desde el primer día: ingresos previsibles y sin sobresaltos.

    Gestión 360º: un único interlocutor para todo el proceso.

    Criterios exigentes de admisión: tranquilidad para el propietario.

    Procesos claros y documentados: transparencia en cada paso.

    Atención cercana y profesional: nos ocupamos de lo importante para que tú no tengas que hacerlo.

Si eres propietario y quieres alquilar sin riesgos ni pérdida de tiempo, Garenta es tu socio. Maximizamos la ocupación y la rentabilidad de tu activo, cuidamos el estado de la vivienda y te mantenemos siempre informado. La tranquilidad de cobrar a tiempo, siempre, y la libertad de delegar en un equipo especialista.

¿Hablamos? Te ofrecemos una valoración sin compromiso y te explicamos cómo empezar a disfrutar de tu renta desde hoy.

Description:
Vi er en aktør innen eiendomsforvaltning, og vår visjon er å skape langsiktig økonomisk suksess for våre investorer og eiere. Gjennom vår ekspertise i finans, eiendomsmarkedet, risikostyring og forvaltningspraksis, leverer vi skreddersydde løsninger som maksimerer verdien av eiendeler og sikrer økonomisk vekst.

Våre tjenester dekker hele spekteret av eiendomsforvaltning, og vi tar hånd om alle aspekter slik at våre kunder kan fokusere på sin kjernevirksomhet. Vi hjelper med anskaffelse av eiendommer som passer inn i investeringsstrategien, designer og implementerer strategiske porteføljeforvaltningsplaner, og overvåker og analyserer eiendelene for å sikre maksimal avkastning. Vi tar oss også av daglig drift og forvaltning, optimaliserer avkastningen gjennom smarte strategier, og gir grundig rapportering og kommunikasjon for å opprettholde tillit og gjøre informerte beslutninger.

Som pålitelig partner setter vi stor vekt på tillit, transparens og problemfri opplevelse for våre kunder. La oss hjelpe deg med å oppnå økonomisk suksess og maksimere verdien av dine eiendomsinvesteringer.

• Affordable rent
• No deposit required
• On-site laundry
• Pet-friendly units
• Fast application process
• Convenient location off Vineville & I-75

Name: VAST ET VOUS
Description:
Les étapes d'un projet 

1. **Évaluation de l'état actuel** : Nous effectuons une évaluation complète de l'état actuel de votre appartement, en identifiant les domaines qui pourraient bénéficier d'améliorations et en mettant en évidence les points forts à mettre en valeur.

2. **Recommandations de rénovation** : En fonction de notre évaluation, nous proposons des recommandations spécifiques de rénovation ou d'amélioration, en mettant l'accent sur les éléments qui ont le plus grand impact sur la valeur de la propriété et l'attrait pour les locataires potentiels.

3. **Décoration et aménagement** : Nous offrons des conseils professionnels sur la décoration et l'aménagement de l'espace pour maximiser son attrait visuel et créer une ambiance accueillante et confortable qui séduit les locataires.

4. **Gestion de projet complète** : Nous prenons en charge l'ensemble du processus, de la planification à l'exécution, en coordonnant les différents prestataires et en veillant à ce que les travaux soient réalisés dans les délais et le budget impartis.

En mettant en œuvre ces recommandations, nous visons à transformer votre appartement en une propriété attrayante et hautement désirable sur le marché locatif, ce qui se traduira par une augmentation du taux d'occupation et des revenus locatifs.

La Société immobilière Deltoïdienne est une entreprise spécialisée dans l’acquisition, le développement et la gestion d’actifs immobiliers durables. Investir de manière stratégique dans :

 Terrains à fort potentiel – pour du développement réfléchi

 Nos valeurs
 Intégrité – Une parole tenue, une éthique constante
 Transparence – Des relations claires, ouvertes et durables
 Création de valeur – Financière, humaine, sociale et communautaire

 Ce que nous offrons
Acquisition d’actifs immobiliers – Identification, évaluation et achat d’immeubles stratégiques

Parce que nous croyons qu’un projet immobilier peut et doit aller au-delà du simple rendement. Chez nous, chaque propriété est une opportunité d'améliorer la vie des gens, d’optimiser les performances, et de bâtir du durable.

Our Services:
 Rental Mediation: We connect businesses and expats with suitable studio apartments, apartments, and houses for temporary stays.
 Full-Service Support: We handle administration, contracts, and communication to ensure a smooth rental process.
 Furnishing Solutions: If a property is unfurnished, we assess whether to furnish it ourselves or collaborate with external providers.

Who We Help:
 Companies hiring international employees in construction projects (e.g., data centers).
 Expats relocating to the Netherlands who need quality housing quickly.
 Property Owners who want to rent out their homes securely and efficiently.

Our goal is to make the rental experience easy, transparent, and stress-free for both tenants and landlords, allowing businesses to focus on their core operations while expats feel at home in the Netherlands.

Name: Auberge Henry IV
Description:
Ce petit immeuble de caractère du 18ème siècle, de quatre étages en mono propriété, a été soigneusement rénové pour allier le confort moderne au cachet de l’ancien. 

Situé dans le périmètre du quartier historique de Pau, à deux pas des quartiers animés du Château et de la Place Clémenceau, il jouit cependant de l’environnement très calme de la rue Bernadotte qui relie la Place de la Libération à la Place de Verdun, idéale pour le stationnement. 

Pour un air de campagne en plein centre-ville, une petite cour arborée se niche au cœur de l’immeuble et propose à ses habitants un havre de verdure composé de palmiers, olivier, lauriers roses, lavande et jasmin. 

Un sentiment de « rentrer chez soi » nous apaise dès que l’on pousse la grande porte d’entrée de l’immeuble en bois plein, retrouvant cette ambiance qui se veut familiale et chaleureuse.  

Nous sommes en sécurité, protégés par un interphone à l’entrée et une caméra qui veille dans le hall, ainsi que nos vélos abrités dans un large local bien fermé.

L’escalier d’époque en bois dégage une douce odeur de cire, témoignant entre autres d’un entretien des parties communes particulièrement soigné, tout comme celui des appartements dont la maintenance est assurée dans la continuité d’une rénovation de qualité.

Name: CABINET BERGAN GESTION
Description:
Gestion de la réalisation des diagnostics obligatoires et contrôle de la validité de ceux existants. DPE, loi Boutin, installation électrique et/ou gaz, amiante et plomb; en fonction des caractéristiques de votre bien.
Gestion de l’installation d’une cuisine équipée ou semi-équipée avec notre prestataire spécialisé en IDF. 
Contrôle des plafonds de loyers régionaux, communaux, et des dispositifs fiscaux s’il y a lieu.
Évaluation locative (mise à jour du loyer prévisionnel si existant).
Estimation de la provision pour charges en fonction du type d’équipements du logement et de la copropriété.
Nous vous accompagnons sur toutes les démarches :
Rédaction et mise en ligne de l’annonce sur différents sites spécialisés, avec reportage photos.
Sélection rigoureuse des dossiers locataires avec contrôle des pièces et des revenus (authenticité de l’Avis d’IR et rapprochement avec les bulletins de salaire ou bilans notamment).
Contrôle de la conformité du dossier pour la mise en place de la GLI (Garantie sur les loyers impayés) si vous avez demandé à y souscrire.
Contrôle des pièces des garants s’il y a lieu.
Rédaction et signature du bail par voie électronique.Encaissement du dépôt de garantie.
Encaissement du loyer, que nous vous reversons mensuellement après déduction de nos frais de gestion.
Règlement de vos charges de copropriété (vous pouvez également conserver cette partie si vous préférez le faire vous-même).
Réalisation de l’état des lieux d’entrée et de sortie avec un logiciel disposant de la prise de photos afin d’éviter les litiges à la sortie, et signature de ce dernier par voie électronique.
Gestion des problèmes du quotidien (panne de chauffage, eau chaude etc).
Remontée des problèmes au Syndic quand cela est de son ressort.
Recherche des entreprises et réalisation des devis en cas de nécessité d’intervention.
Validation du devis avec le propriétaire, prise de rdv avec le locataire pour intervention.
Relances des règlements de loyers en retard.

Name: Jacks Homes Ltd
Description:
Our Story …. In 2005 as a result of a divorce, I found myself homeless. With the help of the Highland Council, I was put into homeless accommodation then eventually given a small flat in what could be seen as a rough area. At the time I felt very vulnerable and felt the urge to change the situation. After a few years I managed to get myself on the housing ladder. I am now settled in my ideal home. 
My experience gave me the drive to try and provide housing for others. We purchased our first BTL property in 2022 and during the vetting process it was apparent there was a real need for private rental properties throughout the highlands. The first few days of advertising the property saw over 30 applicants. This was heartbreaking for me as I had been in their shoes. We only had one property to give to one applicant. This has driven me to grow the business to provide fair value safe and secure accommodation to many. We are still in the early stages and we are growing steadily.
We generally only buy properties that have been on the market for a while. We believe we should not profit by competing with first time buyers or other genuine home buyers. We like to purchase properties that need updating, we can then carry out full refurbishments and let them out to long term tenants.
As part of out growth, as well as being landlords and property investors, my partner has trained and qualified as a letting agent. This allows us to let out properties on behalf of other landlords. This is done through our subsidiary company Jacks Group. 
My strong work ethic came from my parents who have always supported and believed in me. Sadly my dad passed away a few years ago, however I wanted the family name to live on, hence the name Jacks Homes.
Thanks you for taking the time to read and I really appreciate your support,

 Sarah Jack (Director)

Description:
Eʟᴛᴀɴɪɪ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ ɪs ᴀ Rᴇsɪᴅᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ ᴀɴᴅ Pᴇʀsᴏɴᴀʟ Assɪsᴛᴀɴᴄᴇ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ Cᴏᴍᴘᴀɴʏ. Tʜʀᴏᴜɢʜ ᴏᴜʀ sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇs, ᴡᴇ ᴀɪᴅ Lᴀɴᴅʟᴏʀᴅ⁽s⁾, Iɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟs ᴀɴᴅ Bᴜsɪɴᴇssᴇs ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴍᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛʜᴇɪʀ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ⁽s⁾ ᴀɴᴅ ʟɪꜰᴇsᴛʏʟᴇ.  

Oᴜʀ sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇs ᴘʀᴏᴠɪᴅᴇ ᴍᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, ᴀᴅᴠɪᴄᴇ ᴀɴᴅ sᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴇɴsᴜʀᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ʟɪꜰᴇsᴛʏʟᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀssᴇᴛ’s ʀᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴛʜᴇɪʀ ᴍᴀxɪᴍᴜᴍ ᴘᴏᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ. Iɴ ᴀᴅᴅɪᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴏᴜʀ Rᴇsɪᴅᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇs, ᴏᴜʀ Pʀᴏᴊᴇᴄᴛ ᴀɴᴅ Pᴇʀsᴏɴᴀʟ Assɪsᴛᴀɴᴄᴇ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇ ᴀᴄᴄᴏᴍᴘʟɪsʜᴇs ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴜʀᴘᴏsᴇ ᴏꜰ ᴀssɪsᴛɪɴɢ Cʟɪᴇɴᴛs ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴛʜᴇɪʀ ᴘᴇʀsᴏɴᴀʟ ᴏʀ ᴡᴏʀᴋ⁻ʀᴇʟᴀᴛᴇᴅ ᴅᴀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀʏ ʀᴇqᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛs. Wᴇ ᴏᴠᴇʀsᴇᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ⁽s⁾ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀꜰꜰᴀɪʀs ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴀᴄqᴜɪsɪᴛɪᴏɴ ᴜɴᴛɪʟ ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇᴛɪᴏɴ. Yᴏᴜ ᴄᴀɴ ʀᴇsᴛ ᴀssᴜʀᴇᴅ ᴋɴᴏᴡɪɴɢ, ᴀʟʟ sᴜᴘᴘʟɪᴇʀs ᴜsᴇᴅ ᴏɴ ᴏʀ ɪɴ ʏᴏᴜʀ ʜᴏᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀꜰꜰᴀɪʀs, ɪɴᴄʟᴜᴅɪɴɢ ᴀɴʏ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ ᴀɴᴅ ʟɪꜰᴇsᴛʏʟᴇ ᴀᴅᴠɪsᴇ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴍᴇᴅɪᴀʟ ᴡᴏʀᴋ ɪs ᴅᴏɴᴇ sᴏ ᴛʜʀᴏᴜɢʜ ʀᴇᴘᴜᴛᴀʙʟᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀᴄᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛᴇᴅ sᴏᴜʀᴄᴇs ᴡɪᴛʜ ʏᴇᴀʀs ᴏꜰ ᴇxᴘᴇʀɪᴇɴᴄᴇ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡɪɴɢ ꜰɪᴇʟᴅs:

Pʀɪᴠᴀᴛᴇ Rᴇɴᴛᴇᴅ Sᴇᴄᴛᴏʀ, Rᴇsɪᴅᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ Lᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢs, Rᴇsɪᴅᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, Hᴏᴜsᴇ ᴏꜰ Mᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ Oᴄᴄᴜᴘᴀᴛɪᴏɴ, Lᴇᴀsᴇʜᴏʟᴅ, Fʀᴇᴇʜᴏʟᴅ, Bʟᴏᴄᴋ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, Assᴜʀᴇᴅ Sʜᴏʀᴛʜᴏʟᴅ Tᴇɴᴀɴᴄɪᴇs, Sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇ Cʜᴀʀɢᴇ ᴀɴᴅ Gʀᴏᴜɴᴅ Rᴇɴᴛ Pᴀʏᴍᴇɴᴛ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, Uᴛɪʟɪᴛʏ ᴀɴᴅ Cᴏᴜɴᴄɪʟ Tᴀx Tʀᴀɴsꜰᴇʀs ᴀɴᴅ Pᴀʏᴍᴇɴᴛ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, Rᴇᴘᴀɪʀs, Eᴠɪᴄᴛɪᴏɴ Nᴏᴛɪᴄᴇs, Cᴏᴜʀᴛ Aᴘᴘᴇᴀʀᴀɴᴄᴇs, Dᴇᴘᴏsɪᴛ ᴅɪʟᴀᴘɪᴅᴀᴛɪᴏɴs/Nᴇɢᴏᴛɪᴀᴛɪᴏɴs ᴀɴᴅ Lɪꜰᴇsᴛʏʟᴇ Cᴏɴsᴜʟᴛᴀɴᴄʏ ᴀɴᴅ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ. Tʜɪs ɪs ɴᴏᴛ ᴀɴ ᴇxʜᴀᴜsᴛɪᴠᴇ ʟɪsᴛ. 

Wʜᴇᴛʜᴇʀ ʏᴏᴜ ʀᴇqᴜɪʀᴇ, ʜᴇʟᴘ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴍᴀɴᴀɢɪɴɢ ʏᴏᴜʀ Pʀᴏᴘᴇʀᴛʏ⁽s⁾ ʀᴇᴘᴀɪʀs ᴏʀ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴄᴏᴏʀᴅɪɴᴀᴛɪɴɢ ᴀɴᴅ ʜᴏsᴛɪɴɢ ᴀɴ ᴇᴠᴇɴᴛ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴛᴀɪʟᴏʀᴇᴅ ᴘᴀᴄᴋᴀɢᴇs ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ Cʟɪᴇɴᴛs, Eʟᴛᴀɴɪɪ Mᴀɴᴀɢᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ ɪs ᴀᴛ ʏᴏᴜʀ sᴇʀᴠɪᴄᴇ.

Name: The Wizard Hideout
Description:
The Wizard Hideout was built with one simple goal: to create a place that feels like a real wizard’s home, not a themed attraction or novelty rental.

A lot of themed cabins rely on props, surface-level references, or décor that looks good in photos but doesn’t hold up in real life. This place was designed differently. Every room, material, and detail was chosen to feel believable, comfortable, and lived in, like someone from that world actually belongs here.

The focus wasn’t on spectacle. It was on making something that feels real the moment you walk in.

As you move through the home, you’ll start to notice things revealing themselves naturally.

A portrait on the wall doesn’t stay still. A concealed door opens into a hidden tavern tucked away from the rest of the house. Spaces connect in ways that feel intentional rather than staged, encouraging you to explore without feeling like you’re walking through a set.

While the setting feels immersive, the Hideout was built for real stays, not just admiration.

Each bedroom is inspired by a wizarding house and designed as a true place to rest. The beds are substantial, the bedding is high quality, and the rooms are quiet, dark, and comfortable. These are spaces meant for sleeping well, not just looking interesting.

The cabin sits on five wooded acres, giving you privacy and a sense of being tucked away, while still being just minutes from downtown Blue Ridge. You get the feeling of being in the forest without being isolated or hard to reach.

The lower level opens into a large game room designed for nights that don’t need a plan. There’s a full karaoke setup, a large-screen TV, a classic two-player arcade, and plenty of seating for groups to spread out and stay awhile.

Above & Beyond Homes offers a uniquely local and personalized vacation rental experience in Crosslake. Unlike large booking platforms, we are a full-time, locally-owned property management company passionate about providing guests with an unforgettable stay. 

We take pride in our attention to detail and premium service. Our local team handles everything from home maintenance to personalized recommendations, allowing you to relax knowing your rental is in good hands. 

•Local Expertise: Recommendations for activities, dining, and events from a dedicated team who lives and works in Crosslake. We have a depth of knowledge that online platforms cannot match. 

•Personalized Service: A named point of contact to ensure all your needs are met. We believe vacations should be enjoyed, not managed. We handle all details so you can focus on relaxation. 

•Peace of Mind: Lawn care, snow removal, HVAC, plumbing, and more. We manage every aspect of your rental to deliver a flawless experience. 

•Support for the Community: Booking with us supports a local small business and the Crosslake economy. We are committed to sustaining the natural beauty and resources of this special place. 

When planning your next vacation, don't settle for an impersonal online booking. Choose Above & Beyond Homes for an experience crafted by locals who care about your enjoyment, support for the community, and a vacation you will cherish for years to come. Contact us today to learn more about our premium vacation rentals and service. 

Licensed real estate broker in the State of MN. Each office independently owned and operated. Equal Housing Opportunity.

Name: Nokal Excluisve Stay
Description:
Nokal, which in Nahuatl, the ancestral language of Mexico, means "My House", invites you to live a unique lodging experience in the heart of La Condesa, Mexico City.

Not a hotel and more than an Airbnb, this anti-hotel is an exclusive & artistic concept where hospitality is redefined.

The project was born from the union of two intertwined stories: that of France and that of Mexico. A tribute to the richness of both cultures, with a mutual fascination that is reflected in every detail of Nokal.

Name: Big Red Barn Properties
Description:
Owning rental property shouldn’t feel like a second job.

At Big Red Barn Property Management, we help landlords and investors across Southern Wisconsin protect their investments, simplify operations, and create happy, long-term tenants.

We know managing properties can be stressful—late-night calls, maintenance issues, and uncertain cash flow can take the joy out of owning real estate. That’s why our team was built by local investors who understand the challenges firsthand. We manage your property like it’s our own—so you can focus on what matters most.

Our approach is simple: Happy Residents. Stronger Returns.

We combine local expertise, modern systems, and clear communication to make property ownership easy and predictable. Whether you own a single-family home, duplex, or small multifamily, we create a plan that fits your goals.

What we do:
 Full-service property management
 Rent collection and accounting
 Coordinated maintenance and repairs Owner reporting and financial transparency
 Tenant placement and retention

Big Red Barn is more than a management company—we’re your partner in building long-term wealth through real estate.

Let us handle the details so you can enjoy the rewards.

 Serving Southern Wisconsin – Monroe, Argyle, New Glarus & surrounding areas

Name: Heart To Heart Housing
Description:
We are a nationally recognized 501(c)3 non-profit organization that is dedicated to providing affordable housing solutions to individuals in the King and Snohomish County areas. Our mission is to improve the quality of life for those in need by offering brand-new, fully renovated homes that are fully furnished with stainless steel appliances, fully decorated, and have all utilities included.

At our organization, we understand that finding affordable and suitable housing can be a significant challenge for many people. That is why we are committed to providing safe and comfortable living spaces at an affordable cost. Our newly renovated homes are designed to meet the needs of a wide range of individuals, from families to individuals, and we take pride in offering a welcoming and inclusive environment.
